t_id.kemenag: Dan tidak ada sesuatupun melainkan pada sisi Kami-lah khazanahnya; dan Kami tidak menurunkannya melainkan dengan ukuran yang tertentu.
t_id.sabiq: Segala kebaikan yang ada pada Kami bagaikan khazanah yang penuh, dari segi penyiapan dan pemberian pada waktunya. Tidak ada musibah yang menimpa manusia kecuali sesuai ketentuan yang telah ditetapkan, sejalan dengan hikmah dan kebijaksanaan Kami di alam raya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan tiada) tidak ada (sesuatu pun melainkan pada sisi Kamilah khazanahnya) huruf min adalah zaidah; yang dimaksud adalah kunci-kunci perbendaharaan segala sesuatu itu (dan Kami tidak menurunkannya melainkan dengan ukuran-ukuran yang tertentu) sesuai dengan kepentingan-kepentingannya.
t_id.iwq: Dan tidak ada sesuatupun melainkan pada sisi Kami-lah khazanahnya; dan Kami tidak menurunkannya melainkan dengan ukuran yang tertentu.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وإن» ما «من» زائدة «شيء إلا عندنا خزائنه» مفاتيح خزائنه «وما ننزله إلا بقدر معلوم» على حسب المصالح
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَإِن مِّن شَيۡءٍ إِلَّا عِندَنَا خَزَآئِنُهُۥ وَمَا نُنَزِّلُهُۥٓ إِلَّا بِقَدَرٖ مَّعۡلُومٖ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan tiada) tidak ada (sesuatu pun melainkan pada sisi Kamilah khazanahnya) huruf min adalah zaidah; yang dimaksud adalah kunci-kunci perbendaharaan segala sesuatu itu (dan Kami tidak menurunkannya melainkan dengan ukuran-ukuran yang tertentu) sesuai dengan kepentingan-kepentingannya

ar: وَأَرۡسَلۡنَا ٱلرِّیَـٰحَ لَوَ ٰقِحَ فَأَنزَلۡنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَاۤءِ مَاۤءࣰ فَأَسۡقَیۡنَـٰكُمُوهُ وَمَاۤ أَنتُمۡ لَهُۥ بِخَـٰزِنِینَ
ar_simple: وَأَرْسَلْنَا الرِّيَاحَ لَوَاقِحَ فَأَنْزَلْنَا مِنَ السَّمَاءِ مَاءً فَأَسْقَيْنَاكُمُوهُ وَمَا أَنْتُمْ لَهُ بِخَازِنِينَ
transliteration: wa-arsalnā l-riyāḥa lawāqiḥa fa-anzalnā mina l-samāi māan fa-asqaynākumūhu wamā antum lahu bikhāzinīna

t.sahih-int: And We have sent the fertilizing winds and sent down water from the sky and given you drink from it. And you are not its retainers
t.asad: And We let loose the winds to fertilize [plants] and We send down water from the skies and let you drink thereof: and it is not you who dispose of its source
t.yusuf-ali: And We send the fecundating winds, then cause the rain to descend from the sky, therewith providing you with water (in abundance), though ye are not the guardians of its stores
t.pickthall: And We send the winds fertilising, and cause water to descend from the sky, and give it you to drink. It is not ye who are the holders of the store thereof
t.arberry: And We loose the winds fertilising, and We send down out of heaven water, then We give it to you to drink, and you are not its treasurers
t.hilali-khan: And We send the winds fertilizing (to fill heavily the clouds with water), then caused the water (rain) to descend from the sky, and We gave it to you to drink, and it is not you who are the owners of its stores [i.e. to give water to whom you like or to withhold it from whom you like]
t.itani: We send the fertilizing winds; and send down water from the sky, and give it to you to drink, and you are not the ones who store it.
t.mubarakpuri: And We send the winds fertilizing, then We cause the water to descend from the sky, and We give it to you to drink, and it is not you who are the owners of its supply.
t.qarib: We send the winds to fertilize, and we bring water from the sky for you to drink; but it is not you who control its sources
t.wahiduddin: We let loose fertilizing winds, and bring water from the sky for you to drink; and you could not have stored it up for yourselves
t.shakir: And We send the winds fertilizing, then send down water from the cloud so We give it to you to drink of, nor is it you who store it up
t.haleem: We send the winds to fertilize, and We bring down water from the sky for you to drink- you do not control its sources
t.maariful: And We sent forth winds carrying the clouds, then sent down water from the sky and gave it to you to drink, and you are not able to store it
t.khattab: We send fertilizing winds, and bring down rain from the sky for you to drink. It is not you who hold its reserves
t.ghali: And We send the winds impregnating, (and) so We send down from the heaven water, then We give it to you to drink, and in no way can you even be its treasurers
t.irving: We send forth fertilizing winds and send down water from the sky and offer you something to drink from it. You are not the ones who store it up
t.iwq: And We have sent the fertilizing winds and sent down water from the sky and given you drink from it. And you are not its retainers

t_id.kemenag: Dan Kami telah meniupkan angin untuk mengawinkan (tumbuh-tumbuhan) dan Kami turunkan hujan dari langit, lalu Kami beri minum kamu dengan air itu, dan sekali-kali bukanlah kamu yang menyimpannya.
t_id.sabiq: Kami meniupkan angin untuk membawa hujan dan bibit-bibit tanaman. Dari air hujan itu Kami menyirami kalian. Itu semua tunduk di bawah kehendak Kami. Tak seorang pun dapat mengendalikannya hingga menjadi bagai khazanah miliknya(1). (1) Ayat ini menunjukkan apa yang dibuktikan oleh perkembangan ilmu pengetahuan modern bahwa angin merupakan faktor penting dalam penyerbukan pada tumbuh-tumbuhan. Selain itu, sebelum awal abad dua puluh belum pernah diketahui bahwa angin membuahi awan dengan sesuatu yang menghasilkan hujan. Sebab, proton-proton yang terkonsentrasi di bawah molekul-molekul uap air untuk menjadi rintik-rintik hujan yang ada di dalam awan, merupakan komponen utama air hujan yang dibawa angin ke tempat berkumpulnya awan. Proton-proton itu mengandung unsur garam laut, oksida dan unsur debu yang dibawa angin. Itu semua merupakan zat penting yang menciptakan hujan. Selain itu, ditemukan pula bahwa hujan terjadi dari siklus perputaran air. Mulai dari penguapan air di permukaan bumi dan permukaan laut dan berakhir dengan turunnya kembali uap itu ke atas permukaan bumi dan laut dalam bentuk air hujan. Air hujan yang turun itu menjadi bahan penyiram bagi semua makhluk hidup, termasuk bumi itu sendiri. Air hujan yang turun itu tidak dapat dikendalikan atau ditahan, karena akan meresap ke dalam tubuh berbagai makhluk hidup dan ke dalam tanah untuk kemudian menguap lagi. Dan begitu seterusnya. Dari sini jelaslah makna bagian akhir ayat ini yang berbunyi wa mâ antum bi khâzinîn yang berarti 'kalian tidak akan dapat mencegah turunnya atau terserapnya hujan dari dan di dalam langit, dalam bentuk uap'.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan Kami telah meniupkan angin untuk mengumpulkan awan) menggiring mendung sehingga terkumpul lalu penuh dengan air (lalu Kami turunkan dari langit) dari mendung itu (air) air hujan (kemudian Kami beri minum kamu dengan air itu, dan sekali-kali bukanlah kalian yang menyimpannya) artinya, bukanlah kalian yang menyimpannya dengan upaya tangan kalian.
t_id.iwq: Dan Kami telah meniupkan angin untuk mengawinkan (tumbuh-tumbuhan) dan Kami turunkan hujan dari langit, lalu Kami beri minum kamu dengan air itu, dan sekali-kali bukanlah kamu yang menyimpannya.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وأرسلنا الرياح لواقح» تلقح السحاب فيمتلئ ماء «فأنزلنا من السماء» السحاب «ماء» مطرا «فأسقيناكموه وما أنتم له بخازنين» أي ليست خزائنه بأيديكم
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَأَرۡسَلۡنَا ٱلرِّيَٰحَ لَوَٰقِحَ فَأَنزَلۡنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءٗ فَأَسۡقَيۡنَٰكُمُوهُ وَمَآ أَنتُمۡ لَهُۥ بِخَٰزِنِينَ (لَوَاقِحَ: تَلْقَحُ السَّحَابَ؛ فَيَمْتَلِئُ بِالمَاءِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan Kami telah meniupkan angin untuk mengumpulkan awan) menggiring mendung sehingga terkumpul lalu penuh dengan air (lalu Kami turunkan dari langit) dari mendung itu (air) air hujan (kemudian Kami beri minum kamu dengan air itu, dan sekali-kali bukanlah kalian yang menyimpannya) artinya, bukanlah kalian yang menyimpannya dengan upaya tangan kalian

ar: وَإِنَّا لَنَحۡنُ نُحۡیِۦ وَنُمِیتُ وَنَحۡنُ ٱلۡوَ ٰرِثُونَ
ar_simple: وَإِنَّا لَنَحْنُ نُحْيِي وَنُمِيتُ وَنَحْنُ الْوَارِثُونَ
transliteration: wa-innā lanaḥnu nuḥ'yī wanumītu wanaḥnu l-wārithūna

t.sahih-int: And indeed, it is We who give life and cause death, and We are the Inheritor
t.asad: for, behold, it is We-We alone -who grant life and deal death, and it is We alone who shall remain after all else will have passed away
t.yusuf-ali: And verily, it is We Who give life, and Who give death: it is We Who remain inheritors (after all else passes away)
t.pickthall: Lo! and it is We, even We, Who quicken and give death, and We are the Inheritor
t.arberry: It is We who give life, and make to die, and it is We who are the inheritors
t.hilali-khan: And certainly We! We it is Who give life, and cause death, and We are the Inheritors
t.itani: It is We who give life and cause death, and We are the Inheritors.
t.mubarakpuri: And certainly We! It is We Who give life, and cause death, and We are the Inheritors.
t.qarib: It is We who give life and cause death, and it is We alone who will inherit all
t.wahiduddin: Truly, it is We who bring to life and We who cause death and We are the inheritor of all things
t.shakir: And most surely We bring to life and cause to die and We are the heirs
t.haleem: It is We who give life and death; it is We who inherit [everything]
t.maariful: It is indeed We, and only We, who give life and bring death, and We are the ultimate inheritor (of everything)
t.khattab: Surely it is We Who give life and cause death. And We are the ˹Eternal˺ Successor
t.ghali: And surely We, Ever We, indeed give life and make to die, and We are the inheritors
t.irving: We give life and bring death, and We are the Heirs [to every- thing]
t.iwq: And verily, it is We who give life and cause death, and We are the Inheritor

t_id.kemenag: Dan sesungguhnya benar-benar Kami-lah yang menghidupkan dan mematikan dan Kami (pulalah) yang mewarisi.
t_id.sabiq: Hanya Kamilah yang menghidupkan segala sesuatu untuk kemudian mematikannya, karena semua makhluk adalah milik Kami.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya benar-benar Kamilah yang menghidupkan dan mematikan dan Kami pula yang mewarisi) yang tetap hidup dan mewarisi semua makhluk.
t_id.iwq: Dan sesungguhnya benar-benar Kami-lah yang menghidupkan dan mematikan dan Kami (pulalah) yang mewarisi.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وإنا لنحن نحي ونميت ونحن الوارثون» الباقون نرث جميع الخلق
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَإِنَّا لَنَحۡنُ نُحۡيِۦ وَنُمِيتُ وَنَحۡنُ ٱلۡوَٰرِثُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya benar-benar Kamilah yang menghidupkan dan mematikan dan Kami pula yang mewarisi) yang tetap hidup dan mewarisi semua makhluk

ar: وَلَقَدۡ عَلِمۡنَا ٱلۡمُسۡتَقۡدِمِینَ مِنكُمۡ وَلَقَدۡ عَلِمۡنَا ٱلۡمُسۡتَءۡخِرِینَ
ar_simple: وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْنَا الْمُسْتَقْدِمِينَ مِنْكُمْ وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْنَا الْمُسْتَأْخِرِينَ
transliteration: walaqad ʿalim'nā l-mus'taqdimīna minkum walaqad ʿalim'nā l-mus'takhirīna

t.sahih-int: And We have already known the preceding [generations] among you, and We have already known the later [ones to come]
t.asad: And well do We know [the hearts and deeds of all human beings - both] those who lived before you and those who will come after you
t.yusuf-ali: To Us are known those of you who hasten forward, and those who lag behind
t.pickthall: And verily We know the eager among you and verily We know the laggards
t.arberry: We know the ones of you who press forward, and We know the laggards
t.hilali-khan: And indeed, We know the first generations of you who had passed away, and indeed, We know the present generations of you (mankind), and also those who will come afterwards
t.itani: And We know those of you who go forward, and We know those who lag behind.
t.mubarakpuri: And indeed, We know the first generations of you who have passed away, and indeed, We know the present generations of you (mankind), and also those who will come afterwards.
t.qarib: We know very well those of you who have gone ahead and those who are still to come
t.wahiduddin: We know those who lived before you and those who will come after you
t.shakir: And certainly We know those of you who have gone before and We certainly know those who shall come later
t.haleem: We know exactly those of you who come first and those who come later
t.maariful: We know those of you who went ahead, and We know those who remained late
t.khattab: We certainly know those who have gone before you and those who will come after ˹you˺
t.ghali: And indeed We already know the ones of you who can go forward, and indeed We already know the ones who can postpone
t.irving: We know which of you try to get ahead and We know those who hold back
t.iwq: And We have already known the preceding generations among you, and We have already known the later ones to come

t_id.kemenag: Dan sesungguhnya Kami telah mengetahui orang-orang yang terdahulu daripada-mu dan sesungguhnya Kami mengetahui pula orang-orang yang terkemudian (daripadamu).
t_id.sabiq: Masing-masing kalian mempunyai ajal yang telah ditentukan. Hanya Kami yang mengetahui ajal itu. Kami mengetahui siapa yang hidup dan mati lebih dahulu, dan siapa pula yang hidup dan mati kemudian.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya Kami telah mengetahui orang-orang yang terdahulu daripada kalian) yaitu makhluk-makhluk yang terdahulu sejak Nabi Adam (dan sesungguhnya Kami mengetahui pula orang-orang yang terkemudian) orang-orang yang akan datang kemudian hingga hari kiamat.
t_id.iwq: Dan sesungguhnya Kami telah mengetahui orang-orang yang terdahulu daripada-mu dan sesungguhnya Kami mengetahui pula orang-orang yang terkemudian (daripadamu).

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ولقد علمنا المستقدمين منكم» أي من تقدم من الخلق من لدن آدم «ولقد علمنا المستأخرين» المتأخرين إلى يوم القيامة
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَلَقَدۡ عَلِمۡنَا ٱلۡمُسۡتَقۡدِمِينَ مِنكُمۡ وَلَقَدۡ عَلِمۡنَا ٱلۡمُسۡتَـٔۡخِرِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya Kami telah mengetahui orang-orang yang terdahulu daripada kalian) yaitu makhluk-makhluk yang terdahulu sejak Nabi Adam (dan sesungguhnya Kami mengetahui pula orang-orang yang terkemudian) orang-orang yang akan datang kemudian hingga hari kiamat

ar: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ یَحۡشُرُهُمۡۚ إِنَّهُۥ حَكِیمٌ عَلِیمࣱ
ar_simple: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ يَحْشُرُهُمْ ۚ إِنَّهُ حَكِيمٌ عَلِيمٌ
transliteration: wa-inna rabbaka huwa yaḥshuruhum innahu ḥakīmun ʿalīmun

t.sahih-int: And indeed, your Lord will gather them; indeed, He is Wise and Knowing
t.asad: and, behold, it is thy Sustainer who will gather them all together [on Judgment Day]: verily, He is wise, all-knowing
t.yusuf-ali: Assuredly it is thy Lord Who will gather them together: for He is perfect in Wisdom and Knowledge
t.pickthall: Lo! thy Lord will gather them together. Lo! He is Wise, Aware
t.arberry: and it is thy Lord shall muster them, and He is All-wise, All-knowing
t.hilali-khan: And verily, your Lord will gather them together. Truly, He is All-Wise, All-Knowing
t.itani: It is your Lord who will gather them together. He is the Wise, the Knowing.
t.mubarakpuri: And verily, your Lord will gather them together. Truly, He is Most Wise, (and) Knowing.
t.qarib: and, behold, it is your Lord who will gather them all together [on Judgment Day]. Truly, He is the All-Wise and the All-Knowing
t.wahiduddin: It is your Lord who will gather them. He is all wise and all knowing
t.shakir: And surely your Lord will gather them together; surely He is Wise, Knowing
t.haleem: [Prophet], it is your Lord who will gather them all together: He is all wise, all knowing
t.maariful: Surely, your Lord will gather all of them together. Indeed He is All-Wise, All-Knowing
t.khattab: Surely your Lord ˹alone˺ will gather them together ˹for judgment˺. He is truly All-Wise, All-Knowing
t.ghali: And surely your Lord, Ever He, will muster them; surely He is Ever-Wise, Ever-Knowing
t.irving: Your Lord will summon them; He is Wise, Aware
t.iwq: And verily, your Lord will gather them; verily, He is Wise and Knowing

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya Tuhanmu, Dialah yang akan menghimpunkan mereka. Sesungguhnya Dia adalah Maha Bijaksana lagi Maha Mengetahui.
t_id.sabiq: Orang-orang yang terdahulu dan yang akan datang semuanya akan dikumpulkan pada satu waktu, dan akan diperhitungkan dan diberi balasan oleh Allah Swt. Hal itu sejalan dengan hikmah dan ilmu-Nya. Dialah yang mempunyai sebutan al-Hakîm (Yang Mahabijaksana) dan al-'Alîm (Yang Maha Mengetahui).
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya Rabbmu, Dialah yang akan menghimpunkan mereka. Sesungguhnya Dia adalah Maha Bijaksana) di dalam pekerjaan-Nya (lagi Maha Mengetahui.) tentang makhluk-Nya.
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya Tuhanmu, Dialah yang akan menghimpunkan mereka. Sesungguhnya Dia adalah Maha Bijaksana lagi Maha Mengetahui.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وإن ربك هو يحشرهم إنه حكيم» في صنعه «عليم» بخلقه
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ يَحۡشُرُهُمۡۚ إِنَّهُۥ حَكِيمٌ عَلِيمٞ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya Rabbmu, Dialah yang akan menghimpunkan mereka. Sesungguhnya Dia adalah Maha Bijaksana) di dalam pekerjaan-Nya (lagi Maha Mengetahui.) tentang makhluk-Nya

ar: وَلَقَدۡ خَلَقۡنَا ٱلۡإِنسَـٰنَ مِن صَلۡصَـٰلࣲ مِّنۡ حَمَإࣲ مَّسۡنُونࣲ
ar_simple: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنْسَانَ مِنْ صَلْصَالٍ مِنْ حَمَإٍ مَسْنُونٍ
transliteration: walaqad khalaqnā l-insāna min ṣalṣālin min ḥama-in masnūnin

t.sahih-int: And We did certainly create man out of clay from an altered black mud
t.asad: AND, INDEED, We have created man out of sounding clay, out of dark-slime transmuted
t.yusuf-ali: We created man from sounding clay, from mud moulded into shape
t.pickthall: Verily We created man of potter's clay of black mud altered
t.arberry: Surely We created man of a clay of mud moulded
t.hilali-khan: And indeed, We created man from sounding clay of altered black smooth mud
t.itani: We created the human being from clay, from molded mud.
t.mubarakpuri: And indeed, We created man from dried (sounding) clay of altered mud.
t.qarib: We have created man out of dried clay, formed from dark mud
t.wahiduddin: We created man out of dry clay, from moulded mud
t.shakir: And certainly We created man of clay that gives forth sound, of black mud fashioned in shape
t.haleem: We created man out of dried clay formed from dark mud
t.maariful: Indeed We created man from a ringing clay made of decayed mud
t.khattab: Indeed, We created man from sounding clay moulded from black mud
t.ghali: And indeed We already created man of dry clay of mud modeled
t.irving: We created man from ringing clay, from moulded slime
t.iwq: And We did certainly create man out of clay from an altered black mud

t_id.kemenag: Dan sesungguhnya Kami telah menciptakan manusia (Adam) dari tanah liat kering (yang berasal) dari lumpur hitam yang diberi bentuk.
t_id.sabiq: Dalam sistem penciptaan, Kami menciptakan dua jenis makhluk di bumi. Manusia Kami ciptakan dari tanah kering yang dapat bersuara ketika diketuk(1). (1) Shalshâl (tanah liat) dan hama' (tanah lumpur) adalah jenis tanah yang memiliki komponen yang sama dengan manusia. Secara kimiawi, jenis tanah itu terdiri atas unsur-unsur debu dan air, dua unsur yang membentuk manusia. Banyak ayat lain dalam al-Qur'ân yang berbicara mengenai hal ini.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya Kami telah menciptakan manusia) yaitu Nabi Adam (dari tanah liat kering) tanah liat kering yang apabila diketuk akan terdengar daripadanya suara melenting (yang berasal dari lumpur hitam) tanah liat yang hitam (yang diberi bentuk) diubah bentuknya.
t_id.iwq: Dan sesungguhnya Kami telah menciptakan manusia (Adam) dari tanah liat kering (yang berasal) dari lumpur hitam yang diberi bentuk.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ولقد خلقنا الإنسان» آدم «من صلصال» طين يابس يسمع له صلصلة إذا نقر «من حمأ» طين أسود «مسنون» متغير
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَلَقَدۡ خَلَقۡنَا ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ مِن صَلۡصَٰلٖ مِّنۡ حَمَإٖ مَّسۡنُونٖ (صَلْصَالٍ: طِينٍ يَابِسٍ يُسْمَعُ لَهُ صوْتٌ إِذَا نُقِرَ, حَمَإٍ: طِينٍ أَسْوَدَ, مَّسْنُونٍ: مُتَغَيِّرٍ لَوْنُهُ وَرِيحُهُ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya Kami telah menciptakan manusia) yaitu Nabi Adam (dari tanah liat kering) tanah liat kering yang apabila diketuk akan terdengar daripadanya suara melenting (yang berasal dari lumpur hitam) tanah liat yang hitam (yang diberi bentuk) diubah bentuknya

ar: وَٱلۡجَاۤنَّ خَلَقۡنَـٰهُ مِن قَبۡلُ مِن نَّارِ ٱلسَّمُومِ
ar_simple: وَالْجَانَّ خَلَقْنَاهُ مِنْ قَبْلُ مِنْ نَارِ السَّمُومِ
transliteration: wal-jāna khalaqnāhu min qablu min nāri l-samūmi

t.sahih-int: And the jinn We created before from scorching fire
t.asad: whereas the invisible beings We had created, [long] before that, out of the fire of scorching winds
t.yusuf-ali: And the Jinn race, We had created before, from the fire of a scorching wind
t.pickthall: And the jinn did We create aforetime of essential fire
t.arberry: and the jinn created We before of fire flaming
t.hilali-khan: And the jinn, We created aforetime from the smokeless flame of fire
t.itani: And the jinn We created before, from piercing fire.
t.mubarakpuri: And the Jinn, We created earlier from the smokeless flame of fire.
t.qarib: and, before that, we had created jinn from a scorching firestorm
t.wahiduddin: and the jinn We had created before from flaming fire
t.shakir: And the jinn We created before, of intensely hot fire
t.haleem: the jinn We created before, from the fire of scorching wind
t.maariful: As for the Jānn (the first Jinn), We had created him earlier from the fire of the scorching wind
t.khattab: As for the jinn, We created them earlier from smokeless fire
t.ghali: And the jinn race We created earlier of the fire (The Arabic word samum is sometimes understood to be pestilential wind) of a pestilential (fire)
t.irving: while the sprites We had created earlier from smokeless fire
t.iwq: And the jinn We created before from scorching fire

t_id.kemenag: Dan Kami telah menciptakan jin sebelum (Adam) dari api yang sangat panas.
t_id.sabiq: Sedangkan jin, sebelum itu, ketika Kami menciptakan Iblîs yang merupakan asalnya, Kami ciptakan dari api yang panas dan dapat membakar tubuh manusia.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan jin) maksudnya biangnya jin, yaitu iblis (Kami telah menciptakan sebelumnya) sebelum Nabi Adam diciptakan (dari api yang sangat panas) yaitu api yang sama sekali tidak berasap dan dapat menembus pori-pori.
t_id.iwq: Dan Kami telah menciptakan jin sebelum (Adam) dari api yang sangat panas.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «والجان» أبا الجان وهو إبليس «خلقناه من قبل» أي قبل خلق آدم «من نار السموم» هي نار لا دخان لها تنفذ من المسام
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَٱلۡجَآنَّ خَلَقۡنَٰهُ مِن قَبۡلُ مِن نَّارِ ٱلسَّمُومِ (نَّارِ السَّمُومِ: نَارٍ شَدِيدَةِ الحَرَارَةِ لَا دُخَانَ لَهَا)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan jin) maksudnya biangnya jin, yaitu iblis (Kami telah menciptakan sebelumnya) sebelum Nabi Adam diciptakan (dari api yang sangat panas) yaitu api yang sama sekali tidak berasap dan dapat menembus pori-pori

ar: وَإِذۡ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلۡمَلَـٰۤئِكَةِ إِنِّی خَـٰلِقُۢ بَشَرࣰا مِّن صَلۡصَـٰلࣲ مِّنۡ حَمَإࣲ مَّسۡنُونࣲ
ar_simple: وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ صَلْصَالٍ مِنْ حَمَإٍ مَسْنُونٍ
transliteration: wa-idh qāla rabbuka lil'malāikati innī khāliqun basharan min ṣalṣālin min ḥama-in masnūnin

t.sahih-int: And [mention, O Muhammad], when your Lord said to the angels, "I will create a human being out of clay from an altered black mud
t.asad: And lo! Thy Sustainer said unto the angels: "Behold, I am about to create mortal man out of sounding clay, out of dark slime transmuted
t.yusuf-ali: Behold! thy Lord said to the angels: "I am about to create man, from sounding clay from mud moulded into shape
t.pickthall: And (remember) when thy Lord said unto the angels: Lo! I am creating a mortal out of potter's clay of black mud altered
t.arberry: And when thy Lord said to the angels, 'See, I am creating a mortal of a clay of mud moulded
t.hilali-khan: And (remember) when your Lord said to the angels: "I am going to create a man (Adam) from sounding clay of altered black smooth mud
t.itani: Your Lord said to the angels, “I am creating a human being from clay, from molded mud.”
t.mubarakpuri: And (remember) when your Lord said to the angels: "I am going to create a man (Adam) from dried (sounding) clay of altered mud. "
t.qarib: And when Your Lord said to the angels: "Behold, I am about to create mortal man out of dried clay, formed from dark mud
t.wahiduddin: Your Lord said to the angels, "I am about to bring into being a man wrought from mud
t.shakir: And when your Lord said to the angels: Surely I am going to create a mortal of the essence of black mud fashioned in shape
t.haleem: Your Lord said to the angels, ‘I will create a mortal out of dried clay, formed from dark mud
t.maariful: Recall when your Lord said to the angels, “I am going to create a human being from a ringing clay made of decayed mud
t.khattab: ˹Remember, O Prophet˺ when your Lord said to the angels, “I am going to create a human being from sounding clay moulded from black mud
t.ghali: And as your Lord said to the Angels, "Surely I am creating a mortal of dry clay of mud modeled
t.irving: So your Lord told the angels: "I am about to create a human being from ringing clay, from moulded slime
t.iwq: And mention, O Muhammad, when your Lord said to the angels, "I will create a human being out of clay from an altered black mud

t_id.kemenag: Dan (ingatlah), ketika Tuhanmu berfirman kepada para malaikat: "Sesungguhnya Aku akan menciptakan seorang manusia dari tanah liat kering (yang berasal) dari lumpur hitam yang diberi bentuk,
t_id.sabiq: Renungkanlah, wahai Muhammad, asal penciptaan itu ketika Sang Pencipta, Tuhan alam semesta, berkata kepada malaikat, "Aku akan menciptakan manusia dari tanah kering yang dapat mengeluarkan bunyi ketika diketuk. Tanah itu dapat berubah-ubah warnanya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan) ingatlah (ketika Rabbmu berfirman kepada para malaikat, "Sesungguhnya Aku akan menciptakan seorang manusia dari tanah liat kering yang berasal dan lumpur hitam yang diberi bentuk).
t_id.iwq: Dan (ingatlah), ketika Tuhanmu berfirman kepada para malaikat: "Sesungguhnya Aku akan menciptakan seorang manusia dari tanah liat kering (yang berasal) dari lumpur hitam yang diberi bentuk,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «و» اذكر «إذ قال ربك للملائكة إني خالق بشرا من صلصال من حمأ مسنون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَإِذۡ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلۡمَلَـٰٓئِكَةِ إِنِّي خَٰلِقُۢ بَشَرٗا مِّن صَلۡصَٰلٖ مِّنۡ حَمَإٖ مَّسۡنُونٖ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan) ingatlah (ketika Rabbmu berfirman kepada para malaikat, "Sesungguhnya Aku akan menciptakan seorang manusia dari tanah liat kering yang berasal dan lumpur hitam yang diberi bentuk)

ar: فَإِذَا سَوَّیۡتُهُۥ وَنَفَخۡتُ فِیهِ مِن رُّوحِی فَقَعُوا۟ لَهُۥ سَـٰجِدِینَ
ar_simple: فَإِذَا سَوَّيْتُهُ وَنَفَخْتُ فِيهِ مِنْ رُوحِي فَقَعُوا لَهُ سَاجِدِينَ
transliteration: fa-idhā sawwaytuhu wanafakhtu fīhi min rūḥī faqaʿū lahu sājidīna

t.sahih-int: And when I have proportioned him and breathed into him of My [created] soul, then fall down to him in prostration
t.asad: and when I have formed him fully and breathed into him of My spirit, fall down before him in prostration
t.yusuf-ali: When I have fashioned him (in due proportion) and breathed into him of My spirit, fall ye down in obeisance unto him
t.pickthall: So, when I have made him and have breathed into him of My Spirit, do ye fall down, prostrating yourselves unto him
t.arberry: When I have shaped him, and breathed My spirit in him, fall you down, bowing before him
t.hilali-khan: So, when I have fashioned him completely and breathed into him (Adam) the soul which I created for him, then fall (you) down prostrating yourselves unto him
t.itani: “When I have formed him, and breathed into him of My spirit, fall down prostrating before him.”
t.mubarakpuri: "So, when I have fashioned him completely and breathed into him (Adam) of My spirit (the soul which I created for him,) then fall down, prostrating yourselves before him."
t.qarib: and when I have fully formed him and breathed into him of My spirit, fall down and prostrate [yourselves] before him
t.wahiduddin: When I have formed him and breathed My spirit into him, fall down in prostration before him
t.shakir: So when I have made him complete and breathed into him of My spirit, fall down making obeisance to him
t.haleem: When I have fashioned him and breathed My spirit into him, bow down before him,’
t.maariful: When I form him perfect, and blow in him of My spirit, then you must fall down before him in prostration.”
t.khattab: So when I have fashioned him and had a spirit of My Own ˹creation˺ breathed into him, fall down in prostration to him.”
t.ghali: So, when I have molded him and breathed into him of My Spirit, fall down to him prostrating
t.irving: When I have finished with him and breathed some of My spirit into him, then drop down on your knees before him
t.iwq: And when I have proportioned him and breathed into him of My created soul, then fall down to him in prostration

t_id.kemenag: Maka apabila Aku telah menyempurnakan kejadiannya, dan telah meniup kan kedalamnya ruh (ciptaan)-Ku, maka tunduklah kamu kepadanya dengan bersujud.
t_id.sabiq: Setelah Aku sempurnakan penciptaannya, ketika Aku tiupkan roh yang merupakan milik-Ku, bersujudlah kalian kepadanya sebagai penghormatan."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka apabila Aku telah menyempurnakan kejadiannya) telah merampungkan bentuknya (dan Aku telah meniupkan) maksudnya telah mengalirkan (ke dalam tubuhnya roh ciptaan-Ku) sehingga ia menjadi hidup; diidhafatkannya lafal ruuh kepada-Nya sebagai penghormatan kepada Adam (maka tunduklah kalian kepadanya dengan bersujud) yaitu sujud penghormatan dengan cara membungkuk.
t_id.iwq: Maka apabila Aku telah menyempurnakan kejadiannya, dan telah meniup kan kedalamnya ruh (ciptaan)-Ku, maka tunduklah kamu kepadanya dengan bersujud.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فإذا سويته» أتممته «ونفخت» أجريت «فيه من روحي» فصار حيا وإضافة الروح إليه تشريف لآدم «فقعوا له ساجدين» سجود تحية بالانحناء
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَإِذَا سَوَّيۡتُهُۥ وَنَفَخۡتُ فِيهِ مِن رُّوحِي فَقَعُواْ لَهُۥ سَٰجِدِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka apabila Aku telah menyempurnakan kejadiannya) telah merampungkan bentuknya (dan Aku telah meniupkan) maksudnya telah mengalirkan (ke dalam tubuhnya roh ciptaan-Ku) sehingga ia menjadi hidup; diidhafatkannya lafal ruuh kepada-Nya sebagai penghormatan kepada Adam (maka tunduklah kalian kepadanya dengan bersujud) yaitu sujud penghormatan dengan cara membungkuk

ar: فَسَجَدَ ٱلۡمَلَـٰۤئِكَةُ كُلُّهُمۡ أَجۡمَعُونَ
ar_simple: فَسَجَدَ الْمَلَائِكَةُ كُلُّهُمْ أَجْمَعُونَ
transliteration: fasajada l-malāikatu kulluhum ajmaʿūna

t.sahih-int: So the angels prostrated - all of them entirely
t.asad: Thereupon the angels prostrated themselves, all of them together
t.yusuf-ali: So the angels prostrated themselves, all of them together
t.pickthall: So the angels fell prostrate, all of them together
t.arberry: Then the angels bowed themselves all together
t.hilali-khan: So, the angels prostrated themselves, all of them together
t.itani: So the angels prostrated themselves, all together.
t.mubarakpuri: So the angels prostrated themselves, all of them together.
t.qarib: Then the angels prostrated themselves, all of them
t.wahiduddin: then the angels all prostrated themselves together
t.shakir: So the angels made obeisance, all of them together
t.haleem: and the angels all did so
t.maariful: So the angels prostrated themselves, all together
t.khattab: So the angels prostrated all together—
t.ghali: So the Angels prostrated themselves, all of them together
t.irving: The angels all bowed down together
t.iwq: Thus the angels prostrated - all of them entirely

t_id.kemenag: Maka bersujudlah para malaikat itu semuanya bersama-sama,
t_id.sabiq: Mereka semua pun sujud tunduk kepada perintah Allah Swt.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka bersujudlah para malaikat itu semuanya bersama-sama) di dalam ayat ini terdapat dua taukid, yaitu lafal kulluhum dan lafal ajma'uuna.
t_id.iwq: Maka bersujudlah para malaikat itu semuanya bersama-sama,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فسجد الملائكة كلهم أجمعون» فيه تأكيدان
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَسَجَدَ ٱلۡمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ كُلُّهُمۡ أَجۡمَعُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka bersujudlah para malaikat itu semuanya bersama-sama) di dalam ayat ini terdapat dua taukid, yaitu lafal kulluhum dan lafal ajma'uuna

ar: إِلَّاۤ إِبۡلِیسَ أَبَىٰۤ أَن یَكُونَ مَعَ ٱلسَّـٰجِدِینَ
ar_simple: إِلَّا إِبْلِيسَ أَبَىٰ أَنْ يَكُونَ مَعَ السَّاجِدِينَ
transliteration: illā ib'līsa abā an yakūna maʿa l-sājidīna

t.sahih-int: Except Iblees, he refused to be with those who prostrated
t.asad: save Iblis: he refused to be among those who prostrated themselves
t.yusuf-ali: Not so Iblis: he refused to be among those who prostrated themselves
t.pickthall: Save Iblis. He refused to be among the prostrate
t.arberry: save Iblis; he refused to be among those bowing
t.hilali-khan: Except Iblis (Satan), - he refused to be among the prostrators
t.itani: Except for Satan. He refused to be among those who prostrated themselves.
t.mubarakpuri: Except Iblis (Shaytan) - he refused to be among the prostrate.
t.qarib: except Iblis. He refused to bow down with the others
t.wahiduddin: But Satan did not; he refused to join those who prostrated themselves
t.shakir: But Iblis (did it not); he refused to be with those who made obeisance
t.haleem: But not Iblis: he refused to bow down like the others
t.maariful: except Iblīs (Satan). He refused to join those who prostrated
t.khattab: but not Iblîs, who refused to prostrate with the others
t.ghali: Except Iblis; he refused to be among the prostrate
t.irving: except for Diabolis; he refused to be one of those bowing down on their knees
t.iwq: Except Iblees, he refused to be with those who prostrated

t_id.kemenag: kecuali iblis. Ia enggan ikut besama-sama (malaikat) yang sujud itu.
t_id.sabiq: Tetapi Iblîs tidak mau bersujud dan merasa sombong. Ia tidak mau bersama-sama malaikat yang tunduk kepada perintah Allah.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Kecuali iblis) dia adalah biangnya jin yang dahulu hidup di antara para malaikat (ia enggan) menolak untuk (ikut bersama-sama malaikat yang sujud itu.")
t_id.iwq: kecuali iblis. Ia enggan ikut besama-sama (malaikat) yang sujud itu.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إلا إبليس» هو أبو الجن كان بين الملائكة «أبى» امتنع من «أن يكون مع الساجدين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِلَّآ إِبۡلِيسَ أَبَىٰٓ أَن يَكُونَ مَعَ ٱلسَّـٰجِدِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Kecuali iblis) dia adalah biangnya jin yang dahulu hidup di antara para malaikat (ia enggan) menolak untuk (ikut bersama-sama malaikat yang sujud itu)

ar: قَالَ یَـٰۤإِبۡلِیسُ مَا لَكَ أَلَّا تَكُونَ مَعَ ٱلسَّـٰجِدِینَ
ar_simple: قَالَ يَا إِبْلِيسُ مَا لَكَ أَلَّا تَكُونَ مَعَ السَّاجِدِينَ
transliteration: qāla yāib'līsu mā laka allā takūna maʿa l-sājidīna

t.sahih-int: [Allah] said, O Iblees, what is [the matter] with you that you are not with those who prostrate
t.asad: Said He: "O Iblis! What is thy reason for not being among those who have prostrated themselves
t.yusuf-ali: (Allah) said: "O Iblis! what is your reason for not being among those who prostrated themselves
t.pickthall: He said: O Iblis! What aileth thee that thou art not among the prostrate
t.arberry: Said He, 'What ails thee, Iblis, that thou art not among those bowing
t.hilali-khan: (Allah) said: "O Iblis (Satan)! What is your reason for not being among the prostrators
t.itani: He said, “O Satan, what kept you from being among those who prostrated themselves?”
t.mubarakpuri: (Allah) said: "O Iblis! What is your reason for not being among the prostrate"
t.qarib: God said, "Iblis! What prevents you from being among those who have prostrated themselves
t.wahiduddin: God asked him, "What is the matter with you, that you are not among those who have prostrated themselves
t.shakir: He said: O Iblis! what excuse have you that you are not with those who make obeisance
t.haleem: God said, ‘Iblis, why did you not bow down like the others?’
t.maariful: He (Allah) said, “O Iblīs, what is the matter with you that you did not join those who prostrated?”
t.khattab: Allah asked, “O Iblîs! What is the matter with you that you did not join others in prostration?”
t.ghali: Said He, "O Iblis, what about you, that you are not among the prostrate
t.irving: He said: "Diabolis, what is wrong with you that you are not among those who bow down on their knees
t.iwq: Allah said, O Iblees, what is the matter with you that you are not with those who prostrate

t_id.kemenag: Allah berfirman: "Hai iblis, apa sebabnya kamu tidak (ikut sujud) bersama-sama mereka yang sujud itu?"
t_id.sabiq: Saat itu Allah berfirman, "Wahai Iblîs, apa yang mendorongmu melanggar perintah-Ku dan tidak mau bersama mereka yang patuh dan sujud?"
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Allah berfirman) Maha Tinggi Allah ("Hai iblis! Apa sebabnya kamu) apa yang menyebabkan kamu enggan (tidak mau) huruf laa adalah zaidah (ikut sujud bersama-sama mereka yang sujud itu?")
t_id.iwq: Allah berfirman: "Hai iblis, apa sebabnya kamu tidak (ikut sujud) bersama-sama mereka yang sujud itu?"

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قال» تعالى «يا إبليس مالك» ما منعك «أ» ن «لا» زائدة «تكون مع الساجدين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالَ يَـٰٓإِبۡلِيسُ مَا لَكَ أَلَّا تَكُونَ مَعَ ٱلسَّـٰجِدِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Allah berfirman) Maha Tinggi Allah ("Hai iblis! Apa sebabnya kamu) apa yang menyebabkan kamu enggan (tidak mau) huruf laa adalah zaidah (ikut sujud bersama-sama mereka yang sujud itu)

ar: قَالَ لَمۡ أَكُن لِّأَسۡجُدَ لِبَشَرٍ خَلَقۡتَهُۥ مِن صَلۡصَـٰلࣲ مِّنۡ حَمَإࣲ مَّسۡنُونࣲ
ar_simple: قَالَ لَمْ أَكُنْ لِأَسْجُدَ لِبَشَرٍ خَلَقْتَهُ مِنْ صَلْصَالٍ مِنْ حَمَإٍ مَسْنُونٍ
transliteration: qāla lam akun li-asjuda libasharin khalaqtahu min ṣalṣālin min ḥama-in masnūnin

t.sahih-int: He said, "Never would I prostrate to a human whom You created out of clay from an altered black mud
t.asad: [Iblis] replied: "It is not for me to prostrate myself before mortal man whom Thou hast created out of sounding clay, out of dark slime transmuted
t.yusuf-ali: (Iblis) said: "I am not one to prostrate myself to man, whom Thou didst create from sounding clay, from mud moulded into shape
t.pickthall: He said: I am not one to prostrate myself unto a mortal whom Thou hast created out of potter's clay of black mud altered
t.arberry: Said he, 'I would never bow myself before a mortal whom Thou hast created of a clay of mud moulded
t.hilali-khan: Iblis (Satan)] said: "I am not the one to prostrate myself to a human being, whom You created from sounding clay of altered black smooth mud
t.itani: He said, “I am not about to prostrate myself before a human being, whom You created from clay, from molded mud.”
t.mubarakpuri: [Iblis] said: "I am not one to prostrate myself to a human, whom You created from dried (sounding) clay of altered mud."
t.qarib: [Iblis] replied, "I will not bow down before a mortal man whom You have created out of dried clay, formed from dark mud
t.wahiduddin: He replied, "I am not one to prostrate myself to a man whom You have created out of a clay of moulded mud
t.shakir: He said: I am not such that I should make obeisance to a mortal whom Thou hast created of the essence of black mud fashioned in shape
t.haleem: and he answered, ‘I will not bow to a mortal You created from dried clay, formed from dark mud.’
t.maariful: He said, “I am not such that I should prostrate myself before a mortal whom You have created from a ringing clay made of decayed mud.”
t.khattab: He replied, “It is not for me to prostrate to a human You created from sounding clay moulded from black mud.”
t.ghali: Said he, "Indeed I did not have to prostrate myself to a mortal whom You created of dry clay of mud modeled
t.irving: He said: "I am no one to kneel before a human being You have created from ringing clay, from moulded slime
t.iwq: And he said, "Never would I prostrate to a human whom You created out of clay from an altered black mud

t_id.kemenag: Berkata Iblis: "Aku sekali-kali tidak akan sujud kepada manusia yang Engkau telah menciptakannya dari tanah liat kering (yang berasal) dari lumpur hitam yang diberi bentuk"
t_id.sabiq: Iblîs menjawab, "Tak pantas aku bersujud kepada manusia yang Engkau ciptakan dari tanah kering yang dapat bersuara ketika diketuk dan dapat berubah-ubah warnanya."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Berkata iblis, "Aku sekali-kali tidak akan sujud) tidak layak bagiku untuk sujud (kepada manusia yang Engkau telah menciptakannya dari tanah liat kering yang berasal dari lumpur hitam yang diberi bentuk.")
t_id.iwq: Berkata Iblis: "Aku sekali-kali tidak akan sujud kepada manusia yang Engkau telah menciptakannya dari tanah liat kering (yang berasal) dari lumpur hitam yang diberi bentuk"

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قال لم أكن لأسجد» لا ينبغي لي أن أسجد «لبشر خلقته من صلصال من حمأ مسنون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالَ لَمۡ أَكُن لِّأَسۡجُدَ لِبَشَرٍ خَلَقۡتَهُۥ مِن صَلۡصَٰلٖ مِّنۡ حَمَإٖ مَّسۡنُونٖ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Berkata iblis, "Aku sekali-kali tidak akan sujud) tidak layak bagiku untuk sujud (kepada manusia yang Engkau telah menciptakannya dari tanah liat kering yang berasal dari lumpur hitam yang diberi bentuk)

ar: قَالَ فَٱخۡرُجۡ مِنۡهَا فَإِنَّكَ رَجِیمࣱ
ar_simple: قَالَ فَاخْرُجْ مِنْهَا فَإِنَّكَ رَجِيمٌ
transliteration: qāla fa-ukh'ruj min'hā fa-innaka rajīmun

t.sahih-int: [Allah] said, "Then get out of it, for indeed, you are expelled
t.asad: Said He: "Go forth, then, from this [angelic state]: for, behold, thou art [henceforth] accursed
t.yusuf-ali: (Allah) said: "Then get thee out from here; for thou art rejected, accursed
t.pickthall: He said: Then go thou forth from hence, for lo! thou art outcast
t.arberry: Said He, 'Then go thou forth hence; thou art accursed
t.hilali-khan: (Allah) said: "Then, get out from here, for verily, you are Rajim (an outcast or a cursed one)." [Tafsir At-Tabari]
t.itani: He said, “Then get out of here, for you are an outcast”.
t.mubarakpuri: (Allah) said: "Then leave, for verily, you are an outcast. "
t.qarib: God said, "Be gone! You are expelled from Our grace
t.wahiduddin: God said, "Then get out of here; for you are accursed
t.shakir: He said: Then get out of it, for surely you are driven away
t.haleem: ‘Get out of here!’ said God. ‘You are an outcast
t.maariful: He said, “Then, get out of here, for you are an outcast
t.khattab: Allah commanded, “Then get out of Paradise, for you are truly cursed
t.ghali: Said He, "Then get out (Literally: go out) of it; so, surely you are outcast
t.irving: He said: "Then get out of here, for you are an outcast
t.iwq: Allah said, "Then get out of it, for indeed, you are expelled

t_id.kemenag: Allah berfirman: "Keluarlah dari surga, karena sesungguhnya kamu terkutuk,
t_id.sabiq: Allah berkata, "Kalau kamu membangkang dan tidak mau mematuhi-Ku, keluarlah dari surga ini. Kamu terusir dari naungan kasih sayang-Ku dan dari tempat yang terhormat.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Allah berfirman, "Keluarlah dari surga) menurut suatu pendapat dari langit (karena sesungguhnya kamu terkutuk.") terusir.
t_id.iwq: Allah berfirman: "Keluarlah dari surga, karena sesungguhnya kamu terkutuk,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قال فاخرج منها» أي الجنة وقيل من السماوات «فإنك رجيم» مطرود
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالَ فَٱخۡرُجۡ مِنۡهَا فَإِنَّكَ رَجِيمٞ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Allah berfirman, "Keluarlah dari surga) menurut suatu pendapat dari langit (karena sesungguhnya kamu terkutuk.") terusir

ar: وَإِنَّ عَلَیۡكَ ٱللَّعۡنَةَ إِلَىٰ یَوۡمِ ٱلدِّینِ
ar_simple: وَإِنَّ عَلَيْكَ اللَّعْنَةَ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ الدِّينِ
transliteration: wa-inna ʿalayka l-laʿnata ilā yawmi l-dīni

t.sahih-int: And indeed, upon you is the curse until the Day of Recompense
t.asad: and [My] rejection shall be thy due until the Day of Judgment
t.yusuf-ali: And the curse shall be on thee till the day of Judgment
t.pickthall: And lo! the curse shall be upon thee till the Day of Judgment
t.arberry: Upon thee shall rest the curse, till the Day of Doom
t.hilali-khan: And verily, the curse shall be upon you till the Day of Recompense (i.e. the Day of Resurrection)
t.itani: “And the curse will be upon you until the Day of Judgment.”
t.mubarakpuri: "And verily, the curse shall be upon you until the Day of Recompense."
t.qarib: and you will be cursed until the Day of Reckoning
t.wahiduddin: and the curse shall be on you till the Day of Judgement
t.shakir: And surely on you is curse until the day of judgment
t.haleem: rejected until the Day of Judgement.’
t.maariful: and upon you is the curse up to the Day of Judgment.”
t.khattab: And surely upon you is condemnation until the Day of Judgment.”
t.ghali: And surely the curse will be upon you till the Day of Doom
t.irving: On you lies the Curse until the Day for Repayment
t.iwq: And verily, upon you is the curse until the Day of Recompense

t_id.kemenag: dan sesungguhnya kutukan itu tetap menimpamu sampai hari kiamat".
t_id.sabiq: Aku telah memutuskan untuk mengusirmu dari kasih sayang dan kemuliaan-Ku sampai hari kiamat, hari perhitungan dan pembalasan. Pada hari itu, kamu dan siapa saja yang mengikutimu akan memperoleh siksa."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya kutukan itu tetap menimpamu sampai hari kiamat) sampai hari pembalasan
t_id.iwq: dan sesungguhnya kutukan itu tetap menimpamu sampai hari kiamat".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وإن عليك اللعنة إلى يوم الدين» الجزاء
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَإِنَّ عَلَيۡكَ ٱللَّعۡنَةَ إِلَىٰ يَوۡمِ ٱلدِّينِ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya kutukan itu tetap menimpamu sampai hari kiamat) sampai hari pembalasan

ar: قَالَ رَبِّ فَأَنظِرۡنِیۤ إِلَىٰ یَوۡمِ یُبۡعَثُونَ
ar_simple: قَالَ رَبِّ فَأَنْظِرْنِي إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ
transliteration: qāla rabbi fa-anẓir'nī ilā yawmi yub'ʿathūna

t.sahih-int: He said, "My Lord, then reprieve me until the Day they are resurrected
t.asad: Said [Iblis]: "Then, O my Sustainer, grant me a respite till the Day when all shall be raised from the dead
t.yusuf-ali: (Iblis) said: "O my Lord! give me then respite till the Day the (dead) are raised
t.pickthall: He said: My Lord! Reprieve me till the day when they are raised
t.arberry: Said he, 'My Lord, respite me till the day they shall be raised
t.hilali-khan: Iblis (Satan)] said: "O my Lord! Give me then respite till the Day they (the dead) will be resurrected
t.itani: He said, “My Lord, reprieve me until the Day they are resurrected.”
t.mubarakpuri: [Iblis] said: "O my Lord! Then give me respite until the Day they (the dead) will be resurrected."
t.qarib: Iblis said, "Then, my Lord, grant me relief until the Day when all will be raised again
t.wahiduddin: Satan said, "O my Lord! Grant me respite till the Day of Resurrection
t.shakir: He said: My Lord! then respite me till the time when they are raised
t.haleem: Iblis said, ‘My Lord, give me respite until the Day when they are raised from the dead.’
t.maariful: He said, “My Lord, then give me respite up to the day they (the dead) shall be raised.”
t.khattab: Satan appealed, “My Lord! Then delay my end until the Day of their resurrection.”
t.ghali: Said he, "Lord! Then respite me till the Day they will be made to rise again
t.irving: He said: ´My Lord, let me wait till the day when they are raised up again
t.iwq: And he said, "My Lord, then reprieve me until the Day they are resurrected

t_id.kemenag: Berkata iblis: "Ya Tuhanku, (kalau begitu) maka beri tangguhlah kepadaku sampai hari (manusia) dibangkitkan,
t_id.sabiq: Iblîs yang membangkang berkata, "Wahai Sang Pencipta, berikan aku tenggang waktu dan jangan matikan aku sebelum hari kiamat, saat manusia akan dibangkitkan hidup kembali dari kematiannya."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Berkata iblis, "Ya Rabbku! Kalau begitu maka beri tangguhlah kepadaku sampai hari dibangkitkan.") nya manusia
t_id.iwq: Berkata iblis: "Ya Tuhanku, (kalau begitu) maka beri tangguhlah kepadaku sampai hari (manusia) dibangkitkan,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قال رب فأنظرني إلى يوم يبعثون» أي الناس
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالَ رَبِّ فَأَنظِرۡنِيٓ إِلَىٰ يَوۡمِ يُبۡعَثُونَ (فَأَنظِرْنِي: فَأَمْهِلْنِي)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Berkata iblis, "Ya Rabbku! Kalau begitu maka beri tangguhlah kepadaku sampai hari dibangkitkan.") nya manusia

ar: قَالَ فَإِنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُنظَرِینَ
ar_simple: قَالَ فَإِنَّكَ مِنَ الْمُنْظَرِينَ
transliteration: qāla fa-innaka mina l-munẓarīna

t.sahih-int: [Allah] said, "So indeed, you are of those reprieved
t.asad: Answered He: "Verily, so be it: thou shalt be among those who are granted respite
t.yusuf-ali: (Allah) said: "Respite is granted thee
t.pickthall: He said: Then lo! thou art of those reprieved
t.arberry: Said He, 'Thou art among the ones that are respited
t.hilali-khan: Allah said: "Then, verily, you are of those reprieved
t.itani: He said, “You are of those reprieved.”
t.mubarakpuri: Allah said: "Then verily, you are of those reprieved,"
t.qarib: God answered: "You will be granted relief
t.wahiduddin: He said, "You are granted respite
t.shakir: He said: So surely you are of the respited ones
t.haleem: ‘You have respite,’ said God
t.maariful: He (Allah) said, “Well, respite is given to you
t.khattab: Allah said, “You will be delayed
t.ghali: Said He, "Then surely you are among the respited
t.irving: He said: "You will be allowed to wait
t.iwq: Allah said, "So indeed, you are of those reprieved

t_id.kemenag: Allah berfirman: "(Kalau begitu) maka sesungguhnya kamu termasuk orang-orang yang diberi tangguh,
t_id.sabiq: Allah berkata, "Kamu termasuk mereka yang matinya ditangguhkan,
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Allah berfirman, "Kalau begitu, maka sesungguhnya kamu termasuk orang-orang yang diberi tangguh).
t_id.iwq: Allah berfirman: "(Kalau begitu) maka sesungguhnya kamu termasuk orang-orang yang diberi tangguh,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قال فإنك من المنظرين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالَ فَإِنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُنظَرِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Allah berfirman, "Kalau begitu, maka sesungguhnya kamu termasuk orang-orang yang diberi tangguh

ar: إِلَىٰ یَوۡمِ ٱلۡوَقۡتِ ٱلۡمَعۡلُومِ
ar_simple: إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ الْوَقْتِ الْمَعْلُومِ
transliteration: ilā yawmi l-waqti l-maʿlūmi

t.sahih-int: Until the Day of the time well-known
t.asad: till the Day the time whereof is known [to Me alone]
t.yusuf-ali: Till the Day of the Time appointed
t.pickthall: Till the Day of appointed time
t.arberry: unto the day of a known time
t.hilali-khan: Till the Day of the time appointed
t.itani: “Until the Day of the time appointed.”
t.mubarakpuri: "Until the Day of the time appointed."
t.qarib: until the Day of the appointed time
t.wahiduddin: till that Appointed Day
t.shakir: Till the period of the time made known
t.haleem: ‘until the Day of the Appointed Time.’
t.maariful: till the day of the Appointed Time.”
t.khattab: until the appointed Day.”
t.ghali: To the Day of a known time
t.irving: until a day in known time
t.iwq: Until the Day of the time well-known

t_id.kemenag: sampai hari (suatu) waktu yang telah ditentukan,
t_id.sabiq: sampai batas waktu yang telah Aku tentukan dan Aku ketahui. Sepanjang apa pun waktu itu, ia tetap terbatas."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (sampai hari suatu waktu yang telah ditentukan.") yaitu sampai tiupan sangkakala yang pertama.
t_id.iwq: sampai hari (suatu) waktu yang telah ditentukan,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إلى يوم الوقت المعلوم» وقت النفخة الأولى
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِلَىٰ يَوۡمِ ٱلۡوَقۡتِ ٱلۡمَعۡلُومِ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (sampai hari suatu waktu yang telah ditentukan.") yaitu sampai tiupan sangkakala yang pertama

ar: قَالَ رَبِّ بِمَاۤ أَغۡوَیۡتَنِی لَأُزَیِّنَنَّ لَهُمۡ فِی ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَلَأُغۡوِیَنَّهُمۡ أَجۡمَعِینَ
ar_simple: قَالَ رَبِّ بِمَا أَغْوَيْتَنِي لَأُزَيِّنَنَّ لَهُمْ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَأُغْوِيَنَّهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
transliteration: qāla rabbi bimā aghwaytanī la-uzayyinanna lahum fī l-arḍi wala-ugh'wiyannahum ajmaʿīna

t.sahih-int: [Iblees] said, "My Lord, because You have put me in error, I will surely make [disobedience] attractive to them on earth, and I will mislead them all
t.asad: [Whereupon Iblis] said: "O my Sustainer! Since Thou hast thwarted me, I shall indeed make [all that is evil] on earth seem goodly to them, and shall most certainly beguile them-into grievous error
t.yusuf-ali: (Iblis) said: "O my Lord! because Thou hast put me in the wrong, I will make (wrong) fair-seeming to them on the earth, and I will put them all in the wrong
t.pickthall: He said: My Lord! Because Thou hast sent me astray, I verily shall adorn the path of error for them in the earth, and shall mislead them every one
t.arberry: Said he, 'My Lord, for Thy perverting me I shall deck all fair to them in the earth, and I shall pervert them, all together
t.hilali-khan: Iblis (Satan)] said: "O my Lord! Because you misled me, I shall indeed adorn the path of error for them (mankind) on the earth, and I shall mislead them all
t.itani: He said, “My Lord, since You have lured me away, I will glamorize for them on earth, and I will lure them all away.”
t.mubarakpuri: [Iblis] said: "O my Lord! Because You misled me, I shall indeed adorn the path of error for them (mankind) on the earth, and I shall mislead them all."
t.qarib: [Whereupon Iblis] said, "Oh, my Lord! Since You led me on to this, I will make [all that is evil] on earth appear good to people, and will most certainly entice them into sin
t.wahiduddin: He said, "My Lord, since You have let me go astray. I shall make the path of error seem alluring to them on the earth and shall mislead them all
t.shakir: He said: My Lord! because Thou hast made life evil to me, I will certainly make (evil) fair-seeming to them on earth, and I will certainly cause them all to deviate
t.haleem: Iblis then said to God, ‘Because You have put me in the wrong, I will lure mankind on earth and put them in the wrong
t.maariful: He said, “My Lord, since You made me go astray, I swear that I shall beautify for them (evils) on the earth, and shall lead all of them astray
t.khattab: Satan responded, “My Lord! For allowing me to stray I will surely tempt them on earth and mislead them all together
t.ghali: Said he, "Lord! For (the fact) that You misguided me, indeed I will definitely adorn for them (i.e., make "evil" attractive to them) in the earth; and indeed I will definitely misguide them all together
t.irving: He said: "My Lord, since You have let me go astray, I shall make things on earth seem attractive to them; I´ll mislead them all
t.iwq: Iblees said, "My Lord, because You have put me in error, I will surely make disobedience attractive to them on earth, and I will mislead them all

t_id.kemenag: Iblis berkata: "Ya Tuhanku, oleh sebab Engkau telah memutuskan bahwa aku sesat, pasti aku akan menjadikan mereka memandang baik (perbuatan maksiat) di muka bumi, dan pasti aku akan menyesatkan mereka semuanya,
t_id.sabiq: Iblîs yang membangkang dan durhaka itu berkata, "Wahai Penciptaku Yang menghidupkan aku. Karena Engkau telah menghendaki aku sesat, maka aku akan menyesatkan anak cucu Adam dengan membuat kejahatan tampak indah bagi mereka. Aku akan selalu berbuat apa saja demi menyesatkan mereka semua.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Iblis berkata, "Ya Rabbku! Oleh sebab Engkau telah memutuskan bahwa aku sesat) artinya disebabkan Engkau telah menetapkan aku sesat; huruf ba pada lafal bimaa adalah bermakna qasam, sedangkan jawabnya ialah (pasti aku akan menjadikan mereka memandang baik di muka bumi ini) terhadap perbuatan-perbuatan maksiat (dan pasti aku akan menyesatkan mereka semuanya).
t_id.iwq: Iblis berkata: "Ya Tuhanku, oleh sebab Engkau telah memutuskan bahwa aku sesat, pasti aku akan menjadikan mereka memandang baik (perbuatan maksiat) di muka bumi, dan pasti aku akan menyesatkan mereka semuanya,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قال ربّ بما أغويتني» أي بإغوائك لي والباء للقسم وجوابه «لأزيِّنَنَّ لهم في الأرض» المعاصي «ولأغوينهم أجمعين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالَ رَبِّ بِمَآ أَغۡوَيۡتَنِي لَأُزَيِّنَنَّ لَهُمۡ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَلَأُغۡوِيَنَّهُمۡ أَجۡمَعِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Iblis berkata, "Ya Rabbku! Oleh sebab Engkau telah memutuskan bahwa aku sesat) artinya disebabkan Engkau telah menetapkan aku sesat; huruf ba pada lafal bimaa adalah bermakna qasam, sedangkan jawabnya ialah (pasti aku akan menjadikan mereka memandang baik di muka bumi ini) terhadap perbuatan-perbuatan maksiat (dan pasti aku akan menyesatkan mereka semuanya)

ar: إِلَّا عِبَادَكَ مِنۡهُمُ ٱلۡمُخۡلَصِینَ
ar_simple: إِلَّا عِبَادَكَ مِنْهُمُ الْمُخْلَصِينَ
transliteration: illā ʿibādaka min'humu l-mukh'laṣīna

t.sahih-int: Except, among them, Your chosen servants
t.asad: [all] save such of them as are truly Thy servants
t.yusuf-ali: Except Thy servants among them, sincere and purified (by Thy Grace)
t.pickthall: Save such of them as are Thy perfectly devoted slaves
t.arberry: excepting those Thy servants among them that are devoted
t.hilali-khan: Except Your chosen, (guided) slaves among them
t.itani: “Except for Your sincere servants among them.”
t.mubarakpuri: "Except Your chosen (guided) servants among them."
t.qarib: all except the sincere among your worshipers
t.wahiduddin: except for Your chosen servants
t.shakir: Except Thy servants from among them, the devoted ones
t.haleem: all except Your devoted servants.’
t.maariful: except those of Your servants from among them who are chosen (by You).”
t.khattab: except Your chosen servants among them.”
t.ghali: Excepting Your bondmen among them, who are most faithful
t.irving: except for any of Your sincere servants who may be among them
t.iwq: Except, among them, Your chosen servants

t_id.kemenag: kecuali hamba-hamba Engkau yang mukhlis di antara mereka".
t_id.sabiq: Tidak akan ada yang dapat selamat dari penyesatan yang aku lakukan kecuali hamba-hamba-Mu yang beribadah dengan ikhlas. Aku tidak mampu menguasai mereka, karena jiwa mereka penuh dengan zikir menyebut asma-Mu.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Kecuali hamba-hamba Engkau yang mukhlis di antara mereka") yakni orang-orang yang beriman.
t_id.iwq: kecuali hamba-hamba Engkau yang mukhlis di antara mereka".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إلا عبادك منهم المخلصين» أي المؤمنين
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِلَّا عِبَادَكَ مِنۡهُمُ ٱلۡمُخۡلَصِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Kecuali hamba-hamba Engkau yang mukhlis di antara mereka") yakni orang-orang yang beriman

ar: قَالَ هَـٰذَا صِرَ ٰطٌ عَلَیَّ مُسۡتَقِیمٌ
ar_simple: قَالَ هَٰذَا صِرَاطٌ عَلَيَّ مُسْتَقِيمٌ
transliteration: qāla hādhā ṣirāṭun ʿalayya mus'taqīmun

t.sahih-int: [Allah] said, "This is a path [of return] to Me [that is] straight
t.asad: Said He: "This is, with Me. a straight way
t.yusuf-ali: (Allah) said: "This (way of My sincere servants) is indeed a way that leads straight to Me
t.pickthall: He said: This is a right course incumbent upon Me
t.arberry: Said He, 'This is for Me a straight path
t.hilali-khan: (Allah) said: "This is the Way which will lead straight to Me
t.itani: He said, “This is a right way with Me.”
t.mubarakpuri: (Allah) said: "This is the way which will lead straight to Me."
t.qarib: God said: "[Devotion] is a straight path to Me
t.wahiduddin: God said, "This is the path which leads straight to Me
t.shakir: He said: This is a right way with Me
t.haleem: God said, ‘[Devotion] is a straight path to Me
t.maariful: He (Allah) said, “This is the straight path leading to Me (that a person is chosen by Me through his good deeds)
t.khattab: Allah said, “This is the Way, binding on Me
t.ghali: Said He, "This is for Me a straight Path
t.irving: He said: "Here will be a Straight Road [leading] up to Me
t.iwq: Allah said, "This is a path of return to Me that is straight

t_id.kemenag: Allah berfirman: "Ini adalah jalan yang lurus, kewajiban Aku-lah (menjaganya).
t_id.sabiq: Keikhlasan hamba-hamba-Mu dalam sikap beragama mereka itu adalah jalan yang lurus yang tidak dapat aku lawan. Aku tak mampu menyesatkan mereka."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Berfirmanlah Allah) swt. ("Inilah jalan yang lurus; kewajiban Akulah memeliharanya")
t_id.iwq: Allah berfirman: "Ini adalah jalan yang lurus, kewajiban Aku-lah (menjaganya).

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قال» تعالى «هذا صراط عليَّ مستقيم»
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالَ هَٰذَا صِرَٰطٌ عَلَيَّ مُسۡتَقِيمٌ (صِرَاطٌ: طَرِيقٌ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Berfirmanlah Allah) swt. ("Inilah jalan yang lurus; kewajiban Akulah memeliharanya)

ar: إِنَّ عِبَادِی لَیۡسَ لَكَ عَلَیۡهِمۡ سُلۡطَـٰنٌ إِلَّا مَنِ ٱتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ ٱلۡغَاوِینَ
ar_simple: إِنَّ عِبَادِي لَيْسَ لَكَ عَلَيْهِمْ سُلْطَانٌ إِلَّا مَنِ اتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ الْغَاوِينَ
transliteration: inna ʿibādī laysa laka ʿalayhim sul'ṭānun illā mani ittabaʿaka mina l-ghāwīna

t.sahih-int: Indeed, My servants - no authority will you have over them, except those who follow you of the deviators
t.asad: verily, thou shalt have no power over My creatures- unless it be such as are [already] lost in grievous error and follow thee [of their own will]
t.yusuf-ali: For over My servants no authority shalt thou have, except such as put themselves in the wrong and follow thee
t.pickthall: Lo! as for My slaves, thou hast no power over any of them save such of the froward as follow thee
t.arberry: over My servants thou shalt have no authority, except those that follow thee
t.hilali-khan: Certainly, you shall have no authority over My slaves, except those who follow you of the Ghawin (Mushrikun and those who go astray, criminals, polytheists, and evil-doers, etc)
t.itani: “Over My servants you have no authority, except for the sinners who follow you.”
t.mubarakpuri: "Certainly, you shall have no authority over My servants, except those of the astray who follow you."
t.qarib: Truly, you will have no power over My worshipers except for the misled who follow you
t.wahiduddin: Surely, you shall have no power over My true servants, except those misguided ones who choose to follow you
t.shakir: Surely. as regards My servants, you have no authority, over them except those who follow you of the deviators
t.haleem: you will have no power over My servants, only over the ones who go astray and follow you
t.maariful: My servants are such that you have no power over them except those of the deviators who will follow you
t.khattab: you will certainly have no authority over My servants, except the deviant who follow you
t.ghali: Surely over My bondmen you will have no all-binding authority, except the ones who closely follow you of the misguided ones
t.irving: You will not hold any authority over My servants except for someone who may follow you from among those who are misguided
t.iwq: Indeed, My servants - no authority will you have over them, except those who follow you of the deviators

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya hamba-hamba-Ku tidak ada kekuasaan bagimu terhadap mereka, kecuali orang-orang yang mengikut kamu, yaitu orang-orang yang sesat.
t_id.sabiq: Allah berfirman, "Sesungguhnya hamba-hamba-Ku yang tulus murni dan ikhlas dalam sikap beragama itu memang tidak dapat kau sesatkan. Tetapi, orang-orang tersesat yang mengikutimu, jiwa mereka dapat kau kuasai dan kau sesatkan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya hamba-hamba-Ku) yang beriman (tidak ada kekuasaan bagimu terhadap mereka) kamu tidak mempunyai kekuatan (kecuali) hanyalah (orang-orang yang mengikut kalian; yaitu orang-orang yang sesat) yakni orang-orang kafir.
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya hamba-hamba-Ku tidak ada kekuasaan bagimu terhadap mereka, kecuali orang-orang yang mengikut kamu, yaitu orang-orang yang sesat.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: وهو «إن عبادي» أي المؤمنين «ليس لك عليهم سلطان» قوة «إلا» لكن «من اتبعك من الغاوين» الكافرين
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنَّ عِبَادِي لَيۡسَ لَكَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ سُلۡطَٰنٌ إِلَّا مَنِ ٱتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ ٱلۡغَاوِينَ (سُلْطَانٌ: قُوَّةٌ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya hamba-hamba-Ku) yang beriman (tidak ada kekuasaan bagimu terhadap mereka) kamu tidak mempunyai kekuatan (kecuali) hanyalah (orang-orang yang mengikut kalian; yaitu orang-orang yang sesat) yakni orang-orang kafir

ar: وَإِنَّ جَهَنَّمَ لَمَوۡعِدُهُمۡ أَجۡمَعِینَ
ar_simple: وَإِنَّ جَهَنَّمَ لَمَوْعِدُهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
transliteration: wa-inna jahannama lamawʿiduhum ajmaʿīna

t.sahih-int: And indeed, Hell is the promised place for them all
t.asad: and for all such, behold, hell is the promised goal
t.yusuf-ali: And verily, Hell is the promised abode for them all
t.pickthall: And lo! for all such, hell will be the promised place
t.arberry: being perverse; Gehenna shall be their promised land all together
t.hilali-khan: And surely, Hell is the promised place for them all
t.itani: And Hell is the meeting-place for them all.
t.mubarakpuri: And surely, Hell is the place promised for them all.
t.qarib: and Hell is the promised meeting place for all of you
t.wahiduddin: Surely, Hell is the place to which they are destined
t.shakir: And surely Hell is the promised place of them all
t.haleem: Hell is the promised place for all these
t.maariful: And Jahannam (Hell) is the promised place for them all
t.khattab: and surely Hell is their destined place, all together
t.ghali: And surely Hell will be indeed their promised (abode) all together
t.irving: Hell will [serve as] an appointment for all of them together
t.iwq: And verily, Hell is the promised place for them all

t_id.kemenag: Dan sesungguhnya Jahannam itu benar-benar tempat yang telah diancamkan kepada mereka (pengikut-pengikut syaitan) semuanya.
t_id.sabiq: Neraka yang kejam dan amat dalam itu adalah siksaan pedih yang disediakan untuk mereka semua.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya Jahanam itu benar-benar tempat yang telah dijanjikan kepada mereka semuanya) yaitu kepada orang-orang yang mengikutimu.
t_id.iwq: Dan sesungguhnya neraka itu benar-benar tempat yang telah diancamkan kepada mereka (pengikut-pengikut syaitan) semuanya.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وإن جهنم لموعدهم أجمعين» أي من اتبعك معك
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَإِنَّ جَهَنَّمَ لَمَوۡعِدُهُمۡ أَجۡمَعِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya Jahanam itu benar-benar tempat yang telah dijanjikan kepada mereka semuanya) yaitu kepada orang-orang yang mengikutimu

ar: لَهَا سَبۡعَةُ أَبۡوَ ٰبࣲ لِّكُلِّ بَابࣲ مِّنۡهُمۡ جُزۡءࣱ مَّقۡسُومٌ
ar_simple: لَهَا سَبْعَةُ أَبْوَابٍ لِكُلِّ بَابٍ مِنْهُمْ جُزْءٌ مَقْسُومٌ
transliteration: lahā sabʿatu abwābin likulli bābin min'hum juz'on maqsūmun

t.sahih-int: It has seven gates; for every gate is of them a portion designated
t.asad: with seven gates leading into it, each gate receiving its allotted share of sinners
t.yusuf-ali: To it are seven gates: for each of those gates is a (special) class (of sinners) assigned
t.pickthall: It hath seven gates, and each gate hath an appointed portion
t.arberry: Seven gates it has, and unto each gate a set portion of them belongs
t.hilali-khan: It (Hell) has seven gates, for each of those gates is a (special) class (of sinners) assigned
t.itani: “It has seven doors; for each door is an assigned class.”
t.mubarakpuri: It has seven gates, for each of those gates is a class assigned.
t.qarib: There will be seven gates leading into Hell, each gate receiving its allotted share
t.wahiduddin: it has seven gates: and each gate has a portion of them allotted to it
t.shakir: It has seven gates; for every gate there shall be a separate party of them
t.haleem: with seven gates, each gate having its allotted share of them
t.maariful: It has seven gates. For each gate there is a group apportioned from them.”
t.khattab: It has seven gates, to each a group of them is designated.”
t.ghali: It has seven gates; and each gate has an appointed part (Literally: divided)
t.irving: It has seven gates; each gate will have a portion assigned from them
t.iwq: It has seven gates; for every gate is of them a portion designated

t_id.kemenag: Jahannam itu mempunyai tujuh pintu. Tiap-tiap pintu (telah ditetapkan) untuk golongan yang tertentu dari mereka.
t_id.sabiq: Neraka yang kejam itu tidak hanya mempunyai satu pintu, tetapi tujuh pintu, karena begitu banyaknya orang yang pantas masuk neraka. Masing-masing pintu itu dikhususkan untuk golongan tertentu. Dan masing-masing golongan mempunyai derajat sendiri-sendiri sesuai kejahatan yang dilakukan."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Jahanam itu mempunyai tujuh pintu) tujuh lapis (Tiap-tiap pintu) daripadanya (adalah untuk segolongan di antara mereka bagian) yakni jatah (yang tertentu).
t_id.iwq: neraka itu mempunyai tujuh pintu. Tiap-tiap pintu (telah ditetapkan) untuk golongan yang tertentu dari mereka.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «لها سبعة أبواب» أطباق «لكل باب» منها «منهم جزء» نصيب «مقسوم»
tafsir.siraj-ar: لَهَا سَبۡعَةُ أَبۡوَٰبٖ لِّكُلِّ بَابٖ مِّنۡهُمۡ جُزۡءٞ مَّقۡسُومٌ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Jahanam itu mempunyai tujuh pintu) tujuh lapis (Tiap-tiap pintu) daripadanya (adalah untuk segolongan di antara mereka bagian) yakni jatah (yang tertentu)

ar: إِنَّ ٱلۡمُتَّقِینَ فِی جَنَّـٰتࣲ وَعُیُونٍ
ar_simple: إِنَّ الْمُتَّقِينَ فِي جَنَّاتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
transliteration: inna l-mutaqīna fī jannātin waʿuyūnin

t.sahih-int: Indeed, the righteous will be within gardens and springs
t.asad: VERILY, those who are conscious of God [shall find themselves in the hereafter] amidst gardens and springs
t.yusuf-ali: The righteous (will be) amid gardens and fountains (of clear-flowing water)
t.pickthall: Lo! those who ward off (evil) are among gardens and watersprings
t.arberry: But the godfearing shall be amidst gardens and fountains
t.hilali-khan: Truly! The Muttaqun (pious and righteous persons - see V. 2:2) will be amidst Gardens and water-springs (Paradise)
t.itani: But the righteous will be in gardens with springs.
t.mubarakpuri: Truly, those who have Taqwa, will dwell in Gardens and water springs.
t.qarib: Truly, those who are ever mindful of God will be amid Gardens and springs
t.wahiduddin: Truly, the God-fearing shall dwell amid gardens and fountains
t.shakir: Surely those who guard (against evil) shall be in the midst of gardens and fountains
t.haleem: But the righteous will be in Gardens with springs
t.maariful: Surely, the God-fearing will be in gardens and streams
t.khattab: Indeed, the righteous will be amid Gardens and springs
t.ghali: Surely the pious will be amidst Gardens and Springs
t.irving: The heedful will be in gardens and by springs
t.iwq: Indeed, the righteous will be within gardens and springs

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang bertakwa itu berada dalam surga (taman-taman) dan (di dekat) mata air-mata air (yang mengalir).
t_id.sabiq: Itulah balasan orang-orang yang mengikuti setan. Sedangkan orang-orang yang tak dapat digoda setan, karena membuat dinding pemisah antara dirinya dan hawa nafsunya, akan memperoleh berbagai taman dan air yang mengalir.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang bertakwa itu berada di dalam surga) kebun-kebun surga (dan mata air-mata air) yang mengalir di dalamnya.
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang bertakwa itu berada dalam surga (taman-taman) dan (di dekat) mata air-mata air (yang mengalir).

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إن المتقين في جنات» بساتين «وعيون» تجري فيها
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنَّ ٱلۡمُتَّقِينَ فِي جَنَّـٰتٖ وَعُيُونٍ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang bertakwa itu berada di dalam surga) kebun-kebun surga (dan mata air-mata air) yang mengalir di dalamnya

ar: ٱدۡخُلُوهَا بِسَلَـٰمٍ ءَامِنِینَ
ar_simple: ادْخُلُوهَا بِسَلَامٍ آمِنِينَ
transliteration: ud'khulūhā bisalāmin āminīna

t.sahih-int: [Having been told], "Enter it in peace, safe [and secure]
t.asad: [having been received with the greeting,] "Enter here in peace, secure
t.yusuf-ali: (Their greeting will be): "Enter ye here in peace and security
t.pickthall: (And it is said unto them): Enter them in peace, secure
t.arberry: Enter you them, in peace and security
t.hilali-khan: (It will be said to them): 'Enter therein (Paradise), in peace and security
t.itani: “Enter it in peace and security.”
t.mubarakpuri: (It will be said to them): "Enter it in peace and security."
t.qarib: Enter it in peace, [safe and] secure
t.wahiduddin: Enter therein in peace and security
t.shakir: Enter them in peace, secure
t.haleem: “Enter them in peace and safety!”––
t.maariful: “Enter here in peace, free of fear.”
t.khattab: ˹It will be said to them,˺ “Enter in peace and security.”
t.ghali: Enter them, in peace, secure
t.irving: Enter them safely, at peace
t.iwq: Having been told, "Enter it in peace, safe and secure

t_id.kemenag: (Dikatakan kepada mereka): "Masuklah ke dalamnya dengan sejahtera lagi aman"
t_id.sabiq: Kepada mereka, Allah berkata, "Masuklah kalian ke dalam taman-taman surga itu dengan tenang dan aman. Kalian tidak akan takut dan tidak akan pernah merasa sedih selamanya."
t_id.jalalayn-id: Dan dikatakan kepada mereka ("Masuklah ke dalamnya dengan sejahtera) dengan perasaan yang aman dari setiap hal yang menakutkan. Atau masuklah ke dalamnya dengan bersalam artinya, bersalamlah lalu masuklah (lagi aman") dari setiap hal-hal yang mengerikan.
t_id.iwq: (Dikatakan kepada mereka): "Masuklah ke dalamnya dengan sejahtera lagi aman"

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: ويقال لهم «ادخلوها بسلام» أي سالمين من كل مخوّف أو مع سلام أي سلموا وادخلوا «آمنين» من كل فزع
tafsir.siraj-ar: ٱدۡخُلُوهَا بِسَلَٰمٍ ءَامِنِينَ (بِسَلَامٍ: سَالِمِينَ مِنْ كُلِّ سُوءٍ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Dan dikatakan kepada mereka ("Masuklah ke dalamnya dengan sejahtera) dengan perasaan yang aman dari setiap hal yang menakutkan. Atau masuklah ke dalamnya dengan bersalam artinya, bersalamlah lalu masuklah (lagi aman") dari setiap hal-hal yang mengerikan

ar: وَنَزَعۡنَا مَا فِی صُدُورِهِم مِّنۡ غِلٍّ إِخۡوَ ٰنًا عَلَىٰ سُرُرࣲ مُّتَقَـٰبِلِینَ
ar_simple: وَنَزَعْنَا مَا فِي صُدُورِهِمْ مِنْ غِلٍّ إِخْوَانًا عَلَىٰ سُرُرٍ مُتَقَابِلِينَ
transliteration: wanazaʿnā mā fī ṣudūrihim min ghillin ikh'wānan ʿalā sururin mutaqābilīna

t.sahih-int: And We will remove whatever is in their breasts of resentment, [so they will be] brothers, on thrones facing each other
t.asad: And [by then] We shall have removed whatever unworthy thoughts or feelings may have been [lingering] in their breasts, [and they shall rest] as brethren, facing one another [in love] upon thrones of happiness
t.yusuf-ali: And We shall remove from their hearts any lurking sense of injury: (they will be) brothers (joyfully) facing each other on thrones (of dignity)
t.pickthall: And We remove whatever rancour may be in their breasts. As brethren, face to face, (they rest) on couches raised
t.arberry: We shall strip away all rancour that is in their breasts; as brothers they shall be upon couches set face to face
t.hilali-khan: And We shall remove from their breasts any sense of injury (that they may have), (So they will be like) brothers facing each other on thrones
t.itani: And We will remove all ill-feelings from their hearts—brothers and sisters, on couches facing one another.
t.mubarakpuri: And We shall remove any deep feeling of bitterness from their breasts. (So they will be like) brothers facing each other on thrones.
t.qarib: And We will remove whatever resentment may have been [lingering] in their hearts, brethren resting on couches facing one another
t.wahiduddin: We shall cleanse their hearts of all traces of ill-will; they will be like brethren seated on couches facing one another
t.shakir: And We will root out whatever of rancor is in their breasts-- (they shall be) as brethren, on raised couches, face to face
t.haleem: and We shall remove any bitterness from their hearts: [they will be like] brothers, sitting on couches, face to face
t.maariful: We shall have removed whatever grudge they had in their hearts, (thus making them) brothers, sitting on couches, face to face
t.khattab: We will remove whatever bitterness they had in their hearts. In a friendly manner, they will be on thrones, facing one another
t.ghali: And We will draw out from them whatever rancor may be in their breasts; as brethren they will be upon settees facing one another
t.irving: We will strip away any rancor that [lingers] in their breasts; like brethren they will face one another on couches
t.iwq: And We will remove whatever is in their breasts of resentment, so they will be brothers, on thrones facing each other

t_id.kemenag: Dan Kami lenyapkan segala rasa dendam yang berada dalam hati mereka, sedang mereka merasa bersaudara duduk berhadap-hadapan di atas dipan-dipan.
t_id.sabiq: Orang-orang yang beriman hidup di dalam kenikmatan itu dengan hati penuh gembira. Sifat dengki telah Kami cabut dari hati mereka. Mereka semua adalah bersaudara bagai satu keluarga yang saling berjumpa dengan wajah penuh ceria dan rasa cinta. Mereka tidak saling membelakangi, sebaliknya, justru saling ingin berjumpa.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan Kami lenyapkan segala rasa dendam yang berada dalam hati mereka) maksudnya semua perasaan dengki (sedangkan mereka merasa bersaudara) lafal ikhwaanan ini menjadi hal tentang keadaan mereka (duduk berhadap-hadapan di atas dipan-dipan) kalimat ayat ini pun menggambarkan tentang keadaan mereka; artinya sebagian dari mereka tidak melihat kepada tengkuk sebagian yang lain karena tempat duduk mereka saling berhadap-hadapan.
t_id.iwq: Dan Kami lenyapkan segala rasa dendam yang berada dalam hati mereka, sedang mereka merasa bersaudara duduk berhadap-hadapan di atas dipan-dipan.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ونزعنا ما في صدورهم من غِلِّ» حقد «إخوانا» حال منهم «على سُرر متقابلين» حال أيضا أي لا ينظر بعضهم إلى قفا بعض لدورات الأسرَّة بهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَنَزَعۡنَا مَا فِي صُدُورِهِم مِّنۡ غِلٍّ إِخۡوَٰنًا عَلَىٰ سُرُرٖ مُّتَقَٰبِلِينَ (غِلٍّ: حِقْدٍ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan Kami lenyapkan segala rasa dendam yang berada dalam hati mereka) maksudnya semua perasaan dengki (sedangkan mereka merasa bersaudara) lafal ikhwaanan ini menjadi hal tentang keadaan mereka (duduk berhadap-hadapan di atas dipan-dipan) kalimat ayat ini pun menggambarkan tentang keadaan mereka; artinya sebagian dari mereka tidak melihat kepada tengkuk sebagian yang lain karena tempat duduk mereka saling berhadap-hadapan

ar: لَا یَمَسُّهُمۡ فِیهَا نَصَبࣱ وَمَا هُم مِّنۡهَا بِمُخۡرَجِینَ
ar_simple: لَا يَمَسُّهُمْ فِيهَا نَصَبٌ وَمَا هُمْ مِنْهَا بِمُخْرَجِينَ
transliteration: lā yamassuhum fīhā naṣabun wamā hum min'hā bimukh'rajīna

t.sahih-int: No fatigue will touch them therein, nor from it will they [ever] be removed
t.asad: No weariness shall ever touch them in this [state of bliss], and never shall they have to forgo it
t.yusuf-ali: There no sense of fatigue shall touch them, nor shall they (ever) be asked to leave
t.pickthall: Toil cometh not unto them there, nor will they be expelled from thence
t.arberry: no fatigue there shall smite them, neither shall they ever be driven forth from there
t.hilali-khan: No sense of fatigue shall touch them, nor shall they (ever) be asked to leave it
t.itani: No fatigue will ever touch them therein, nor will they be asked to leave it.
t.mubarakpuri: No sense of fatigue shall touch them, nor shall they be asked to leave it.
t.qarib: no weariness will ever touch them there, and they will never be made to leave
t.wahiduddin: They will not be affected by any weariness there, and they will never be made to leave
t.shakir: Toil shall not afflict them in it, nor shall they be ever ejected from it
t.haleem: No weariness will ever touch them there, nor will they ever be expelled.’
t.maariful: No weariness shall touch them nor will they be expelled from there
t.khattab: No fatigue will touch them there, nor will they ever be asked to leave
t.ghali: No toil will touch them therein, and in no way will they be made to go out of it
t.irving: Toil will not touch them there, nor will they ever be expelled from it
t.iwq: No fatigue will touch them therein, nor from it will they ever be removed

t_id.kemenag: Mereka tidak merasa lelah di dalamnya dan mereka sekali-kali tidak akan dikeluarkan daripadanya.
t_id.sabiq: Di sana mereka tidak merasa lelah. Itu adalah kenikmatan abadi, dan mereka tidak akan keluar dari dalamnya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Mereka tidak merasa lelah di dalamnya) tidak pernah merasa penat (dan mereka sekali-kali tidak akan dikeluarkan daripadanya) untuk selama-lamanya.
t_id.iwq: Mereka tidak merasa lelah di dalamnya dan mereka sekali-kali tidak akan dikeluarkan daripadanya.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «لا يمسهم فيها نَصَبٌ» تعب «وما هم منها بمخرجين» أبدا
tafsir.siraj-ar: لَا يَمَسُّهُمۡ فِيهَا نَصَبٞ وَمَا هُم مِّنۡهَا بِمُخۡرَجِينَ (نَصَبٌ: تَعَبٌ, نَبِّئْ: أَخْبِرْ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Mereka tidak merasa lelah di dalamnya) tidak pernah merasa penat (dan mereka sekali-kali tidak akan dikeluarkan daripadanya) untuk selama-lamanya

ar: ۞ نَبِّئۡ عِبَادِیۤ أَنِّیۤ أَنَا ٱلۡغَفُورُ ٱلرَّحِیمُ
ar_simple: ۞ نَبِّئْ عِبَادِي أَنِّي أَنَا الْغَفُورُ الرَّحِيمُ
transliteration: nabbi ʿibādī annī anā l-ghafūru l-raḥīmu

t.sahih-int: [O Muhammad], inform My servants that it is I who am the Forgiving, the Merciful
