t.asad: Tell My servants that I - I alone - am truly forgiving, a true dispenser of grace
t.yusuf-ali: Tell My servants that I am indeed the Oft-forgiving, Most Merciful
t.pickthall: Announce, (O Muhammad) unto My slaves that verily I am the Forgiving, the Merciful
t.arberry: Tell My servants I am the All-forgiving, the All-compassionate
t.hilali-khan: Declare (O Muhammad SAW) unto My slaves, that truly, I am the Oft-Forgiving, the Most-Merciful
t.itani: Inform My servants that I am the Forgiver, the Merciful.
t.mubarakpuri: Declare to My servants that I am truly the Forgiving, the Most Merciful.
t.qarib: Tell My worshipers that I am the Forgiving, the Mercy Giver
t.wahiduddin: Tell My servants that I alone am the Forgiving, the Merciful One
t.shakir: Inform My servants that I am the Forgiving, the Merciful
t.haleem: [Prophet], tell My servants that I am the Forgiving, the Merciful
t.maariful: Tell My servants that I am the Most-Forgiving, the Very-Merciful
t.khattab: Inform My servants ˹O Prophet˺ that I am truly the All-Forgiving, Most Merciful
t.ghali: Fully inform My bondmen that I, Ever I, am The Ever-Forgiving, The Ever-Merciful
t.irving: Advise My servants that I am the Forgiving, Merciful One
t.iwq: O Muhammad, inform My servants that it is I who am the Forgiving, the Merciful

t_id.kemenag: Kabarkanlah kepada hamba-hamba-Ku, bahwa sesungguhnya Aku-lah Yang Maha Pengampun lagi Maha Penyayang,
t_id.sabiq: Kabarkanlah, wahai Muhammad, kepada semua hamba-Ku bahwa pengampunan-Ku amat banyak bagi orang yang bertobat lalu melakukan amal saleh. Sampaikan pula bahwa kasih sayang-Ku amat luas.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Kabarkanlah) beritakanlah, hai Muhammad (kepada hamba-hamba-Ku bahwa sesungguhnya Akulah Yang Maha Pengampun) terhadap orang-orang mukmin (lagi Maha Penyayang) terhadap mereka yang beriman.
t_id.iwq: Kabarkanlah kepada hamba-hamba-Ku, bahwa sesungguhnya Aku-lah Yang Maha Pengampun lagi Maha Penyayang,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «نبئ» خبر يا محمد «عبادي أني أنا الغفور» للمؤمنين «الرحيم» بهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: ۞نَبِّئۡ عِبَادِيٓ أَنِّيٓ أَنَا ٱلۡغَفُورُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Kabarkanlah) beritakanlah, hai Muhammad (kepada hamba-hamba-Ku bahwa sesungguhnya Akulah Yang Maha Pengampun) terhadap orang-orang mukmin (lagi Maha Penyayang) terhadap mereka yang beriman

ar: وَأَنَّ عَذَابِی هُوَ ٱلۡعَذَابُ ٱلۡأَلِیمُ
ar_simple: وَأَنَّ عَذَابِي هُوَ الْعَذَابُ الْأَلِيمُ
transliteration: wa-anna ʿadhābī huwa l-ʿadhābu l-alīmu

t.sahih-int: And that it is My punishment which is the painful punishment
t.asad: and [also,] that the suffering which I shall impose [on sinners] will indeed be a suffering most grievous
t.yusuf-ali: And that My Penalty will be indeed the most grievous Penalty
t.pickthall: And that My doom is the dolorous doom
t.arberry: and that My chastisement is the painful chastisement
t.hilali-khan: And that My Torment is indeed the most painful torment
t.itani: And that My punishment is the painful punishment.
t.mubarakpuri: And that My torment is indeed the most painful torment.
t.qarib: and that my punishment is truly painful
t.wahiduddin: and that My punishment is a painful punishment
t.shakir: And that My punishment-- that is the painful punishment
t.haleem: but My torment is the truly painful one
t.maariful: and that My punishment is the painful punishment
t.khattab: and that My torment is indeed the most painful
t.ghali: And that My torment is the (most) painful torment
t.irving: although My torment will be painful torment
t.iwq: And that it is My punishment which is the painful punishment

t_id.kemenag: dan bahwa sesungguhnya azab-Ku adalah azab yang sangat pedih.
t_id.sabiq: Sampaikan pula bahwa siksa yang Aku berikan kepada orang-orang yang durhaka dan ingkar benar- benar pedih. Jenis siksaan lain tidak akan terasa pedih jika dibandingkan dengan siksaan itu.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan bahwa sesungguhnya azab-Ku) terhadap orang-orang yang durhaka (adalah azab yang sangat pedih) sangat menyakitkan.
t_id.iwq: dan bahwa sesungguhnya azab-Ku adalah azab yang sangat pedih.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وأن عذابي» للعصاة «هو العذاب الأليم» المؤلم
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَأَنَّ عَذَابِي هُوَ ٱلۡعَذَابُ ٱلۡأَلِيمُ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan bahwa sesungguhnya azab-Ku) terhadap orang-orang yang durhaka (adalah azab yang sangat pedih) sangat menyakitkan

ar: وَنَبِّئۡهُمۡ عَن ضَیۡفِ إِبۡرَ ٰهِیمَ
ar_simple: وَنَبِّئْهُمْ عَنْ ضَيْفِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ
transliteration: wanabbi'hum ʿan ḍayfi ib'rāhīma

t.sahih-int: And inform them about the guests of Abraham
t.asad: AND TELL THEM [once again] about Abraham's guests
t.yusuf-ali: Tell them about the guests of Abraham
t.pickthall: And tell them of Abraham's guests
t.arberry: And tell them of the guests of Abraham
t.hilali-khan: And tell them about the guests (the angels) of Ibrahim (Abraham)
t.itani: And inform them of the guests of Abraham.
t.mubarakpuri: And tell them about the guests (i.e., the angels) of Ibrahim.
t.qarib: And tell them all [once again] about Abraham's guests
t.wahiduddin: Tell them about Abraham's guests
t.shakir: And inform them of the guests of Ibrahim
t.haleem: Tell them too about Abraham’s guests
t.maariful: and tell them about the guests of Ibrāhīm
t.khattab: And inform them ˹O Prophet˺ about Abraham’s guests
t.ghali: And fully inform them about the guests of Ibrahim, (Abraham)
t.irving: Advise them about Abraham´s guests
t.iwq: And inform them about the guests of Abraham

t_id.kemenag: Dan kabarkanlah kepada mereka tentang tamu-tamu Ibrahim.
t_id.sabiq: Dalam menerangkan kasih sayang-Ku dan siksa-Ku di dunia, ceritakanlah kepada mereka kisah beberapa malaikat yang bertamu menemui Ibrâhîm.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan kabarkanlah kepada mereka tentang tamu-tamu Ibrahim) yaitu malaikat-malaikat yang berjumlah dua belas malaikat, atau sepuluh malaikat, atau tiga malaikat yang salah satu di antara mereka adalah malaikat Jibril.
t_id.iwq: Dan kabarkanlah kepada mereka tentang tamu-tamu Ibrahim.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ونبئهم عن ضيف إبراهيم» وهم الملائكة اثنا عشر أو عشرة أو ثلاثة منهم جبريل
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَنَبِّئۡهُمۡ عَن ضَيۡفِ إِبۡرَٰهِيمَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan kabarkanlah kepada mereka tentang tamu-tamu Ibrahim) yaitu malaikat-malaikat yang berjumlah dua belas malaikat, atau sepuluh malaikat, atau tiga malaikat yang salah satu di antara mereka adalah malaikat Jibril

ar: إِذۡ دَخَلُوا۟ عَلَیۡهِ فَقَالُوا۟ سَلَـٰمࣰا قَالَ إِنَّا مِنكُمۡ وَجِلُونَ
ar_simple: إِذْ دَخَلُوا عَلَيْهِ فَقَالُوا سَلَامًا قَالَ إِنَّا مِنْكُمْ وَجِلُونَ
transliteration: idh dakhalū ʿalayhi faqālū salāman qāla innā minkum wajilūna

t.sahih-int: When they entered upon him and said, "Peace." [Abraham] said, "Indeed, we are fearful of you
t.asad: [how,] when they presented themselves before him and bade him peace, he answered: "Behold, we are afraid of you
t.yusuf-ali: When they entered his presence and said, "Peace!" He said, "We feel afraid of you
t.pickthall: (How) when they came in unto him, and said: Peace. He said: Lo! we are afraid of you
t.arberry: when they entered unto him, saying, 'Peace!' He said, 'Behold, we are afraid of you
t.hilali-khan: When they entered unto him, and said: Salaman (peace)! [Ibrahim (Abraham)] said: "Indeed! We are afraid of you
t.itani: When they entered upon him, and said, “Peace.” He said, “We are wary of you.”
t.mubarakpuri: When they entered upon him, and said: "Salaman (peace!)." He said: "Indeed we are frightened of you."
t.qarib: When they entered his presence and greeted him with "Peace", he answered, "We are afraid of you
t.wahiduddin: when they came to him they greeted him with: "Peace." He said,"We feel afraid of you
t.shakir: When they entered upon him, they said, Peace. He said: Surely we are afraid of you
t.haleem: when they came to him and said, ‘Peace,’ he said, ‘We are afraid of you.’
t.maariful: When they visited him, they greeted him with Salām (peace on you). He said, “We are scared of you.”
t.khattab: who entered upon him and greeted ˹him with˺, “Peace!” He ˹later˺ said, “Surely we are afraid of you.”
t.ghali: As they entered to him (and) so they said, "Peace!" He said, "Surely we feel tremulous of you
t.irving: how, when they entered his presence and said: "Peace!", he said: "We feel wary of you
t.iwq: When they entered upon him and said, "Peace." Abraham said, "Indeed, we are fearful of you

t_id.kemenag: Ketika mereka masuk ke tempatnya, lalu mereka mengucapkan: "Salaam". Berkata Ibrahim: "Sesungguhnya kami merasa takut kepadamu".
t_id.sabiq: Katakan kepada mereka, "Ketika tamu-tamu itu menemui Ibrâhîm, ia merasa takut. Para tamu itu berkata, 'Tenanglah dan tidak usah takut. ' Ibrâhîm pun berkata kepada mereka, 'Kami takut karena kalian datang secara tiba-tiba dan bukan pada waktu bertamu yang biasa. Kami tidak tahu apa maksud kalian. '
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Ketika mereka masuk ke tempatnya, lalu mereka mengucapkan, "Salam.") mereka mengucapkan lafal itu. (Berkata Ibrahim) ketika disuguhkan hidangan makanan kepada mereka, akan tetapi mereka tidak memakannya ("Sesungguhnya kami merasa takut kepada kalian.") yakni merasa ngeri.
t_id.iwq: Ketika mereka masuk ke tempatnya, lalu mereka mengucapkan: "Salaam". Berkata Ibrahim: "Sesungguhnya kami merasa takut kepadamu".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إذ دخلوا عليه فقالوا سلاما» أي هذا اللفظ «قال» إبراهيم لما عرض عليم الأكل فلم يأكلوا «إنا منكم وجلون» خائفون
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِذۡ دَخَلُواْ عَلَيۡهِ فَقَالُواْ سَلَٰمٗا قَالَ إِنَّا مِنكُمۡ وَجِلُونَ (وَجِلُونَ: فَزِعُونَ، خَائِفُونَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Ketika mereka masuk ke tempatnya, lalu mereka mengucapkan, "Salam.") mereka mengucapkan lafal itu. (Berkata Ibrahim) ketika disuguhkan hidangan makanan kepada mereka, akan tetapi mereka tidak memakannya ("Sesungguhnya kami merasa takut kepada kalian.") yakni merasa ngeri

ar: قَالُوا۟ لَا تَوۡجَلۡ إِنَّا نُبَشِّرُكَ بِغُلَـٰمٍ عَلِیمࣲ
ar_simple: قَالُوا لَا تَوْجَلْ إِنَّا نُبَشِّرُكَ بِغُلَامٍ عَلِيمٍ
transliteration: qālū lā tawjal innā nubashiruka bighulāmin ʿalīmin

t.sahih-int: [The angels] said, "Fear not. Indeed, we give you good tidings of a learned boy
t.asad: Said they: "Fear not! Behold, we bring thee the glad tiding of [the birth of] a son who will be endowed with deep knowledge
t.yusuf-ali: They said: "Fear not! We give thee glad tidings of a son endowed with wisdom
t.pickthall: They said: Be not afraid! Lo! we bring thee good tidings of a boy possessing wisdom
t.arberry: They said, 'Be not afraid; behold, we give thee good tidings of a cunning boy
t.hilali-khan: They (the angels) said: "Do not be afraid! We give you glad tidings of a boy (son) possessing much knowledge and wisdom
t.itani: They said, “Do not fear; we bring you good news of a boy endowed with knowledge.”
t.mubarakpuri: They said: "Do not be afraid! We bring you the good news of a boy possessing much knowledge and wisdom."
t.qarib: They said: "Fear not! We bring you the good news of [the birth of] a son who will be endowed with profound knowledge
t.wahiduddin: They said, "Do not be afraid. We come to you with good news. You shall have a son who shall be endowed with great knowledge
t.shakir: They said: Be not afraid, surely we give you the good news of a boy, possessing knowledge
t.haleem: ‘Do not be afraid,’ they said, ‘We bring you good news of a son who will have great knowledge.’
t.maariful: They said, “Do not be scared. We give you good news of a boy who will be knowledgeable.”
t.khattab: They reassured ˹him˺, “Do not be afraid! Surely we give you good news of a knowledgeable son.”
t.ghali: They said, "Do not feel tremulous. Surely we give you glad tidings of a knowledgeable youth
t.irving: They said: ´Don´t feel so wary; We bring you word about a clever boy
t.iwq: The angels said, "Fear not. Indeed, we give you good tidings of a learned boy

t_id.kemenag: Mereka berkata: "Janganlah kamu merasa takut, sesungguhnya kami memberi kabar gembira kepadamu dengan (kelahiran seorang) anak laki-laki (yang akan menjadi) orang yang alim".
t_id.sabiq: Malaikat-malaikat itu berkata, 'Jangan takut dan tenangkan dirimu. Kami membawa kabar gembira tentang anak yang Allah anugerahkan kepadamu. Pada masa hidupnya kelak, anak itu akan diberi banyak pengetahuan oleh Allah. '(1). (1) Anak yang dimaksud di sini bukanlah Ismâ'îl a. s., sebab Ismâ'îl sudah dilahirkan sebelum itu kemudian berhijrah bersama ibundanya, Hâjar, ke kota Mekah. Yang dimaksud di sini adalah Ishâq, yaitu putra Ibrâhîm dari istrinya yang lain, Sârah.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Mereka berkata, "Janganlah kamu merasa takut) merasa ngeri terhadap kami (sesungguhnya kami) adalah utusan-utusan Rabbmu (memberi kabar gembira kepadamu dengan kelahiran seorang anak laki-laki yang akan menjadi orang yang alim.") anak yang mempunyai ilmu yang banyak, yaitu Nabi Ishak, seperti yang telah kami sebutkan dalam surah Hud.
t_id.iwq: Mereka berkata: "Janganlah kamu merasa takut, sesungguhnya kami memberi kabar gembira kepadamu dengan (kelahiran seorang) anak laki-laki (yang akan menjadi) orang yang alim".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قالوا لا توجل» لا تخف «إنا» رسل ربك «نبشرك بغلام عليم» ذي علم كثير هو إسحاق كما ذكرنا في سورة هود
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالُواْ لَا تَوۡجَلۡ إِنَّا نُبَشِّرُكَ بِغُلَٰمٍ عَلِيمٖ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Mereka berkata, "Janganlah kamu merasa takut) merasa ngeri terhadap kami (sesungguhnya kami) adalah utusan-utusan Rabbmu (memberi kabar gembira kepadamu dengan kelahiran seorang anak laki-laki yang akan menjadi orang yang alim.") anak yang mempunyai ilmu yang banyak, yaitu Nabi Ishak, seperti yang telah kami sebutkan dalam surah Hud

ar: قَالَ أَبَشَّرۡتُمُونِی عَلَىٰۤ أَن مَّسَّنِیَ ٱلۡكِبَرُ فَبِمَ تُبَشِّرُونَ
ar_simple: قَالَ أَبَشَّرْتُمُونِي عَلَىٰ أَنْ مَسَّنِيَ الْكِبَرُ فَبِمَ تُبَشِّرُونَ
transliteration: qāla abashartumūnī ʿalā an massaniya l-kibaru fabima tubashirūna

t.sahih-int: He said, "Have you given me good tidings although old age has come upon me? Then of what [wonder] do you inform
t.asad: Said he: "Do you give me this glad tiding despite the fact that old age has overtaken me? Of what [strange thing], then, are you giving me a tiding
t.yusuf-ali: He said: "Do ye give me glad tidings that old age has seized me? Of what, then, is your good news
t.pickthall: He said: Bring ye me good tidings (of a son) when old age hath overtaken me? Of what then can ye bring good tidings
t.arberry: He said, 'What, do you give me good tidings, though old age has smitten me? Of what do you
t.hilali-khan: Ibrahim (Abraham)] said: "Do you give me glad tidings (of a son) when old age has overtaken me? Of what then is your news
t.itani: He said, “Do you bring me good news, when old age has overtaken me? What good news do you bring?”
t.mubarakpuri: He said: "Do you give me this good news while old age has overtaken me Of what then is your news about"
t.qarib: Abraham said: "Do you give me this good news despite the fact that I am overwhelmed with old age? What kind of good news is this
t.wahiduddin: He said, "Do you bring me such news despite my old age? What kind of good news are you bringing me
t.shakir: He said: Do you give me good news (of a son) when old age has come upon me?-- Of what then do you give me good news
t.haleem: He said, ‘How can you give me such news when old age has come to me? What sort of news is this?’
t.maariful: He said, “Do you give me the good news despite the old age has befallen me? So what good news you are giving to me?”
t.khattab: He wondered, “Do you give me good news despite my old age? What unlikely news!”
t.ghali: He said, "Do you give me glad tidings, though being great (with years) has touched me? (i.e., I am an old man) Of what do you give me glad tidings
t.irving: He said: "Have you brought me word like this once old age has set in on me? What sort of word do you want to spread
t.iwq: He said, "Have you given me good tidings although old age has come upon me? Then of what wonder do you inform

t_id.kemenag: Berkata Ibrahim: "Apakah kamu memberi kabar gembira kepadaku padahal usiaku telah lanjut, maka dengan cara bagaimanakah (terlaksananya) berita gembira yang kamu kabarkan ini?"
t_id.sabiq: Ibrâhîm berkata, 'Bagaimana kalian membawa kabar gembira tentang anak itu, padahal aku sudah tua renta dan tidak kuat lagi! Atas dasar apa kalian memberi kabar yang aneh ini?'
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Berkata Ibrahim, "Apakah kalian memberi kabar gembira kepadaku) dengan melahirkan seorang anak (padahal usiaku telah lanjut) kalimat ini menjadi hal; artinya padahal usia tua telah kualami (maka dengan cara manakah) dengan cara apakah (terlaksananya berita gembira seperti apa yang kalian katakan itu?") Istifham di sini mengandung makna takjub.
t_id.iwq: Berkata Ibrahim: "Apakah kamu memberi kabar gembira kepadaku padahal usiaku telah lanjut, maka dengan cara bagaimanakah (terlaksananya) berita gembira yang kamu kabarkan ini?"

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قال أبشرتموني» بالولد «على أن مسني الكبر» حال أي مع مسه إياي «فبم» فبأي شيء «تبشرون» استفهام تعجب
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالَ أَبَشَّرۡتُمُونِي عَلَىٰٓ أَن مَّسَّنِيَ ٱلۡكِبَرُ فَبِمَ تُبَشِّرُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Berkata Ibrahim, "Apakah kalian memberi kabar gembira kepadaku) dengan melahirkan seorang anak (padahal usiaku telah lanjut) kalimat ini menjadi hal; artinya padahal usia tua telah kualami (maka dengan cara manakah) dengan cara apakah (terlaksananya berita gembira seperti apa yang kalian katakan itu?") Istifham di sini mengandung makna takjub

ar: قَالُوا۟ بَشَّرۡنَـٰكَ بِٱلۡحَقِّ فَلَا تَكُن مِّنَ ٱلۡقَـٰنِطِینَ
ar_simple: قَالُوا بَشَّرْنَاكَ بِالْحَقِّ فَلَا تَكُنْ مِنَ الْقَانِطِينَ
transliteration: qālū basharnāka bil-ḥaqi falā takun mina l-qāniṭīna

t.sahih-int: They said, "We have given you good tidings in truth, so do not be of the despairing
t.asad: They answered: "We have given thee the glad tiding of something that is bound to come true. - so be not of those who abandon hope
t.yusuf-ali: They said: "We give thee glad tidings in truth: be not then in despair
t.pickthall: They said: We bring thee good tidings in truth. So be not thou of the despairing
t.arberry: give me good tidings?' They said, 'We give thee good tidings of truth. Be not of those that despair
t.hilali-khan: They (the angels) said: "We give you glad tidings in truth. So be not of the despairing ones
t.itani: They said, “We bring you good news in truth, so do not despair.”
t.mubarakpuri: They said: "We give you good news in truth. So do not be of those who despair."
t.qarib: They answered: "We have given you the good news of Truth so do not be among those who despair
t.wahiduddin: They said, "We have, indeed, given you glad tidings in truth; do not therefore despair
t.shakir: They said: We give you good news with truth, therefore be not of the despairing
t.haleem: They said, ‘We have told you the truth, so do not despair.’
t.maariful: They said, “We have given to you the good news of a fact. So do not be one of those who lose hope.”
t.khattab: They responded, “We give you good news in all truth, so do not be one of those who despair.”
t.ghali: They said, "We have given you glad tidings with the truth, so do not be of the ones who are despondent
t.irving: They said: "We have brought you word of the Truth, so do not act so discouraged
t.iwq: And they said, "We have given you good tidings in truth, so do not be of the despairing

t_id.kemenag: Mereka menjawab: "Kami menyampaikan kabar gembira kepadamu dengan benar, maka janganlah kamu termasuk orang-orang yang berputus asa".
t_id.sabiq: Mereka menjawab, 'Kami memberi kabar gembira ini atas dasar ketetapan yang tidak perlu diragukan lagi. Oleh karena itu, janganlah kamu berputus asa dari kasih sayang Allah. '
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Mereka berkata, "Kami menyampaikan kabar gembira kepadamu dengan benar) dengan sungguh-sungguh (maka janganlah kamu termasuk orang-orang yang berputus asa.") putus harapan.
t_id.iwq: Mereka menjawab: "Kami menyampaikan kabar gembira kepadamu dengan benar, maka janganlah kamu termasuk orang-orang yang berputus asa".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قالوا بشرناك بالحق» بالصدق «فلا تكن من القانطين» الآيسين
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالُواْ بَشَّرۡنَٰكَ بِٱلۡحَقِّ فَلَا تَكُن مِّنَ ٱلۡقَٰنِطِينَ (الْقَانِطِينَ: اليَائِسِينَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Mereka berkata, "Kami menyampaikan kabar gembira kepadamu dengan benar) dengan sungguh-sungguh (maka janganlah kamu termasuk orang-orang yang berputus asa.") putus harapan

ar: قَالَ وَمَن یَقۡنَطُ مِن رَّحۡمَةِ رَبِّهِۦۤ إِلَّا ٱلضَّاۤلُّونَ
ar_simple: قَالَ وَمَنْ يَقْنَطُ مِنْ رَحْمَةِ رَبِّهِ إِلَّا الضَّالُّونَ
transliteration: qāla waman yaqnaṭu min raḥmati rabbihi illā l-ḍālūna

t.sahih-int: He said, "And who despairs of the mercy of his Lord except for those astray
t.asad: [Abraham] exclaimed: "And who-other than those who have utterly lost their way-could ever abandon the hope of his Sustainer's grace
t.yusuf-ali: He said: "And who despairs of the mercy of his Lord, but such as go astray
t.pickthall: He said: And who despaireth of the mercy of his Lord save those who are astray
t.arberry: He said, 'And who despairs of the mercy of his Lord, excepting those that are astray
t.hilali-khan: Ibrahim (Abraham)] said: "And who despairs of the Mercy of his Lord except those who are astray
t.itani: He said, “And who despairs of his Lord’s mercy but the lost?”
t.mubarakpuri: He said: "And who despairs of the mercy of his Lord except those who are astray"
t.qarib: [He exclaimed]: "And who - other than those who have utterly lost their way -could ever abandon the hope of his Lord's grace
t.wahiduddin: He said, "Who but the misguided despair of the mercy of their Lord
t.shakir: He said: And who despairs of the mercy of his Lord but the erring ones
t.haleem: He said, ‘Who but the misguided despair of the mercy of their Lord?’
t.maariful: He said, “Who can lose hope in the mercy of his Lord except those who have lost the straight path?”
t.khattab: He exclaimed, “Who would despair of the mercy of their Lord except the misguided?”
t.ghali: He said, "And who is despondent of the mercy of his Lord excepting the erring
t.irving: He said: "Who despairs of his Lord´s mercy except those who are lost
t.iwq: And he said, "And who despairs of the mercy of his Lord except for those astray

t_id.kemenag: Ibrahim berkata: "Tidak ada orang yang berputus asa dari rahmat Tuhan-nya, kecuali orang-orang yang sesat".
t_id.sabiq: Ibrâhîm menjawab, 'Aku tidak akan pernah putus asa dari kasih sayang Allah. Sebab, hanya orang-orang sesat yang tidak mengerti keagungan kekuasaan-Nyalah yang berputus asa dari rahmat-Nya. '
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Ibrahim berkata, "Tiada) tidak ada (orang orang berputus asa) dapat dibaca yaqnithu dan yaqnathu (dari rahmat Rabbnya melainkan orang-orang yang sesat.") yakni orang-orang kafir.
t_id.iwq: Ibrahim berkata: "Tidak ada orang yang berputus asa dari rahmat Tuhan-nya, kecuali orang-orang yang sesat".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قال ومن» أي لا «يقنَِط» بكسر النون وفتحها «من رحمة ربه إلا الضالون» الكافرون
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالَ وَمَن يَقۡنَطُ مِن رَّحۡمَةِ رَبِّهِۦٓ إِلَّا ٱلضَّآلُّونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Ibrahim berkata, "Tiada) tidak ada (orang orang berputus asa) dapat dibaca yaqnithu dan yaqnathu (dari rahmat Rabbnya melainkan orang-orang yang sesat.") yakni orang-orang kafir

ar: قَالَ فَمَا خَطۡبُكُمۡ أَیُّهَا ٱلۡمُرۡسَلُونَ
ar_simple: قَالَ فَمَا خَطْبُكُمْ أَيُّهَا الْمُرْسَلُونَ
transliteration: qāla famā khaṭbukum ayyuhā l-mur'salūna

t.sahih-int: [Abraham] said, "Then what is your business [here], O messengers
t.asad: He added: "And what [else] may you have in view, O you [heavenly] messengers
t.yusuf-ali: Abraham said: "What then is the business on which ye (have come), O ye messengers (of Allah)
t.pickthall: He said: And afterward what is your business, O ye messengers (of Allah)
t.arberry: He said, 'And what is your business, envoys
t.hilali-khan: Ibrahim (Abraham) again] said: "What then is the business on which you have come, O Messengers
t.itani: He said, “So what is your business, O envoys?”
t.mubarakpuri: He said: "What then is the business for which you have come, O messengers"
t.qarib: He added: "And, heavenly messengers, what [else] might you have in mind
t.wahiduddin: Then he asked, "What then is your business, O messengers
t.shakir: He said: What is your business then, O apostles
t.haleem: and then asked, ‘Messengers, what is your errand?’
t.maariful: He said, “Then, what is your mission, O messengers?”
t.khattab: He ˹then˺ added, “What is your mission, O messenger-angels?”
t.ghali: He said, "So, what is your concern, you Emissaries
t.irving: He said: "Yet what is your errand, you emissaries
t.iwq: Abraham said, "Then what is your business here, O messengers

t_id.kemenag: Berkata (pula) Ibrahim: "Apakah urusanmu yang penting (selain itu), hai para utusan?"
t_id.sabiq: 'Kalau kalian memang membawa kabar gembira ini untuk kami,' kata Ibrâhîm melanjutkan, 'apa gerangan yang akan kalian kerjakan selanjutnya, wahai malaikat-malaikat utusan Allah?'
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Berkata pula Ibrahim, "Apakah urusan kalian) yakni kepentingan kalian (hai para utusan?").
t_id.iwq: Berkata (pula) Ibrahim: "Apakah urusanmu yang penting (selain itu), hai para utusan?"

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قال فما خطبكم» شأنكم «أيها المرسلون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالَ فَمَا خَطۡبُكُمۡ أَيُّهَا ٱلۡمُرۡسَلُونَ (فَمَا خَطْبُكُمْ: فَمَا شَانُكُمُ الخَطِيرُ؟)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Berkata pula Ibrahim, "Apakah urusan kalian) yakni kepentingan kalian (hai para utusan)

ar: قَالُوۤا۟ إِنَّاۤ أُرۡسِلۡنَاۤ إِلَىٰ قَوۡمࣲ مُّجۡرِمِینَ
ar_simple: قَالُوا إِنَّا أُرْسِلْنَا إِلَىٰ قَوْمٍ مُجْرِمِينَ
transliteration: qālū innā ur'sil'nā ilā qawmin muj'rimīna

t.sahih-int: They said, "Indeed, we have been sent to a people of criminals
t.asad: They answered: "We are sent to people lost in sin [who are to be destroyed]
t.yusuf-ali: They said: "We have been sent to a people (deep) in sin
t.pickthall: They said: We have been sent unto a guilty folk
t.arberry: They said, 'We have been sent unto a people of sinners
t.hilali-khan: They (the angels) said: "We have been sent to a people who are Mujrimun (criminals, disbelievers, polytheists, sinners)
t.itani: They said, “We were sent to a sinful people.”
t.mubarakpuri: They said: "We have been sent to a guilty people."
t.qarib: They answered: "We are sent to a people who already cut all relations to God and rejected his messages
t.wahiduddin: They said, "We have been sent forth to a guilty people
t.shakir: They said: Surely we are sent towards a guilty people
t.haleem: They replied, ‘We have been sent to a people who are guilty.’
t.maariful: They said, “We have been sent to a sinful people
t.khattab: They replied, “We have actually been sent to a wicked people
t.ghali: They said, "Surely we have been sent to a criminal people
t.irving: They said: "We have been sent for some criminal folk
t.iwq: And they said, "Indeed, we have been sent to a people of criminals

t_id.kemenag: Mereka menjawab: "Kami sesungguhnya diutus kepada kaum yang berdosa,
t_id.sabiq: Mereka berkata, 'Kami diutus oleh Allah kepada kaum yang melanggar terhadap hak Allah, nabi-Nya dan hak mereka sendiri. Mereka memang pelaku-pelaku kejahatan. Mereka adalah kaum Lûth. Kami akan menghancurkan mereka.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Mereka menjawab, "Kami sesungguhnya diutus kepada kaum yang berdosa) orang-orang kafir, yang dimaksud adalah kaum Nabi Luth, untuk membinasakan mereka.
t_id.iwq: Mereka menjawab: "Kami sesungguhnya diutus kepada kaum yang berdosa,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قالوا إنا أرسلنا إلى قوم مجرمين» كافرين أي لوط لإهلاكهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّآ أُرۡسِلۡنَآ إِلَىٰ قَوۡمٖ مُّجۡرِمِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Mereka menjawab, "Kami sesungguhnya diutus kepada kaum yang berdosa) orang-orang kafir, yang dimaksud adalah kaum Nabi Luth, untuk membinasakan mereka

ar: إِلَّاۤ ءَالَ لُوطٍ إِنَّا لَمُنَجُّوهُمۡ أَجۡمَعِینَ
ar_simple: إِلَّا آلَ لُوطٍ إِنَّا لَمُنَجُّوهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
transliteration: illā āla lūṭin innā lamunajjūhum ajmaʿīna

t.sahih-int: Except the family of Lot; indeed, we will save them all
t.asad: barring Lot's household, all of whom, behold, we shall save
t.yusuf-ali: Excepting the adherents of Lut: them we are certainly (charged) to save (from harm),- All
t.pickthall: (All) save the family of Lot. Them we shall deliver every one
t.arberry: excepting the folk of Lot; them we shall deliver
t.hilali-khan: (All) except the family of Lout (Lot). Them all we are surely going to save (from destruction)
t.itani: “Except for the family of Lot; we will save them all.”
t.mubarakpuri: "(All) except the family of Lut, all of whom we are to save (from the destruction)."
t.qarib: except for Lot's household. All of them will be saved
t.wahiduddin: Except for Lot's household, all of whom we shall rescue
t.shakir: Except Lut's followers: We will most surely deliver them all
t.haleem: But We shall save the household of Lot
t.maariful: except the family of LūT - all of whom we shall save
t.khattab: As for the family of Lot, we will certainly deliver them all
t.ghali: Excepting the household of Lut; (Lot) surely we will indeed safely deliver them all together
t.irving: except for Lot´s house; we will rescue them all
t.iwq: Except the family of Lot; verily, we will save them all

t_id.kemenag: kecuali Luth beserta pengikut-pengikutnya. Sesungguhnya Kami akan menyelamatkan mereka semuanya,
t_id.sabiq: Tidak akan ada yang dapat menyelamatkan diri dari kejahatan selain keluarga Lûth. Sebab, Allah Swt. telah memerintahkan kami untuk menyelamatkan mereka semua. '
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Kecuali Luth dan pengikut-pengikutnya. Sesungguhnya Kami akan menyelamatkan mereka-semuanya) karena mereka adalah orang-orang yang beriman.
t_id.iwq: kecuali Luth beserta pengikut-pengikutnya. Sesungguhnya Kami akan menyelamatkan mereka semuanya,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إلا آل لوط إنا لمنجوهم أجمعين» لإيمانهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِلَّآ ءَالَ لُوطٍ إِنَّا لَمُنَجُّوهُمۡ أَجۡمَعِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Kecuali Luth dan pengikut-pengikutnya. Sesungguhnya Kami akan menyelamatkan mereka-semuanya) karena mereka adalah orang-orang yang beriman

ar: إِلَّا ٱمۡرَأَتَهُۥ قَدَّرۡنَاۤ إِنَّهَا لَمِنَ ٱلۡغَـٰبِرِینَ
ar_simple: إِلَّا امْرَأَتَهُ قَدَّرْنَا ۙ إِنَّهَا لَمِنَ الْغَابِرِينَ
transliteration: illā im'ra-atahu qaddarnā innahā lamina l-ghābirīna

t.sahih-int: Except his wife." Allah decreed that she is of those who remain behind
t.asad: excepting only his wife, [of whom God says,] `We have ordained [that], behold, she should be among those who stay behind
t.yusuf-ali: Except his wife, who, We have ascertained, will be among those who will lag behind
t.pickthall: Except his wife, of whom We had decreed that she should be of those who stay behind
t.arberry: all together, excepting his wife -- we have decreed, she shall surely be of those that tarry
t.hilali-khan: Except his wife, of whom We have decreed that she shall be of those who remain behind (i.e. she will be destroyed)
t.itani: “Except for his wife.” We have determined that she will be of those who lag behind.
t.mubarakpuri: "Except for his wife, of whom We have decreed that she shall be of those who remain behind."
t.qarib: except for Lot's wife, [God] has ordained that she should be among those who stay behind
t.wahiduddin: except his wife. We have decreed that she will be among those who remain behind [and will be lost]
t.shakir: Except his wife; We ordained that she shall surely be of those who remain behind
t.haleem: all except his wife: We have decreed that she will be one of those who stay behind
t.maariful: but his wife. We have ordained that she will be among those who will remain behind.”
t.khattab: except his wife. We have determined that she will be one of the doomed.”
t.ghali: Excepting his wife. We have determined (that) surely she will indeed be of the laggards
t.irving: except his wife. We have decreed that she will be one of those who will be left behind
t.iwq: Except his wife." Allah decreed that she is of those who remain behind

t_id.kemenag: kecuali istrinya. Kami telah menentukan, bahwa sesungguhnya ia itu termasuk orang-orang yang tertinggal (bersama-sama dengan orang kafir lainnya)".
t_id.sabiq: Semua keluarga Lûth diselamatkan kecuali istrinya. Ia tidak mengikuti suaminya, tetapi malah bersama orang-orang kafir yang pantas disiksa."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Kecuali istrinya, kami telah menentukan, bahwa sesungguhnya ia itu termasuk orang-orang yang tertinggal.") bersama orang-rang kafir lainnya yang tertimpa azab.
t_id.iwq: kecuali istrinya. Kami telah menentukan, bahwa sesungguhnya ia itu termasuk orang-orang yang tertinggal (bersama-sama dengan orang kafir lainnya)".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إلا امرأته قدرنا إنها لمن الغابرين» الباقين في العذاب لكفرها
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِلَّا ٱمۡرَأَتَهُۥ قَدَّرۡنَآ إِنَّهَا لَمِنَ ٱلۡغَٰبِرِينَ (قَدَّرْنَا: قَضَيْنَا, الْغَابِرِينَ: البَاقِينَ فِي العَذَابِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Kecuali istrinya, kami telah menentukan, bahwa sesungguhnya ia itu termasuk orang-orang yang tertinggal.") bersama orang-rang kafir lainnya yang tertimpa azab

ar: فَلَمَّا جَاۤءَ ءَالَ لُوطٍ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلُونَ
ar_simple: فَلَمَّا جَاءَ آلَ لُوطٍ الْمُرْسَلُونَ
transliteration: falammā jāa āla lūṭin l-mur'salūna

t.sahih-int: And when the messengers came to the family of Lot
t.asad: AND WHEN the messengers [of God] came to the house of Lot
t.yusuf-ali: At length when the messengers arrived among the adherents of Lut
t.pickthall: And when the messengers came unto the family of Lot
t.arberry: So, when the envoys came to the folk of Lot
t.hilali-khan: Then, when the Messengers (the angels) came unto the family of Lout (Lot)
t.itani: And when the envoys came to the family of Lot.
t.mubarakpuri: Then when the messengers (the angels) came to the family of Lut
t.qarib: And when the Messengers [of God] came to the house of Lot
t.wahiduddin: When the messengers came to Lot and his family
t.shakir: So when the apostles came to Lut's followers
t.haleem: When the messengers came to the household of Lot
t.maariful: So when the messengers came to the family of LūT
t.khattab: So when the messengers came to the family of Lot
t.ghali: So, as soon as the Emissaries came to the house of Lut; (Lot)
t.irving: When the emissaries came to Lot´s household
t.iwq: And when the messengers came to the family of Lot

t_id.kemenag: Maka tatkala para utusan itu datang kepada kaum Luth, beserta pengikut pengikutnya,
t_id.sabiq: Ketika para malaikat yang diutus oleh Allah untuk menurunkan azab di negeri Lûth dan pengikut- pengikutnya itu tiba,
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka tatkala datang kepada kaum Luth) yang dimaksud adalah Nabi Luth (para utusan itu).
t_id.iwq: Maka tatkala para utusan itu datang kepada kaum Luth, beserta pengikut pengikutnya,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فلما جاء آل لوط» أي لوطا «المرسلون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَلَمَّا جَآءَ ءَالَ لُوطٍ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka tatkala datang kepada kaum Luth) yang dimaksud adalah Nabi Luth (para utusan itu)

ar: قَالَ إِنَّكُمۡ قَوۡمࣱ مُّنكَرُونَ
ar_simple: قَالَ إِنَّكُمْ قَوْمٌ مُنْكَرُونَ
transliteration: qāla innakum qawmun munkarūna

t.sahih-int: He said, "Indeed, you are people unknown
t.asad: he said: "Behold, you are people unknown [here]
t.yusuf-ali: He said: "Ye appear to be uncommon folk
t.pickthall: He said: Lo! ye are folk unknown (to me)
t.arberry: he said, 'Surely you are a people unknown to me
t.hilali-khan: He said: "Verily! You are people unknown to me
t.itani: He said, “You are a people unknown to me.”
t.mubarakpuri: He (Lut) said: "Verily, you are people unknown to me."
t.qarib: he said: "Who are you? I do not know you people
t.wahiduddin: he said, "You are strangers [to me]
t.shakir: He said: Surely you are an unknown people
t.haleem: he said, ‘You are strangers.’
t.maariful: he said, “You are an unfamiliar people.”
t.khattab: he said, “You are surely an unfamiliar people!”
t.ghali: He said, "Surely you are a people unrecognized (by me)
t.irving: he said: "You are folk who should be ignored
t.iwq: And he said, "Indeed, you are people unknown

t_id.kemenag: ia berkata: "Sesungguhnya kamu adalah orang-orang yang tidak dikenal".
t_id.sabiq: Lûth berkata kepada mereka, "Sesungguhnya kalian adalah kaum yang aku ingkari dan hindari karena khawatir kalian membawa malapetaka untuk kami."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Ia berkata) kepada para utusan itu ("Sesungguhnya kalian adalah orang-orang yang tidak dikenal.")
t_id.iwq: ia berkata: "Sesungguhnya kamu adalah orang-orang yang tidak dikenal".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قال» لهم «إنكم قوم منكرون» لا أعرفكم
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالَ إِنَّكُمۡ قَوۡمٞ مُّنكَرُونَ (مُّنكَرُونَ: غَيْرُ مَعْرُوفِينَ لِي)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Ia berkata) kepada para utusan itu ("Sesungguhnya kalian adalah orang-orang yang tidak dikenal)

ar: قَالُوا۟ بَلۡ جِئۡنَـٰكَ بِمَا كَانُوا۟ فِیهِ یَمۡتَرُونَ
ar_simple: قَالُوا بَلْ جِئْنَاكَ بِمَا كَانُوا فِيهِ يَمْتَرُونَ
transliteration: qālū bal ji'nāka bimā kānū fīhi yamtarūna

t.sahih-int: They said, "But we have come to you with that about which they were disputing
t.asad: They answered: "Nay, but we have come unto thee with [the announcement of] something that they [who are given to evil] have always been wont to call in question
t.yusuf-ali: They said: "Yea, we have come to thee to accomplish that of which they doubt
t.pickthall: They said: Nay, but we bring thee that concerning which they keep disputing
t.arberry: They said, 'Nay, but we have brought thee that concerning which they were doubting
t.hilali-khan: They said: "Nay, we have come to you with that (torment) which they have been doubting
t.itani: They said, “We bring you what they have doubts about.”
t.mubarakpuri: They said: "Nay, we have come to you with that (torment) which they have been doubting."
t.qarib: They said, "We have come to you with what they have always rejected but wondered whether it will happen to them
t.wahiduddin: They said, "No, but we bring you news about what they disputed
t.shakir: They said: Nay, we have come to you with that about which they disputed
t.haleem: They said, ‘We have brought you what they said would never happen
t.maariful: They said, “No, but we have brought to you that (scourge) in which they have been doubting
t.khattab: They responded, “We have come to you with that ˹torment˺ which they have doubted
t.ghali: They said, "No indeed, we have come to you with that about which they were wrangling
t.irving: They said: Rather we have come to you about something they have been puzzling over
t.iwq: And they said, "But we have come to you with that about which they were disputing

t_id.kemenag: Para utusan menjawab: "Sebenarnya kami ini datang kepadamu dengan membawa azab yang selalu mereka dustakan.
t_id.sabiq: Para malaikat berkata, "Jangan takut kepada kami. Kami tidak datang membawa apa yang kamu khawatirkan. Kami datang dengan berita gembira, yaitu turunnya azab kepada kaummu yang telah mendustakanmu dengan meragukan atau mengingkari kebenaran datangnya azab itu.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Para utusan menjawab, "Sebenarnya kami ini datang kepadamu dengan membawa apa yang mereka) yakni kaummu (mendustakannya.") mereka meragukan tentangnya; subjek yang dimaksud adalah azab.
t_id.iwq: Para utusan menjawab: "Sebenarnya kami ini datang kepadamu dengan membawa azab yang selalu mereka dustakan.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قالوا بل جئناك بما كانوا» أي قومك «فيه يمترون» يشكون وهو العذاب
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالُواْ بَلۡ جِئۡنَٰكَ بِمَا كَانُواْ فِيهِ يَمۡتَرُونَ (يَمْتَرُونَ: يَشُكُّونَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Para utusan menjawab, "Sebenarnya kami ini datang kepadamu dengan membawa apa yang mereka) yakni kaummu (mendustakannya.") mereka meragukan tentangnya; subjek yang dimaksud adalah azab

ar: وَأَتَیۡنَـٰكَ بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَإِنَّا لَصَـٰدِقُونَ
ar_simple: وَأَتَيْنَاكَ بِالْحَقِّ وَإِنَّا لَصَادِقُونَ
transliteration: wa-ataynāka bil-ḥaqi wa-innā laṣādiqūna

t.sahih-int: And we have come to you with truth, and indeed, we are truthful
t.asad: and we are bringing thee the certainty [of its fulfilment]: for, behold, we are speaking the truth indeed
t.yusuf-ali: We have brought to thee that which is inevitably due, and assuredly we tell the truth
t.pickthall: And bring thee the Truth, and lo! we are truth-tellers
t.arberry: We have come to thee with the truth, and assuredly we speak truly
t.hilali-khan: And we have brought to you the truth (the news of the destruction of your nation) and certainly, we tell the truth
t.itani: “We bring you the truth, and we are truthful.”
t.mubarakpuri: "And we have brought you the truth and certainly we tell the truth."
t.qarib: and we bring you certainty [of its fulfillment], for we speak the Truth
t.wahiduddin: and we have come to you with the truth, and surely we are truthful
t.shakir: And we have come to you with the truth, and we are most surely truthful
t.haleem: we have brought you the Truth. We speak truly
t.maariful: and we have come to you with a definite matter and surely we are truthful
t.khattab: We come to you with the truth, and we are certainly truthful
t.ghali: And we have come up to you with the truth; and surely we are indeed sincere
t.irving: We have brought you the Truth, for we are reliable
t.iwq: And we have come to you with truth, and verily, we are truthful

t_id.kemenag: Dan kami datang kepadamu membawa kebenaran dan sesungguhnya kami betul-betul orang-orang benar.
t_id.sabiq: Kami datang kepadamu dengan membawa sesuatu yang tidak mengandung keraguan, yaitu penurunan azab. Sesungguhnya menepati janji adalah sifat yang kami miliki atas kehendak Allah.
t_id.jalalayn-id: ("Dan kami datang kepadamu membawa kebenaran dan sesungguhnya kami betul-betul orang-orang yang benar.") di dalam pengakuan kami ini.
t_id.iwq: Dan kami datang kepadamu membawa kebenaran dan sesungguhnya kami betul-betul orang-orang benar.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وأتيناك بالحق وإنا لصادقون» في قولنا
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَأَتَيۡنَٰكَ بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَإِنَّا لَصَٰدِقُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan kami datang kepadamu membawa kebenaran dan sesungguhnya kami betul-betul orang-orang yang benar.") di dalam pengakuan kami ini

ar: فَأَسۡرِ بِأَهۡلِكَ بِقِطۡعࣲ مِّنَ ٱلَّیۡلِ وَٱتَّبِعۡ أَدۡبَـٰرَهُمۡ وَلَا یَلۡتَفِتۡ مِنكُمۡ أَحَدࣱ وَٱمۡضُوا۟ حَیۡثُ تُؤۡمَرُونَ
ar_simple: فَأَسْرِ بِأَهْلِكَ بِقِطْعٍ مِنَ اللَّيْلِ وَاتَّبِعْ أَدْبَارَهُمْ وَلَا يَلْتَفِتْ مِنْكُمْ أَحَدٌ وَامْضُوا حَيْثُ تُؤْمَرُونَ
transliteration: fa-asri bi-ahlika biqiṭ'ʿin mina al-layli wa-ittabiʿ adbārahum walā yaltafit minkum aḥadun wa-im'ḍū ḥaythu tu'marūna

t.sahih-int: So set out with your family during a portion of the night and follow behind them and let not anyone among you look back and continue on to where you are commanded
t.asad: Go, then., with thy household while it is yet night, with thyself following them in the rear; and let none of you look back, but proceed whither you are bidden
t.yusuf-ali: Then travel by night with thy household, when a portion of the night (yet remains), and do thou bring up the rear: let no one amongst you look back, but pass on whither ye are ordered
t.pickthall: So travel with thy household in a portion of the night, and follow thou their backs. Let none of you turn round, but go whither ye are commanded
t.arberry: So set forth, thou with thy family, in a watch of the night, and follow after the backs of them, and let not any one of you turn round; and depart unto the place you are commanded
t.hilali-khan: Then travel in a part of the night with your family, and you go behind them in the rear, and let no one amongst you look back, but go on to where you are ordered
t.itani: “Travel with your family at the dead of the night, and follow up behind them, and let none of you look back, and proceed as commanded.”
t.mubarakpuri: "Then travel for a portion of the night with your family, and you go behind them in the rear, and let no one amongst you look back, but go on to where you are ordered."
t.qarib: Go, then with your family while it is still night, follow behind them yourself; and do not permit anyone to look back, but go where you are told to go
t.wahiduddin: so leave with your family some time in the latter part of the night, and walk behind them. Let none of you look back. Go where you are commanded
t.shakir: Therefore go forth with your followers in a part of the night and yourself follow their rear, and let not any one of you turn round, and go forth whither you are commanded
t.haleem: so leave in the dead of the night with your household, and walk behind them. Let none of you look back. Go where you are commanded.’
t.maariful: So, carry your family after a part of the night (has passed), and follow them at the rear (to make sure that all of your family has joined you), and no one from you should look back; and keep going to where you are commanded.”
t.khattab: So travel with your family in the dark of night, and follow ˹closely˺ behind them. Do not let any of you look back, and go where you are commanded.”
t.ghali: So set forth with your family in a watch of the night and closely follow after them in the rear, and let not any of you turn round; and pass away to (the place) where you are commanded
t.irving: Travel with your family at dead of night; you should follow in their rear, and let none of you glance around! Keep on going wherever you are ordered to
t.iwq: Thus set out with your family during a portion of the night and follow behind them and let not anyone among you look back and continue on to where you are commanded

t_id.kemenag: Maka pergilah kamu di akhir malam dengan membawa keluargamu, dan ikutlah mereka dari belakang dan janganlah seorangpun di antara kamu menoleh kebelakang dan teruskanlah perjalanan ke tempat yang di perintahkan kepadamu".
t_id.sabiq: Jika azab turun menimpa mereka, maka berjalanlah kamu dengan membawa keluargamu yang telah ditetapkan selamat, pada akhir malam. Iringilah mereka dari belakang dan jangan ada seorang pun di antara kalian yang menoleh. Teruslah berjalan ke tempat yang diperintahkan."(1). (1) Pada edisi bahasa Arab, tafsir ayat ini hanya berhenti sampai ". . . di akhir malam."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka pergilah kamu di akhir malam dengan membawa keluargamu dan ikutilah mereka dari belakang) berjalanlah kamu di belakang keluargamu (dan janganlah seorang pun di antara kalian menoleh ke belakang) supaya ia tidak melihat besarnya azab yang menimpa mereka (dan teruskanlah perjalanan ke tempat yang diperintahkan kepada kalian) yaitu negeri Syam.
t_id.iwq: Maka pergilah kamu di akhir malam dengan membawa keluargamu, dan ikutlah mereka dari belakang dan janganlah seorangpun di antara kamu menoleh kebelakang dan teruskanlah perjalanan ke tempat yang di perintahkan kepadamu".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فأَسْرِ بأهلك بقطع من الليل واتبع أدبارهم» امش خلفهم «ولا يلتفت منكم أحد» لئلا يرى عظيم ما ينزل بهم «وامضوا حيث تؤمرون» وهو الشام
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَأَسۡرِ بِأَهۡلِكَ بِقِطۡعٖ مِّنَ ٱلَّيۡلِ وَٱتَّبِعۡ أَدۡبَٰرَهُمۡ وَلَا يَلۡتَفِتۡ مِنكُمۡ أَحَدٞ وَٱمۡضُواْ حَيۡثُ تُؤۡمَرُونَ (بِقِطْعٍ: بِجُزْءٍ, وَاتَّبِعْ أَدْبَارَهُمْ: سِرْ وَرَاءَهُمْ, وَامْضُوا: سِيرُوا)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka pergilah kamu di akhir malam dengan membawa keluargamu dan ikutilah mereka dari belakang) berjalanlah kamu di belakang keluargamu (dan janganlah seorang pun di antara kalian menoleh ke belakang) supaya ia tidak melihat besarnya azab yang menimpa mereka (dan teruskanlah perjalanan ke tempat yang diperintahkan kepada kalian) yaitu negeri Syam

ar: وَقَضَیۡنَاۤ إِلَیۡهِ ذَ ٰلِكَ ٱلۡأَمۡرَ أَنَّ دَابِرَ هَـٰۤؤُلَاۤءِ مَقۡطُوعࣱ مُّصۡبِحِینَ
ar_simple: وَقَضَيْنَا إِلَيْهِ ذَٰلِكَ الْأَمْرَ أَنَّ دَابِرَ هَٰؤُلَاءِ مَقْطُوعٌ مُصْبِحِينَ
transliteration: waqaḍaynā ilayhi dhālika l-amra anna dābira hāulāi maqṭūʿun muṣ'biḥīna

t.sahih-int: And We conveyed to him [the decree] of that matter: that those [sinners] would be eliminated by early morning
t.asad: And [through Our messengers] We revealed unto him this decree: "The last remnant of those [sinners] shall be wiped out" in the morn
t.yusuf-ali: And We made known this decree to him, that the last remnants of those (sinners) should be cut off by the morning
t.pickthall: And We made plain the case to him, that the root of them (who did wrong) was to be cut at early morn
t.arberry: And We decreed for him that commandment, that the last remnant of those should be cut off in the morning
t.hilali-khan: And We made known this decree to him, that the root of those (sinners) was to be cut off in the early morning
t.itani: And We informed him of Our decree: the last remnant of these will be uprooted by early morning.
t.mubarakpuri: And We made this decree known to him that those (sinners) would be rooted out in the early morning.
t.qarib: And We revealed unto him the decree: "The very last of those [sinners] will be wiped out by the morning
t.wahiduddin: We communicated to him Our decree that the guilty ones would be destroyed by the morning
t.shakir: And We revealed to him this decree, that the roots of these shall be cut off in the morning
t.haleem: We made this decree known to him: the last remnants of those people would be wiped out in the morning
t.maariful: We conveyed to him Our decision that they (the unbelievers) were to be totally uprooted when they would see the morning
t.khattab: We revealed to him this decree: “Those ˹sinners˺ will be uprooted in the morning.”
t.ghali: And We decreed for him that Command, that the last trace of these was to be cut off in the (early) morning
t.irving: We have passed judgment on that case for him so that those people´s last remnant shall be cut off once morning dawns for them
t.iwq: And We conveyed to him the decree of that matter: that those sinners would be eliminated by early morning

t_id.kemenag: Dan telah Kami wahyukan kepadanya (Luth) perkara itu, yaitu bahwa mereka akan ditumpas habis di waktu subuh.
t_id.sabiq: Allah mewahyukan kepada Lûth, "Sesungguhnya Kami telah memutuskan dan menakdirkan bahwa para pelaku kejahatan itu adalah orang-orang yang binasa. Mereka akan diluluhlantakkan di waktu subuh, dan tak seorang pun dari mereka yang tersisa."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan telah Kami putuskan) telah Kami wahyukan (kepada Luth perkara itu) yaitu (bahwa mereka akan ditumpas habis di waktu subuh) lafal mushbihiin menjadi hal; artinya pembinasaan mereka dilakukan pada waktu subuh.
t_id.iwq: Dan telah Kami wahyukan kepadanya (Luth) perkara itu, yaitu bahwa mereka akan ditumpas habis di waktu subuh.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وقضينا» أوحينا «إليه ذلك الأمر» وهو «أن دابر هؤلاء مقطوع مصبحين» حال أي يتم استئصالهم في الصباح
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَقَضَيۡنَآ إِلَيۡهِ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلۡأَمۡرَ أَنَّ دَابِرَ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ مَقۡطُوعٞ مُّصۡبِحِينَ (وَقَضَيْنَا: أَوْحَيْنَا, دَابِرَ: آخِرَ, مَقْطُوعٌ: مُهْلَكٌ بِالعَذَابِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan telah Kami putuskan) telah Kami wahyukan (kepada Luth perkara itu) yaitu (bahwa mereka akan ditumpas habis di waktu subuh) lafal mushbihiin menjadi hal; artinya pembinasaan mereka dilakukan pada waktu subuh

ar: وَجَاۤءَ أَهۡلُ ٱلۡمَدِینَةِ یَسۡتَبۡشِرُونَ
ar_simple: وَجَاءَ أَهْلُ الْمَدِينَةِ يَسْتَبْشِرُونَ
transliteration: wajāa ahlu l-madīnati yastabshirūna

t.sahih-int: And the people of the city came rejoicing
t.asad: And the people of the city came [unto Lot], rejoicing at the glad tiding
t.yusuf-ali: The inhabitants of the city came in (mad) joy (at news of the young men)
t.pickthall: And the people of the city came, rejoicing at the news (of new arrivals)
t.arberry: And the people of the city came rejoicing
t.hilali-khan: And the inhabitants of the city came rejoicing (at the news of the young men's arrival)
t.itani: And the people of the town came joyfully.
t.mubarakpuri: And the inhabitants of the city came rejoicing.
t.qarib: The people of the town came [to Lot] hoping to have fun [with the strangers]
t.wahiduddin: The people of the town came along, revelling
t.shakir: And the people of the town came rejoicing
t.haleem: The people of the town came along, revelling
t.maariful: And the people of the city came rejoicing
t.khattab: And there came the men of the city, rejoicing
t.ghali: And the population of the city came (to witness) the glad tidings
t.irving: The people of the city came up gay with the news
t.iwq: And the people of the city came rejoicing

t_id.kemenag: Dan datanglah penduduk kota itu (ke rumah Luth) dengan gembira (karena) kedatangan tamu-tamu itu.
t_id.sabiq: Ketika waktu subuh datang, mereka melihat para malaikat dalam bentuk manusia yang elok rupawan. Mereka gembira melihat itu dengan harapan mereka dapat melakukan kejahatan mereka yang keji, yaitu melampiaskan nafsu seksual kepada laki-laki.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan datanglah penduduk kota) yaitu kota Sodom yang para penduduknya adalah kaum Nabi Luth; mereka datang sewaktu mendengar bahwa di dalam rumah Nabi Luth terdapat beberapa laki-laki tampan yang masih muda-muda, mereka adalah para malaikat itu (dengan gembira) lafal yastabsyiruun menjadi hal, artinya keadaan mereka sangat gembira sekali dengan kedatangan para tamu itu, karena mereka berniat untuk melampiaskan nafsu homonya terhadap tamu-tamu itu.
t_id.iwq: Dan datanglah penduduk kota itu (ke rumah Luth) dengan gembira (karena) kedatangan tamu-tamu itu.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وجاء أهل المدينة» مدينة سدوم وهم قوم لوط لما أخبروا أن في بيت لوط مردا حسانا وهم الملائكة «يستبشرون» حال طمعا في فعل الفاحشة بهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَجَآءَ أَهۡلُ ٱلۡمَدِينَةِ يَسۡتَبۡشِرُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan datanglah penduduk kota) yaitu kota Sodom yang para penduduknya adalah kaum Nabi Luth; mereka datang sewaktu mendengar bahwa di dalam rumah Nabi Luth terdapat beberapa laki-laki tampan yang masih muda-muda, mereka adalah para malaikat itu (dengan gembira) lafal yastabsyiruun menjadi hal, artinya keadaan mereka sangat gembira sekali dengan kedatangan para tamu itu, karena mereka berniat untuk melampiaskan nafsu homonya terhadap tamu-tamu itu

ar: قَالَ إِنَّ هَـٰۤؤُلَاۤءِ ضَیۡفِی فَلَا تَفۡضَحُونِ
ar_simple: قَالَ إِنَّ هَٰؤُلَاءِ ضَيْفِي فَلَا تَفْضَحُونِ
transliteration: qāla inna hāulāi ḍayfī falā tafḍaḥūni

t.sahih-int: [Lot] said, "Indeed, these are my guests, so do not shame me
t.asad: Exclaimed [Lot]: "Behold, these are my guests: so put me not to shame
t.yusuf-ali: Lut said: "These are my guests: disgrace me not
t.pickthall: He said: Lo! they are my guests. Affront me not
t.arberry: He said, 'These are my guests; put me not to shame
t.hilali-khan: Lout (Lot)] said: "Verily! these are my guests, so shame me not
t.itani: He said, “These are my guests, so do not embarrass me.”
t.mubarakpuri: [Lut] said: "Verily, these are my guests, so do not shame me."
t.qarib: [Lot] said, "These are my guests. Do not bring shame on me
t.wahiduddin: and he told them, "These are my guests, so do not disgrace me
t.shakir: He said: Surely these are my guests, therefore do not disgrace me
t.haleem: and he told them, ‘These are my guests, do not disgrace me
t.maariful: He (LūT) said, “They are my guests; so do not put me to shame
t.khattab: Lot pleaded, “Indeed, these are my guests, so do not embarrass me
t.ghali: He said, "Surely these are my guests; so do not put me to shame
t.irving: He said: "These are my guests so do not disgrace me
t.iwq: Lot said, "Indeed, these are my guests, so do not shame me

t_id.kemenag: Luth berkata: "Sesungguhnya mereka adalah tamuku; maka janganlah kamu memberi malu (kepadaku),
t_id.sabiq: Lûth khawatir mereka akan melakukan perbuatan keji mereka. Lalu ia pun berkata, "Mereka itu adalah tetamuku, maka jangan kalian permalukan aku dengan perbuatan keji kalian itu.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Ia berkata) yakni Nabi Luth ("Sesungguhnya mereka adalah tamuku; maka janganlah kalian memberi malu kepadaku.")
t_id.iwq: Luth berkata: "Sesungguhnya mereka adalah tamuku; maka janganlah kamu memberi malu (kepadaku),

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قال» لوط «إن هؤلاء ضيفي فلا تفضحون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالَ إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ ضَيۡفِي فَلَا تَفۡضَحُونِ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Ia berkata) yakni Nabi Luth ("Sesungguhnya mereka adalah tamuku; maka janganlah kalian memberi malu kepadaku)

ar: وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَلَا تُخۡزُونِ
ar_simple: وَاتَّقُوا اللَّهَ وَلَا تُخْزُونِ
transliteration: wa-ittaqū l-laha walā tukh'zūni

t.sahih-int: And fear Allah and do not disgrace me
t.asad: but be conscious of God and disgrace me not
t.yusuf-ali: But fear Allah, and shame me not
t.pickthall: And keep your duty to Allah, and shame me not
t.arberry: and fear God, and do not degrade me
t.hilali-khan: And fear Allah and disgrace me not
t.itani: “And fear God, and do not disgrace me.”
t.mubarakpuri: "And have Taqwa of Allah, and do not disgrace me."
t.qarib: but fear God and do not disgrace me
t.wahiduddin: Fear God and do not shame me
t.shakir: And guard against (the punishment of) Allah and do not put me to shame
t.haleem: Fear God, and do not shame me.’
t.maariful: and fear Allah and do not disgrace me.”
t.khattab: Fear Allah and do not humiliate me.”
t.ghali: And be pious to Allah and do not disgrace me
t.irving: Heed God, and do not shame me
t.iwq: And fear Allah and do not disgrace me

t_id.kemenag: dan bertakwalah kepada Allah dan janganlah kamu membuat aku terhina".
t_id.sabiq: Bertakwalah kalian kepada Allah. Janganlah kalian lakukan kekejian itu, dan janganlah kalian mempermalukan aku di hadapan mereka."
t_id.jalalayn-id: ("Dan bertakwalah kepada Allah dan janganlah kalian membuat aku terhina.") dengan niat kalian yang ingin melampiaskan nafsu homo kalian terhadap mereka itu.
t_id.iwq: dan bertakwalah kepada Allah dan janganlah kamu membuat aku terhina".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «واتقوا الله ولا تخزون» بقصدكم إياهم بفعل الفاحشة بهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَلَا تُخۡزُونِ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan bertakwalah kepada Allah dan janganlah kalian membuat aku terhina.") dengan niat kalian yang ingin melampiaskan nafsu homo kalian terhadap mereka itu

ar: قَالُوۤا۟ أَوَ لَمۡ نَنۡهَكَ عَنِ ٱلۡعَـٰلَمِینَ
ar_simple: قَالُوا أَوَلَمْ نَنْهَكَ عَنِ الْعَالَمِينَ
transliteration: qālū awalam nanhaka ʿani l-ʿālamīna

t.sahih-int: They said, "Have we not forbidden you from [protecting] people
t.asad: They answered: "Have we not forbidden thee [to offer protection] to any kind of people
t.yusuf-ali: They said: "Did we not forbid thee (to speak) for all and sundry
t.pickthall: They said; Have we not forbidden you from (entertaining) anyone
t.arberry: They said, 'Have we not forbidden thee all beings
t.hilali-khan: They (people of the city) said: "Did we not forbid you to entertain (or protect) any of the 'Alamin (people, foreigners, strangers, etc. from us)
t.itani: They said, “Did we not forbid you from strangers?”
t.mubarakpuri: They said: "Did we not forbid you from entertaining any of the `Alamin"
t.qarib: They answered, "Have we not forbidden you [to offer protection] to any kind of people
t.wahiduddin: They said, "Did we not forbid you to extend hospitality to strangers
t.shakir: They said: Have we not forbidden you from (other) people
t.haleem: They answered, ‘Have we not told you not to interfere [between us and] anyone else?’
t.maariful: They said, “Had we not forbidden you from (being the guardian of) the whole world?”
t.khattab: They responded, “Have we not forbidden you from protecting anyone?”
t.ghali: They said, "Have we not forbidden you (to entertain all) men?" (Literally: the worlds)
t.irving: They said: "Didn´t we forbid you to have contact with [anyone in] the Universe [outside]?"´
t.iwq: They said, "Have we not forbidden you from protecting people

t_id.kemenag: Mereka berkata: "Dan bukankah kami telah melarangmu dari (melindungi) manusia?"
t_id.sabiq: Para pelaku kejahatan itu berkata, "Bukankah kami telah melarangmu untuk menjamu seseorang kemudian sekarang kamu mencegah kami melampiaskan keinginan kami kepada mereka?"
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Mereka berkata, "Bukankah kami telah melarangmu dari menerima manusia?") yakni menerima mereka sebagai tamumu.
t_id.iwq: Mereka berkata: "Dan bukankah kami telah melarangmu dari (melindungi) manusia?"

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قالوا أو لم ننهك عن العالمين» عن إضافتهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالُوٓاْ أَوَلَمۡ نَنۡهَكَ عَنِ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Mereka berkata, "Bukankah kami telah melarangmu dari menerima manusia?") yakni menerima mereka sebagai tamumu

ar: قَالَ هَـٰۤؤُلَاۤءِ بَنَاتِیۤ إِن كُنتُمۡ فَـٰعِلِینَ
ar_simple: قَالَ هَٰؤُلَاءِ بَنَاتِي إِنْ كُنْتُمْ فَاعِلِينَ
transliteration: qāla hāulāi banātī in kuntum fāʿilīna

t.sahih-int: [Lot] said, "These are my daughters - if you would be doers [of lawful marriage]
t.asad: [Lot] said: "[Take instead] these daughters of mine, if you must do [whatever you intend to do]
t.yusuf-ali: He said: "There are my daughters (to marry), if ye must act (so)
t.pickthall: He said: Here are my daughters, if ye must be doing (so)
t.arberry: He said, 'These are my daughters, if you would be doing
t.hilali-khan: Lout (Lot)] said: "These (the girls of the nation) are my daughters (to marry lawfully), if you must act (so)
t.itani: He said, “These are my daughters, if you must.”
t.mubarakpuri: [Lut] said: "These are my daughters, if you must act (so)."
t.qarib: [Lot] said, "Take my daughters instead, if you must
t.wahiduddin: He said, "Here are my daughters, if you must act in this way
t.shakir: He said: These are my daughters, if you will do (aught)
t.haleem: He said, ‘My daughters are here, if you must.’
t.maariful: He said, “These are my daughters, if you are to do something.”
t.khattab: He said, “O my people! Here are my daughters ˹so marry them˺ if you wish to do so.”
t.ghali: He said, "These are my daughters (to marry), if you would be performing (that)
t.irving: He said: "These are my daughters if you are going to do (something)
t.iwq: Lot said, "These are my daughters - if you would be doers of lawful marriage

t_id.kemenag: Luth berkata: "Inilah puteri-puteriku (kawinlah dengan mereka), jika kamu hendak berbuat (secara yang halal)".
t_id.sabiq: Nabi Lûth, sambil mengingatkan mereka cara wajar yang diperbolehkan, berkata, "Ini gadis-gadis desa. Mereka adalah anak-anakku. Kawinilah mereka jika kalian ingin menyalurkan nafsu kalian."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Luth berkata, "Inilah putri-putriku, jika kalian hendak berbuat,") untuk melampiaskan nafsu syahwat kalian, oleh sebab itu maka kawinilah mereka. Lalu Allah berfirman:
t_id.iwq: Luth berkata: "Inilah puteri-puteriku (kawinlah dengan mereka), jika kamu hendak berbuat (secara yang halal)".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قال هؤلاء بناتي إن كنتم فاعلين» ما تريدون من قضاء الشهوة فتزوجوهن. قال تعالى
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالَ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ بَنَاتِيٓ إِن كُنتُمۡ فَٰعِلِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Luth berkata, "Inilah putri-putriku, jika kalian hendak berbuat,") untuk melampiaskan nafsu syahwat kalian, oleh sebab itu maka kawinilah mereka. Lalu Allah berfirman

ar: لَعَمۡرُكَ إِنَّهُمۡ لَفِی سَكۡرَتِهِمۡ یَعۡمَهُونَ
ar_simple: لَعَمْرُكَ إِنَّهُمْ لَفِي سَكْرَتِهِمْ يَعْمَهُونَ
transliteration: laʿamruka innahum lafī sakratihim yaʿmahūna

t.sahih-int: By your life, [O Muhammad], indeed they were, in their intoxication, wandering blindly
t.asad: [But the angels spoke thus:] "As thou livest, [O Lot, they will not listen to thee:] behold, in their delirium [of lust] they are but blindly stumbling to and fro
t.yusuf-ali: Verily, by thy life (O Prophet), in their wild intoxication, they wander in distraction, to and fro
t.pickthall: By thy life (O Muhammad) they moved blindly in the frenzy of approaching death
t.arberry: By thy life, they wandered blindly in their dazzlement
t.hilali-khan: Verily, by your life (O Muhammad SAW), in their wild intoxication, they were wandering blindly
t.itani: By your life, they were blundering in their drunkenness.
t.mubarakpuri: Verily, by your life, in their wild intoxication, they were wandering blindly.
t.qarib: Do not pay attention to them [the messengers said], they are stumbling around in their wild intoxication
t.wahiduddin: By your life, they wandered on in their wild intoxication
t.shakir: By your life! they were blindly wandering on in their intoxication
t.haleem: By your life [Prophet], they wandered on in their wild intoxication
t.maariful: By your life, (O prophet) they were wandering blindly in their intoxication (misguidance)
t.khattab: By your life ˹O Prophet˺, they certainly wandered blindly, intoxicated ˹by lust˺
t.ghali: By your life, surely they were indeed blundering in their stupor
t.irving: Upon your life, they were groping along in their drunkenness
t.iwq: By your life, O Muhammad, indeed they were, in their intoxication, wandering blindly

t_id.kemenag: (Allah berfirman): "Demi umurmu (Muhammad), sesungguhnya mereka terombang-ambing di dalam kemabukan (kesesatan)".
t_id.sabiq: Demi hidupmu, wahai Nabi yang terpercaya, sesungguhnya mereka lengah, seperti orang mabuk, terhadap azab yang akan menimpa mereka. Mereka adalah orang-orang tersesat dan bimbang, tidak mengerti jalan yang akan dilalui.
t_id.jalalayn-id: ("Demi umurmu) khithab atau pembicaraan ini ditujukan kepada Nabi saw.; artinya demi hidupmu (sesungguhnya mereka terombang-ambing di dalam kemabukan atau kesesatan") yakni mereka bergelimang di dalam kesesatannya.
t_id.iwq: (Allah berfirman): "Demi umurmu (Muhammad), sesungguhnya mereka terombang-ambing di dalam kemabukan (kesesatan)".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «لعمرك» خطاب للنبي صلى الله عليه وسلم أي وحياتك «إنهم لفي سكرتهم يعمهون» يترددون
tafsir.siraj-ar: لَعَمۡرُكَ إِنَّهُمۡ لَفِي سَكۡرَتِهِمۡ يَعۡمَهُونَ (لَعَمْرُكَ: قَسَمٌ مِنَ اللِه بِحَيَاةِ نَبِيِّنَا مُحَمَّدٍ - صلى الله عليه وسلم -, سَكْرَتِهِمْ: غفْلَتِهِمْ, يَعْمَهُونَ: يَتَرَدَّدُونَ مُتَحَيِّرِينَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Demi umurmu) khithab atau pembicaraan ini ditujukan kepada Nabi saw.; artinya demi hidupmu (sesungguhnya mereka terombang-ambing di dalam kemabukan atau kesesatan") yakni mereka bergelimang di dalam kesesatannya

ar: فَأَخَذَتۡهُمُ ٱلصَّیۡحَةُ مُشۡرِقِینَ
ar_simple: فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ الصَّيْحَةُ مُشْرِقِينَ
transliteration: fa-akhadhathumu l-ṣayḥatu mush'riqīna

t.sahih-int: So the shriek seized them at sunrise
t.asad: And thereupon the blast [of Our punishment] overtook them at the time of sunrise
t.yusuf-ali: But the (mighty) Blast overtook them before morning
t.pickthall: Then the (Awful) Cry overtook them at the sunrise
t.arberry: and the Cry seized them at the sunrise
t.hilali-khan: So As-Saihah (torment - awful cry, etc.) overtook them at the time of sunrise
t.itani: So the Blast struck them at sunrise.
t.mubarakpuri: So the Sayhah overtook them at the time of sunrise.
t.qarib: The blast [of Our punishment] overtook them around sunrise
t.wahiduddin: and thereupon the blast [of Our punishment] overtook them at sunrise
t.shakir: So the rumbling overtook them (while) entering upon the time of sunrise
t.haleem: and the blast overtook them at sunrise
t.maariful: So, they were seized by the Cry at sunrise
t.khattab: So the ˹mighty˺ blast overtook them at sunrise
t.ghali: Then the Shout took them (away) at sunshine
t.irving: so the Blast caught them at sunrise
t.iwq: Thus the shriek seized them at sunrise

t_id.kemenag: Maka mereka dibinasakan oleh suara keras yang mengguntur, ketika matahari akan terbit.
t_id.sabiq: Sementara mereka dalam keadaan mabuk yang membuat lengah, hati mereka terguncang oleh suara keras yang sangat mengejutkan ketika matahari terbit.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka mereka dibinasakan oleh suara keras yang mengguntur) oleh suara keras malaikat Jibril (ketika matahari akan terbit).
t_id.iwq: Maka mereka dibinasakan oleh suara keras yang mengguntur, ketika matahari akan terbit.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فأخذتهم الصيحة» صيحة جبريل «مشرقين» وقت شروق الشمس
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَأَخَذَتۡهُمُ ٱلصَّيۡحَةُ مُشۡرِقِينَ (مُشْرِقِينَ: وَقْتَ شُرُوقِ الشَّمْسِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka mereka dibinasakan oleh suara keras yang mengguntur) oleh suara keras malaikat Jibril (ketika matahari akan terbit)

ar: فَجَعَلۡنَا عَـٰلِیَهَا سَافِلَهَا وَأَمۡطَرۡنَا عَلَیۡهِمۡ حِجَارَةࣰ مِّن سِجِّیلٍ
ar_simple: فَجَعَلْنَا عَالِيَهَا سَافِلَهَا وَأَمْطَرْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ حِجَارَةً مِنْ سِجِّيلٍ
transliteration: fajaʿalnā ʿāliyahā sāfilahā wa-amṭarnā ʿalayhim ḥijāratan min sijjīlin

t.sahih-int: And We made the highest part [of the city] its lowest and rained upon them stones of hard clay
t.asad: and We turned those [sinful towns} upside down, and rained down upon them stone-hard blows of chastisement pre-ordained
t.yusuf-ali: And We turned (the cities) upside down, and rained down on them brimstones hard as baked clay
t.pickthall: And We utterly confounded them, and We rained upon them stones of heated clay
t.arberry: and We turned it uppermost nethermost and rained on it stones of baked clay
t.hilali-khan: And We turned (the towns of Sodom in Palestine) upside down and rained down on them stones of baked clay
t.itani: And We turned it upside down, and rained down upon them stones of baked clay.
t.mubarakpuri: And We turned them upside down and rained stones of baked clay upon them.
t.qarib: and We turned the town upside down, and rained down upon them stones of baked clay
t.wahiduddin: We turned the town upside down and rained upon them stones of clay
t.shakir: Thus did We turn it upside down, and rained down upon them stones of what had been decreed
t.haleem: We turned their city upside down and rained on them a shower of clay stones
t.maariful: Then, We turned it (the city) upside down and rained down upon them stones of baked clay
t.khattab: And We turned the cities ˹of Sodom and Gomorrah˺ upside down and rained upon them stones of baked clay
t.ghali: So We turned it upside-down, and We rained upon them stones of baked clay
t.irving: We turned things upside down and rained down stones which had been stamped with their names on them
t.iwq: And We made the highest part of the city its lowest and rained upon them stones of hard clay

t_id.kemenag: Maka Kami jadikan bahagian atas kota itu terbalik ke bawah dan Kami hujani mereka dengan batu dari tanah yang keras.
t_id.sabiq: Allah telah melaksanakan ketetapan-Nya dan berkata, "Kami menjadikan bagian atas kota-kota mereka terbalik ke bawah, hancur porak poranda. Mereka Kami hujani dengan tanah yang membatu sehingga rumah-rumah mereka hancur. Meskipun mereka keluar ke tanah lapang, hujan batu itu menghadang mereka. Dengan demikian, mereka dikelilingi oleh azab."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka Kami jadikan bagian atasnya) yakni bagian atas kota mereka (terbalik ke bawah) malaikat Jibril mengangkatnya ke langit kemudian menjatuhkannya dalam keadaan terbalik ke tanah (dan Kami hujani mereka dengan batu dari tanah yang keras) yaitu tanah liat yang dibakar dengan api.
t_id.iwq: Maka Kami jadikan bahagian atas kota itu terbalik ke bawah dan Kami hujani mereka dengan batu dari tanah yang keras.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فجعلنا عاليها» أي قراهم «سافلها» بأن رفعها جبريل إلى السماء وأسقطها مقلوبة إلى الأرض «وأمطرنا عليهم حجارة من سجيل» طين طبخ بالنار
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَجَعَلۡنَا عَٰلِيَهَا سَافِلَهَا وَأَمۡطَرۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ حِجَارَةٗ مِّن سِجِّيلٍ (سِجِّيلٍ: طِينٍ مُتَصَلِّبٍ مَتِينٍ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka Kami jadikan bagian atasnya) yakni bagian atas kota mereka (terbalik ke bawah) malaikat Jibril mengangkatnya ke langit kemudian menjatuhkannya dalam keadaan terbalik ke tanah (dan Kami hujani mereka dengan batu dari tanah yang keras) yaitu tanah liat yang dibakar dengan api

ar: إِنَّ فِی ذَ ٰلِكَ لَءَایَـٰتࣲ لِّلۡمُتَوَسِّمِینَ
ar_simple: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَاتٍ لِلْمُتَوَسِّمِينَ
transliteration: inna fī dhālika laāyātin lil'mutawassimīna

t.sahih-int: Indeed in that are signs for those who discern
t.asad: Verily, in all this there are messages indeed for those who can read the signs
t.yusuf-ali: Behold! in this are Signs for those who by tokens do understand
t.pickthall: Lo! therein verily are portents for those who read the signs
t.arberry: Surely in that are signs for such as mark
t.hilali-khan: Surely! In this are signs, for those who see (or understand or learn the lessons from the Signs of Allah)
t.itani: Surely in that are lessons for those who read signs.
t.mubarakpuri: Surely, in this are signs for those who see.
t.qarib: Truly, there are messages in this for those who discern
t.wahiduddin: There are certainly signs in that for those who can learn a lesson
t.shakir: Surely in this are signs for those who examine
t.haleem: There truly is a sign in this for those who can learn
t.maariful: Surely, in that there are signs for those who read signs
t.khattab: Surely in this are signs for those who contemplate
t.ghali: Surely in that are indeed signs for the scrutinizers (i.e., Those who look for the destroyed cities)
t.irving: In that are signs for investigators
t.iwq: Indeed in that are signs for those who discern

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya pada yang demikian itu benar-benar terdapat tanda-tanda (kekuasaan Allah) bagi orang-orang yang memperhatikan tanda-tanda.
t_id.sabiq: Di dalam azab yang menimpa kaum Lûth itu terdapat bukti nyata yang menunjukkan pertanda yang jelas bahwa Allah telah membuktikan ancaman-Nya. Hal itu hanya dapat dimengerti oleh orang-orang yang mengenali peristiwa dan akibat-akibatnya dari tanda-tandanya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya pada yang demikian itu) hal yang telah disebutkan itu (benar-benar terdapat tanda-tanda) yang menunjukkan kepada keesaan Allah (bagi orang-orang yang memperhatikan tanda-tanda) bagi orang-orang yang mau memperhatikannya kemudian mau mengambilnya sebagai pelajaran.
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya pada yang demikian itu benar-benar terdapat tanda-tanda (kekuasaan Allah) bagi orang-orang yang memperhatikan tanda-tanda.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إن في ذلك» المذكور «لآيات» دلالات على وحدانية الله «للمتوسمين» للناظرين المعتبرين
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَٰتٖ لِّلۡمُتَوَسِّمِينَ (لِّلْمُتَوَسِّمِينَ: لِلنَّاظِرِينَ، المُعْتَبِرِينَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya pada yang demikian itu) hal yang telah disebutkan itu (benar-benar terdapat tanda-tanda) yang menunjukkan kepada keesaan Allah (bagi orang-orang yang memperhatikan tanda-tanda) bagi orang-orang yang mau memperhatikannya kemudian mau mengambilnya sebagai pelajaran

ar: وَإِنَّهَا لَبِسَبِیلࣲ مُّقِیمٍ
ar_simple: وَإِنَّهَا لَبِسَبِيلٍ مُقِيمٍ
transliteration: wa-innahā labisabīlin muqīmin

t.sahih-int: And indeed, those cities are [situated] on an established road
t.asad: for, behold, those [towns] stood by a road that still exists
t.yusuf-ali: And the (cities were) right on the high-road
t.pickthall: And lo! it is upon a road still uneffaced
t.arberry: surely it is on a way yet remaining
t.hilali-khan: And verily! They (the cities) were right on the highroad (from Makkah to Syria i.e. the place where the Dead Sea is now)
t.itani: And it is on an existing road.
t.mubarakpuri: And verily, they were right on the highroad.
t.qarib: [the town] is still there standing by a road that still exists
t.wahiduddin: it is still there on the highway
t.shakir: And surely it is on a road that still abides
t.haleem: it is still there on the highway
t.maariful: Surely, it (their city) is located on the straight road
t.khattab: Their ruins still lie along a known route
t.ghali: And surely it is indeed on a way that still exists
t.irving: and it lies along a permanent highway
t.iwq: And indeed, those cities are situated on an established road

t_id.kemenag: Dan sesungguhnya kota itu benar-benar terletak di jalan yang masih tetap (dilalui manusia).
t_id.sabiq: Bahkan reruntuhan kota ini masih ada, yaitu terletak di jalan yang masih dilalui manusia. Dan orang yang hendak mengambil pelajaran dapat memetiknya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya kota itu) yaitu kota kaum Nabi Luth (benar-benar terletak di jalan yang masih tetap dilalui manusia) yakni jalan yang masih dipakai oleh orang-orang Quraisy untuk menuju ke negeri Syam; jalan itu masih tetap ada; mengapa mereka tidak mau menjadikannya sebagai pelajaran?
t_id.iwq: Dan sesungguhnya kota itu benar-benar terletak di jalan yang masih tetap (dilalui manusia).

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وإنها» أي قرى قوم لوط «لبسبيل مقيم» طريق قريش إلى الشام لم تندرس أفلا يعتبرون بهم؟
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَإِنَّهَا لَبِسَبِيلٖ مُّقِيمٍ (لَبِسَبِيلٍ: لَبِطَرِيقٍ, مُّقِيمٍ: ثَابِتٍ يَرَاهُ المُسَافِرُونَ، المَارُّونَ بِهَا)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya kota itu) yaitu kota kaum Nabi Luth (benar-benar terletak di jalan yang masih tetap dilalui manusia) yakni jalan yang masih dipakai oleh orang-orang Quraisy untuk menuju ke negeri Syam; jalan itu masih tetap ada; mengapa mereka tidak mau menjadikannya sebagai pelajaran

ar: إِنَّ فِی ذَ ٰلِكَ لَءَایَةࣰ لِّلۡمُؤۡمِنِینَ
ar_simple: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَةً لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
transliteration: inna fī dhālika laāyatan lil'mu'minīna

t.sahih-int: Indeed in that is a sign for the believers
t.asad: Verily, herein lies a message indeed for all who believe [in God]
t.yusuf-ali: Behold! in this is a sign for those who believed
t.pickthall: Lo! therein is indeed a portent for believers
t.arberry: surely in that is a sign for believers
t.hilali-khan: Surely! Therein is indeed a sign for the believers
t.itani: Surely in that is a sign for the believers.
t.mubarakpuri: Surely, there is indeed a sign in that for the believers.
t.qarib: Truly, there is a sign in this for all who believe
t.wahiduddin: surely in this there is a sign for those who believe
t.shakir: Most surely there is a sign in this for the believers
t.haleem: there truly is a sign in this for those who believe
t.maariful: Surely, in it there is a sign for the believers
t.khattab: Surely in this is a sign for those who believe
t.ghali: Surely in that is indeed a sign for the believers
t.irving: In that is a sign for believers
t.iwq: Indeed in that is a sign for those who believe

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya pada yang demikian itu benar-benar terdapat tanda-tanda (kekuasaan Allah) bagi orang-orang yang beriman.
t_id.sabiq: Keberadaannya di jalan yang jelas dan dilalui manusia merupakan bukti dilaksanakannya janji Allah yang diketahui oleh orang-orang Mukmin yang tunduk kepada kebenaran.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya pada yang demikian itu benar-benar terdapat tanda-tanda) yakni pelajaran-pelajaran (bagi orang-orang yang beriman).
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya pada yang demikian itu benar-benar terdapat tanda-tanda (kekuasaan Allah) bagi orang-orang yang beriman.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إن في ذلك لآية» لعبرة «للمؤمنين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَةٗ لِّلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya pada yang demikian itu benar-benar terdapat tanda-tanda) yakni pelajaran-pelajaran (bagi orang-orang yang beriman)

ar: وَإِن كَانَ أَصۡحَـٰبُ ٱلۡأَیۡكَةِ لَظَـٰلِمِینَ
ar_simple: وَإِنْ كَانَ أَصْحَابُ الْأَيْكَةِ لَظَالِمِينَ
transliteration: wa-in kāna aṣḥābu l-aykati laẓālimīna

t.sahih-int: And the companions of the thicket were [also] wrongdoers
t.asad: AND THE DWELLERS of the wooded dales [of Madyan, too,] were inveterate evildoers
t.yusuf-ali: And the Companions of the Wood were also wrong-doers
t.pickthall: And the dwellers in the wood indeed were evil-doers
t.arberry: Certainly the dwellers in the Thicket were evildoers
t.hilali-khan: And the dwellers in the wood [i.e. the people of Madyan (Midian) to whom Prophet Shu'aib was sent by Allah), were also Zalimun (polytheists and wrong-doers, etc)
t.itani: The people of the Woods were also wrongdoers.
t.mubarakpuri: And the Dwellers of Al-Aykah, were also wrongdoers.
t.qarib: And the woods-dwellers were also unjust
t.wahiduddin: The people of the Wood were also surely wrongdoers
t.shakir: And the dwellers of the thicket also were most surely unjust
t.haleem: The forest-dwellers, too, were wrongdoers
t.maariful: And the people of Aikah were (also) transgressors
t.khattab: And the residents of the Forest were truly wrongdoers
t.ghali: And decidedly the companions of the Thicket (i.e., the dwellers of Madyan) were indeed unjust
t.irving: The Companions in the Forest had been wrongdoers
t.iwq: And the companions of the thicket were also wrongdoers

t_id.kemenag: Dan sesungguhnya adalah penduduk Aikah itu benar-benar kaum yang zalim,
