t_id.sabiq: Seperti pendustaan kaum Lûth, penduduk kota yang ditumbuhi pepohonan lebat dan berbuah juga mendustakan rasul mereka. Mereka adalah orang-orang yang benar-benar zalim dalam akidah dan hidup bermasyarakat.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya) lafal in adalah bentuk takhfif daripada inna (adalah penduduk Aikah itu) yang terkenal dengan pohon-pohonnya yang subur dan rindang, terletak di dekat kota Madyan, dan mereka adalah kaum Nabi Syuaib (benar-benar kaum yang zalim) disebabkan mereka mendustakan Nabi Syuaib.
t_id.iwq: Dan sesungguhnya adalah penduduk Aikah itu benar-benar kaum yang zalim,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وإن» مخففة أي إنه «كان أصحاب الأيكة» هي غيضة شجر بقرب مدين وهم قوم شعيب «لظالمين» بتكذيبهم شعيبا
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَإِن كَانَ أَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلۡأَيۡكَةِ لَظَٰلِمِينَ (أَصْحَابُ الأَيْكَةِ: الأَيْكَةُ: الشَّجْرَةُ المُلْتَفَّةُ، وَأَصْحَابُ الأَيْكَةِ: قَوْمُ شُعَيْبٍ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya) lafal in adalah bentuk takhfif daripada inna (adalah penduduk Aikah itu) yang terkenal dengan pohon-pohonnya yang subur dan rindang, terletak di dekat kota Madyan, dan mereka adalah kaum Nabi Syuaib (benar-benar kaum yang zalim) disebabkan mereka mendustakan Nabi Syuaib

ar: فَٱنتَقَمۡنَا مِنۡهُمۡ وَإِنَّهُمَا لَبِإِمَامࣲ مُّبِینࣲ
ar_simple: فَانْتَقَمْنَا مِنْهُمْ وَإِنَّهُمَا لَبِإِمَامٍ مُبِينٍ
transliteration: fa-intaqamnā min'hum wa-innahumā labi-imāmin mubīnin

t.sahih-int: So We took retribution from them, and indeed, both [cities] are on a clear highway
t.asad: and so We inflicted Our retribution on them. And, behold, both these [sinful communities] lived by a highway, [to this day] plain to see
t.yusuf-ali: So We exacted retribution from them. They were both on an open highway, plain to see
t.pickthall: So we took vengeance on them; and lo! they both are on a high-road plain to see
t.arberry: and We took vengeance on them. The two of them were upon a roadway manifest
t.hilali-khan: So, We took vengeance on them. They are both on an open highway, plain to see
t.itani: So We took revenge upon them. Both are clearly documented.
t.mubarakpuri: So, We took vengeance on them. They are both on an open route, plain to see.
t.qarib: and so We inflicted Our retribution on them. Both of these [sinful communities] were on a highway, [still) plain to see
t.wahiduddin: So We took vengeance on them. Both are still there on the highway, plain for all to see
t.shakir: So We inflicted retribution on them, and they are both, indeed, on an open road (still) pursued
t.haleem: and We took retribution on them; both are still there on the highway, plain for all to see
t.maariful: So, We punished them in retribution, and both of them are (situated) by a highway, clearly visible
t.khattab: so We inflicted punishment upon them. The ruins of both nations still lie on a well-known road
t.ghali: So We took vengeance on them; and surely the two of them were indeed on an evident record (or: register, literally:Imam)
t.irving: so We avenged Ourself on them. Both are a clear indication
t.iwq: So We took retribution from them, and indeed, both cities are on a clear highway

t_id.kemenag: maka Kami membinasakan mereka. Dan sesungguhnya kedua kota itu benar-benar terletak di jalan umum yang terang.
t_id.sabiq: Maka Kami menurunkan murka Kami kepada mereka. Dan bekas-bekas peninggalan mereka terlihat jelas di jalan, hingga memungkinkan orang yang beriman untuk mengambil pelajaran apabila lewat di depan rumah-rumah mereka.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka Kami membalas perbuatan mereka itu) yaitu membinasakan mereka dengan musim panas yang sangat (Dan sesungguhnya kedua kota itu) yaitu kota kaum Nabi Luth dan kota kaum Nabi Syuaib (benar-benar terletak di jalan umum) yakni jalan raya (yang terang) jelas; mengapa kalian hai penduduk Mekah tidak mau mengambil pelajaran daripadanya?
t_id.iwq: maka Kami membinasakan mereka. Dan sesungguhnya kedua kota itu benar-benar terletak di jalan umum yang terang.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فانتقمنا منهم» بأن أهلكناهم بشدة الحر «وإنهما» أي قرى قوم لوط والأيكة «لبإمام» طريق «مبين» واضح أفلا تعتبرون بهم يا أهل مكة
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَٱنتَقَمۡنَا مِنۡهُمۡ وَإِنَّهُمَا لَبِإِمَامٖ مُّبِينٖ (لَبِإِمَامٍ مُّبِينٍ: لَفِي طَرِيقٍ وَاضِحٍ يَمُرُّ بِهَا النَّاسُ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka Kami membalas perbuatan mereka itu) yaitu membinasakan mereka dengan musim panas yang sangat (Dan sesungguhnya kedua kota itu) yaitu kota kaum Nabi Luth dan kota kaum Nabi Syuaib (benar-benar terletak di jalan umum) yakni jalan raya (yang terang) jelas; mengapa kalian hai penduduk Mekah tidak mau mengambil pelajaran daripadanya

ar: وَلَقَدۡ كَذَّبَ أَصۡحَـٰبُ ٱلۡحِجۡرِ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِینَ
ar_simple: وَلَقَدْ كَذَّبَ أَصْحَابُ الْحِجْرِ الْمُرْسَلِينَ
transliteration: walaqad kadhaba aṣḥābu l-ḥij'ri l-mur'salīna

t.sahih-int: And certainly did the companions of Thamud deny the messengers
t.asad: AND, [likewise,] indeed, the people of Al-Hijr gave the lie to [Our] message-bearers
t.yusuf-ali: The Companions of the Rocky Tract also rejected the messengers
t.pickthall: And the dwellers in Al-Hijr denied (Our) messengers
t.arberry: The dwellers in El-Hijr cried lies to the Envoys
t.hilali-khan: And verily, the dwellers of Al-Hijr (the rocky tract) denied the Messengers
t.itani: The people of the Rock also rejected the messengers.
t.mubarakpuri: And verily, the Dwellers of Al-Hijr denied the Messengers.
t.qarib: And the people of Al-Hijr, likewise rejected our messengers
t.wahiduddin: The people of al-Hijr also rejected Our messengers
t.shakir: And the dwellers of the Rock certainly rejected the apostles
t.haleem: The people of al-Hijr also rejected Our messengers
t.maariful: And the people of Al-Hijr gave the lie to the messengers
t.khattab: Indeed, the residents of the Stone Valley also denied the messengers
t.ghali: And indeed the companions (i.e., the inhabitants) of Al- Hijr readily cried lies to the Emissaries
t.irving: The inhabitants of Stoneland rejected the emissaries
t.iwq: And certainly did the companions of Thamud deny the messengers

t_id.kemenag: Dan sesungguhnya penduduk-penduduk kota Al Hijr telah mendustakan rasul-rasul,
t_id.sabiq: Sebagaimana bangsa-bangsa terdahulu, penduduk Hijr(1) juga mendustakan rasul yang diutus kepada mereka. Dengan perkataan mereka itu, berarti mereka telah mendustakan semua rasul, karena misi mereka adalah satu. (1) Penduduk Hijr adalah bangsa Tsamûd. Hijr itu sendiri adalah sebuah lembah yang terletak di antara Madinah dan Syam. Lihat catatan kaki tafsir surat al-A'râf, ayat 73).
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya penduduk kota Al-Hijr telah mendustakan) Al-Hijr, nama sebuah lembah yang terletak di antara kota Madinah dan negeri Syam; tempatnya kaum Tsamud (rasul-rasulnya) mereka mendustakan nabi mereka yaitu Nabi Saleh, hal ini berarti sama saja dengan mendustakan rasul-rasul lainnya, karena sesungguhnya ajaran yang disampaikan oleh para rasul itu pada hakikatnya sama, yaitu ajaran tauhid.
t_id.iwq: Dan sesungguhnya penduduk-penduduk kota Al Hijr telah mendustakan rasul-rasul,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ولقد كذب أصحاب الحجر» واد بين المدينة والشام وهم ثمود «المرسلين» بتكذيبهم صالحا تكذيب لباقي الرسل لاشتراكهم في المجيء بالتوحيد
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَلَقَدۡ كَذَّبَ أَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلۡحِجۡرِ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ (أَصْحَابُ الحِجْرِ: سُكَّانُ وَادِي الحِجْرِ، وَهُمْ ثَمُودُ، وَنَبِيُّهُمْ صَالِحٌ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya penduduk kota Al-Hijr telah mendustakan) Al-Hijr, nama sebuah lembah yang terletak di antara kota Madinah dan negeri Syam; tempatnya kaum Tsamud (rasul-rasulnya) mereka mendustakan nabi mereka yaitu Nabi Saleh, hal ini berarti sama saja dengan mendustakan rasul-rasul lainnya, karena sesungguhnya ajaran yang disampaikan oleh para rasul itu pada hakikatnya sama, yaitu ajaran tauhid

ar: وَءَاتَیۡنَـٰهُمۡ ءَایَـٰتِنَا فَكَانُوا۟ عَنۡهَا مُعۡرِضِینَ
ar_simple: وَآتَيْنَاهُمْ آيَاتِنَا فَكَانُوا عَنْهَا مُعْرِضِينَ
transliteration: waātaynāhum āyātinā fakānū ʿanhā muʿ'riḍīna

t.sahih-int: And We gave them Our signs, but from them they were turning away
t.asad: for We did vouchsafe them Our messages, but they obstinately turned their backs upon them
t.yusuf-ali: We sent them Our Signs, but they persisted in turning away from them
t.pickthall: And we gave them Our revelations, but they were averse to them
t.arberry: We brought them. Our signs, and they turned away from them
t.hilali-khan: And We gave them Our Signs, but they were averse to them
t.itani: We gave them Our revelations, but they turned away from them.
t.mubarakpuri: And We gave them Our signs, but they were averse to them.
t.qarib: We gave them our signs, but they turned their backs to them
t.wahiduddin: We gave them Our signs, but they turned away from them
t.shakir: And We gave them Our communications, but they turned aside from them
t.haleem: We gave them Our signs, but they turned their backs
t.maariful: We provided them with Our signs, yet they kept turning away from them
t.khattab: We gave them Our signs, but they turned away from them
t.ghali: And We brought them Our signs, yet they were veering away from them
t.irving: We gave them Our signs even though they had shunned them
t.iwq: And We gave them Our signs, but from them they were turning away

t_id.kemenag: dan Kami telah mendatangkan kepada mereka tanda-tanda (kekuasaan) Kami, tetapi mereka selalu berpaling daripadanya,
t_id.sabiq: Kami telah menjelaskan bukti-bukti yang menunjukkan kemahakuasaan Kami dan kerasulan Rasul utusan Kami, tetapi mereka memalingkan diri dan tidak mau merenungkannya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan Kami telah mendatangkan kepada mereka tanda-tanda kekuasaan Kami) melalui seekor unta betina tetapi mereka selalu berpaling daripadanya) tidak mau memikirkan tentangnya.
t_id.iwq: dan Kami telah mendatangkan kepada mereka tanda-tanda (kekuasaan) Kami, tetapi mereka selalu berpaling daripadanya,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وآتيناهم آياتنا» في الناقة «فكانوا عنها معرضين» لا يتفكرون فيها
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَءَاتَيۡنَٰهُمۡ ءَايَٰتِنَا فَكَانُواْ عَنۡهَا مُعۡرِضِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan Kami telah mendatangkan kepada mereka tanda-tanda kekuasaan Kami) melalui seekor unta betina tetapi mereka selalu berpaling daripadanya) tidak mau memikirkan tentangnya

ar: وَكَانُوا۟ یَنۡحِتُونَ مِنَ ٱلۡجِبَالِ بُیُوتًا ءَامِنِینَ
ar_simple: وَكَانُوا يَنْحِتُونَ مِنَ الْجِبَالِ بُيُوتًا آمِنِينَ
transliteration: wakānū yanḥitūna mina l-jibāli buyūtan āminīna

t.sahih-int: And they used to carve from the mountains, houses, feeling secure
t.asad: notwithstanding that they had been wont [to enjoy Our blessings and] to hew out dwellings from the mountains, [wherein they could live] in security
t.yusuf-ali: Out of the mountains did they hew (their) edifices, (feeling themselves) secure
t.pickthall: And they used to hew out dwellings from the hills, (wherein they dwelt) secure
t.arberry: They were hewing the mountains into houses, therein dwelling securely
t.hilali-khan: And they used to hew out dwellings from the mountains (feeling themselves) secure
t.itani: They used to carve homes in the mountains, feeling secure.
t.mubarakpuri: And they used to hew out dwellings from the mountains, (feeling) secure.
t.qarib: They carved dwellings in the mountains, thinking themselves secure
t.wahiduddin: They carved out dwellings in the mountains, and lived in security
t.shakir: And they hewed houses in the mountains in security
t.haleem: They carved out dwellings in the mountains, and lived in security
t.maariful: They used to hew out houses from the hills peacefully
t.khattab: They carved their homes in the mountains, feeling secure
t.ghali: And they used to hew the mountains into homes, (therein dwelling) securely
t.irving: They had confidently hewn houses out of the mountains
t.iwq: And they used to carve from the mountains, houses, feeling secure

t_id.kemenag: dan mereka memahat rumah-rumah dari gunung-gunung batu (yang didiami) dengan aman.
t_id.sabiq: Dulu mereka adalah bangsa yang mempunyai kekuatan dan kebudayaan. Mereka membuat rumah dengan cara memahat gunung-gunung hingga mendapat rasa aman terhadap diri dan harta mereka.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan mereka memahat rumah-rumah dari gunung-gunung batu yang didiami dengan aman.)
t_id.iwq: dan mereka memahat rumah-rumah dari gunung-gunung batu (yang didiami) dengan aman.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وكانوا ينحتون من الجبال بيوتا آمنين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَكَانُواْ يَنۡحِتُونَ مِنَ ٱلۡجِبَالِ بُيُوتًا ءَامِنِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Dan mereka memahat rumah-rumah dari gunung-gunung batu yang didiami dengan aman

ar: فَأَخَذَتۡهُمُ ٱلصَّیۡحَةُ مُصۡبِحِینَ
ar_simple: فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ الصَّيْحَةُ مُصْبِحِينَ
transliteration: fa-akhadhathumu l-ṣayḥatu muṣ'biḥīna

t.sahih-int: But the shriek seized them at early morning
t.asad: and so the blast [of Our punishment] overtook them at early morn
t.yusuf-ali: But the (mighty) Blast seized them of a morning
t.pickthall: But the (Awful) Cry overtook them at the morning hour
t.arberry: and the Cry seized them in the morning
t.hilali-khan: But As-Saihah (torment - awful cry etc.) overtook them in the early morning (of the fourth day of their promised punishment days)
t.itani: But the Blast struck them in the morning.
t.mubarakpuri: But the Sayhah (torment - awful cry) overtook them in the early morning.
t.qarib: The blast [of Our punishment] overtook them early in the morning
t.wahiduddin: the blast overtook them early one morning
t.shakir: So the rumbling overtook them in the morning
t.haleem: the blast overwhelmed them early in the morning
t.maariful: Then, the Cry seized them by the morning
t.khattab: But the ˹mighty˺ blast overtook them in the morning
t.ghali: So the Shout took them (away) in the (early) morning
t.irving: So the Blast caught them early one morning
t.iwq: But the shriek seized them at early morning

t_id.kemenag: Maka mereka dibinasakan oleh suara keras yang mengguntur di waktu pagi,
t_id.sabiq: Ketika ingkar, mereka didatangi oleh suara-suara gaduh yang membawa kebinasaan, hingga mereka semua binasa di pagi hari.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka mereka dibinasakan oleh suara keras yang mengguntur di waktu pagi) pada waktu subuh.
t_id.iwq: Maka mereka dibinasakan oleh suara keras yang mengguntur di waktu pagi,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فأخذتهم الصيحة مصبحين» وقت الصباح
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَأَخَذَتۡهُمُ ٱلصَّيۡحَةُ مُصۡبِحِينَ (الصَّيْحَةُ: صَاعِقَةُ العَذَابِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka mereka dibinasakan oleh suara keras yang mengguntur di waktu pagi) pada waktu subuh

ar: فَمَاۤ أَغۡنَىٰ عَنۡهُم مَّا كَانُوا۟ یَكۡسِبُونَ
ar_simple: فَمَا أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُمْ مَا كَانُوا يَكْسِبُونَ
transliteration: famā aghnā ʿanhum mā kānū yaksibūna

t.sahih-int: So nothing availed them [from] what they used to earn
t.asad: and of no avail to them was all [the power] that they had acquired
t.yusuf-ali: And of no avail to them was all that they did (with such art and care)
t.pickthall: And that which they were wont to count as gain availed them not
t.arberry: that they earned did not avail them
t.hilali-khan: And all that which they used to earn availed them not
t.itani: All they had acquired was of no avail to them.
t.mubarakpuri: And all that they used to earn availed them not.
t.qarib: and all [the power] that they had acquired was of no use to them
t.wahiduddin: All that they had acquired was of no avail to them
t.shakir: And what they earned did not avail them
t.haleem: What they had gained was of no use to them
t.maariful: So, whatever they earned did not come to their help
t.khattab: and all they achieved was of no help to them
t.ghali: Then in no way did whatever they used to earn avail them
t.irving: and what they had been earning did not help them out
t.iwq: So nothing availed them from what they used to earn

t_id.kemenag: maka tak dapat menolong mereka, apa yang telah mereka usahakan.
t_id.sabiq: Mereka tidak bisa ditolong oleh harta yang telah mereka usahakan dan benteng, dari kebinasaan yang telah menimpa mereka itu.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka tidak dapat menolong) tidak dapat menolak (mereka) daripada azab (apa yang telah mereka usahakan) yaitu berupa bangunan-bangunan benteng dan harta benda yang mereka miliki dan mereka kumpulkan itu.
t_id.iwq: maka tak dapat menolong mereka, apa yang telah mereka usahakan.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فما أغنى» دفع «عنهم» العذاب «ما كانوا يكسبون» من بناء الحصون وجمع الأموال
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَمَآ أَغۡنَىٰ عَنۡهُم مَّا كَانُواْ يَكۡسِبُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka tidak dapat menolong) tidak dapat menolak (mereka) daripada azab (apa yang telah mereka usahakan) yaitu berupa bangunan-bangunan benteng dan harta benda yang mereka miliki dan mereka kumpulkan itu

ar: وَمَا خَلَقۡنَا ٱلسَّمَـٰوَ ٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ وَمَا بَیۡنَهُمَاۤ إِلَّا بِٱلۡحَقِّۗ وَإِنَّ ٱلسَّاعَةَ لَءَاتِیَةࣱۖ فَٱصۡفَحِ ٱلصَّفۡحَ ٱلۡجَمِیلَ
ar_simple: وَمَا خَلَقْنَا السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا إِلَّا بِالْحَقِّ ۗ وَإِنَّ السَّاعَةَ لَآتِيَةٌ ۖ فَاصْفَحِ الصَّفْحَ الْجَمِيلَ
transliteration: wamā khalaqnā l-samāwāti wal-arḍa wamā baynahumā illā bil-ḥaqi wa-inna l-sāʿata laātiyatun fa-iṣ'faḥi l-ṣafḥa l-jamīla

t.sahih-int: And We have not created the heavens and earth and that between them except in truth. And indeed, the Hour is coming; so forgive with gracious forgiveness
t.asad: AND [remember:] We have not created the heavens and the earth and all that is between them without [an inner] truth; but, behold, the Hour [when this will become clear to all] is indeed yet to come. Hence, forgive [men's failings] with fair forbearance
t.yusuf-ali: We created not the heavens, the earth, and all between them, but for just ends. And the Hour is surely coming (when this will be manifest). So overlook (any human faults) with gracious forgiveness
t.pickthall: We created not the heavens and the earth and all that is between them save with truth, and lo! the Hour is surely coming. So forgive, (O Muhammad), with a gracious forgiveness
t.arberry: We created not the heavens and the earth, and all that is between them, save in truth. Surely the Hour is coming; so pardon thou, with a gracious pardoning
t.hilali-khan: And We created not the heavens and the earth and all that is between them except with truth, and the Hour is surely coming, so overlook (O Muhammad SAW), their faults with gracious forgiveness. [This was before the ordainment of Jihad holy fighting in Allah's Cause]
t.itani: We did not create the heavens and the earth, and what lies between them, except with truth. The Hour is coming, so forgive with gracious forgiveness.
t.mubarakpuri: And We did not create the heavens and the earth and all that is between them except with the truth, and the Hour is surely coming, so overlook their faults with gracious forgiveness.
t.qarib: We have not created the heavens and the earth and all that is between them without [an inner] truth; the Hour [when this will become clear to all] is yet to come. Hence, forgive [men's failings] gracefully
t.wahiduddin: We have created the heavens and the earth and all that is between the two in accordance with the requirements of truth and wisdom. The Hour is surely coming. So overlook [their faults] with gracious forgiveness
t.shakir: And We did not create the heavens and the earth and what is between them two but in truth; and the hour is most surely coming, so turn away with kindly forgiveness
t.haleem: We did not create the heavens and the earth and everything between them without a true purpose: the Hour will certainly come, so [Prophet] bear with them graciously
t.maariful: We did not create the heavens and the earth and all that is in between them without a truthful purpose. The Hour is sure to come. Therefore, overlook (their evil behavior) in a gracious manner
t.khattab: We have not created the heavens and the earth and everything in between except for a purpose. And the Hour is certain to come, so forgive graciously
t.ghali: And in no way did We create the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them except with the Truth; and surely the Hour is indeed coming up, so pardon, with becoming pardoning
t.irving: We have only created Heaven and Earth and whatever lies between them for the sake of Truth. The Hour is coming on, so examine [matters] with fine discrimination
t.iwq: And We have not created the heavens and earth and that between them except in truth. And verily, the Hour is coming; so forgive with gracious forgiveness

t_id.kemenag: Dan tidaklah Kami ciptakan langit dan bumi dan apa yang ada di antara keduanya, melainkan dengan benar. Dan sesungguhnya saat (kiamat) itu pasti akan datang, maka maafkanlah (mereka) dengan cara yang baik.
t_id.sabiq: Kami tidak menciptakan langit, bumi dan segala yang ada di antara keduanya dari kehampaan. Manusia, binatang, tumbuhan, dan benda mati yang ada di antara keduanya telah Kami ciptakan menurut dasar keadilan, kebijaksanaan dan keselarasan yang tidak menghendaki kerusakan yang tidak ada habisnya. Dari itu, hari berakhirnya kejahatan itu pasti akan datang. Tapi maafkanlah orang-orang musyrik, wahai Muhammad, bila hal itu menyangkut masalah keduniaan. Bersabarlah dalam menghadapi kejahatan mereka, karena dakwah yang bijaksana mengharuskan sikap lemah lembut dan senang memaafkan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan tidaklah Kami ciptakan langit dan bumi dan apa yang ada di antara keduanya melainkan dengan benar. Dan sesungguhnya hari kiamat itu pasti akan datang) setiap orang akan menemukan pembalasan amal perbuatannya (maka maafkanlah) hai Muhammad kaummu (dengan cara yang baik) berpalinglah engkau dari mereka tanpa dibarengi dengan rasa menggerutu; akan tetapi ayat ini dinasakh oleh ayat yang memerintahkan memerangi mereka.
t_id.iwq: Dan tidaklah Kami ciptakan langit dan bumi dan apa yang ada di antara keduanya, melainkan dengan benar. Dan sesungguhnya saat (kiamat) itu pasti akan datang, maka maafkanlah (mereka) dengan cara yang baik.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وما خلقنا السماوات والأرض وما بينهما إلا بالحق وإن الساعة لآتية» لا محالة فيجازى كل أحد بعمله «فاصفح» يا محمد عن قومك «الصفح الجميل» أعرض عنهم إعراضا لا جزع فيه وهذا منسوخ بآية السيف
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَمَا خَلَقۡنَا ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَآ إِلَّا بِٱلۡحَقِّۗ وَإِنَّ ٱلسَّاعَةَ لَأٓتِيَةٞۖ فَٱصۡفَحِ ٱلصَّفۡحَ ٱلۡجَمِيلَ (فَاصْفَحِ: تَجَاوَزْ، وَاعْفُ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan tidaklah Kami ciptakan langit dan bumi dan apa yang ada di antara keduanya melainkan dengan benar. Dan sesungguhnya hari kiamat itu pasti akan datang) setiap orang akan menemukan pembalasan amal perbuatannya (maka maafkanlah) hai Muhammad kaummu (dengan cara yang baik) berpalinglah engkau dari mereka tanpa dibarengi dengan rasa menggerutu; akan tetapi ayat ini dinasakh oleh ayat yang memerintahkan memerangi mereka

ar: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ ٱلۡخَلَّـٰقُ ٱلۡعَلِیمُ
ar_simple: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ الْخَلَّاقُ الْعَلِيمُ
transliteration: inna rabbaka huwa l-khalāqu l-ʿalīmu

t.sahih-int: Indeed, your Lord - He is the Knowing Creator
t.asad: verily, thy Sustainer is the all-knowing Creator of all things
t.yusuf-ali: For verily it is thy Lord who is the Master-Creator, knowing all things
t.pickthall: Lo! Thy Lord! He is the All-Wise Creator
t.arberry: Surely thy Lord, He is the All-creator, the All-knowing
t.hilali-khan: Verily, your Lord is the All-Knowing Creator
t.itani: Your Lord is the All-Knowing Creator.
t.mubarakpuri: Verily, your Lord is the Knowing Creator.
t.qarib: Truly, your Lord is the All-Knowing Creator of all things
t.wahiduddin: Surely your Lord is the All Knowing Creator
t.shakir: Surely your Lord is the Creator of all things, the Knowing
t.haleem: Your Lord is the All Knowing Creator
t.maariful: Surely, your Lord is the Creator of all, the All-Knowing
t.khattab: Surely your Lord is the Master Creator, All-Knowing
t.ghali: Surely your Lord, He is The Sublime Creator, The Ever-Knowing
t.irving: Your Lord is the Clever Creator
t.iwq: Indeed, your Lord - He is the Knowing Creator

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya Tuhanmu, Dialah Yang Maha Pencipta lagi Maha Mengetahui.
t_id.sabiq: Sesungguhnya Allah yang telah menciptakan dan mendidikmu, wahai Rasulullah, adalah banyak ciptaan- Nya dan Dia Maha Mengetahui keadaanmu dan keadaan mereka. Dia pantas untuk kamu serahi urusanmu dan urusan mereka, dan hal-hal yang lebih baik buat kamu dan mereka.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya Rabbmu, Dialah Yang Maha Pencipta) segala sesuatu (lagi Maha Mengetahui) segala sesuatu.
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya Tuhanmu, Dialah Yang Maha Pencipta lagi Maha Mengetahui.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إن ربك هو الخلاق» لكل شيء «العليم» بكل شيء
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ ٱلۡخَلَّـٰقُ ٱلۡعَلِيمُ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya Rabbmu, Dialah Yang Maha Pencipta) segala sesuatu (lagi Maha Mengetahui) segala sesuatu

ar: وَلَقَدۡ ءَاتَیۡنَـٰكَ سَبۡعࣰا مِّنَ ٱلۡمَثَانِی وَٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ ٱلۡعَظِیمَ
ar_simple: وَلَقَدْ آتَيْنَاكَ سَبْعًا مِنَ الْمَثَانِي وَالْقُرْآنَ الْعَظِيمَ
transliteration: walaqad ātaynāka sabʿan mina l-mathānī wal-qur'āna l-ʿaẓīma

t.sahih-int: And We have certainly given you, [O Muhammad], seven of the often repeated [verses] and the great Qur'an
t.asad: AND, INDEED, We have bestowed upon thee seven of the oft repeated [verses], and [have, thus, laid open before thee] this sublime Qur'an
t.yusuf-ali: And We have bestowed upon thee the Seven Oft-repeated (verses) and the Grand Qur'an
t.pickthall: We have given thee seven of the oft-repeated (verses) and the great Qur'an
t.arberry: We have given thee seven of the oft-repeated, and the mighty Koran
t.hilali-khan: And indeed, We have bestowed upon you seven of Al-Mathani (the seven repeatedly recited Verses), (i.e. Surat Al-Fatiha) and the Grand Quran
t.itani: We have given you seven of the pairs, and the Grand Quran.
t.mubarakpuri: And indeed, We have bestowed upon you seven of the Mathani, and the Grand Qur'an.
t.qarib: And We have given you seven of the oft-repeated [verses], and this glorious Qur'an
t.wahiduddin: We have given you the seven oft-recited verses and the great Quran
t.shakir: And certainly We have given you seven of the oft-repeated (verses) and the grand Quran
t.haleem: We have given you the seven oft-recited versesand the whole glorious Quran
t.maariful: We have given you the seven oft-repeated verses and the glorious Qur’ān
t.khattab: We have certainly granted you the seven often-repeated verses and the great Quran
t.ghali: And indeed We have already brought you seven of the oft-repeated (i.e., the Opening Surah " Al-Fatihah", as it includes praise and laudation in seven verses) and the magnificent Qur'an
t.irving: We have brought you seven Oft-Repeated (verses] plus the Mighty Qur´an
t.iwq: And We have certainly given you, O Muhammad, seven of the often repeated verses and the great Qur'an

t_id.kemenag: Dan sesungguhnya Kami telah berikan kepadamu tujuh ayat yang dibaca berulang-ulang dan Al Quran yang agung.
t_id.sabiq: Sungguh Kami telah memberimu, wahai Nabi yang jujur, tujuh ayat dari al-Qur'ân, surat al-Fâtihah, yang selalu kamu baca dalam setiap salat. Di dalamnya terdapat permohonan kepada Kami dan permintaan petunjuk yang sempurna. Juga telah Kami berikan kepadamu seluruh al-Qur'ân yang mengandung mukjizat dan bukti kebenarannya sendiri. Dengan keadaan seperti ini, kamu adalah pihak yang kuat yang pantas untuk memberi maaf.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya Kami telah berikan kepadamu tujuh ayat yang dibaca berulang-ulang) Nabi saw. telah bersabda bahwa yang dimaksud adalah surah Al-Fatihah. Demikianlah menurut riwayat yang dikemukakan oleh Bukhari dan Muslim; surah Al-Fatihah dinamakan demikian karena selalu dibaca berulang-ulang dalam setiap salat (dan Alquran yang agung).
t_id.iwq: Dan sesungguhnya Kami telah berikan kepadamu tujuh ayat yang dibaca berulang-ulang dan Al Al-Quran yang agung.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ولقد آتيناك سبعا من المثاني» قال صلى الله عليه وسلم هي الفاتحة رواه الشيخان لأنها تثنى في كل ركعة «والقرآن العظيم»
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَلَقَدۡ ءَاتَيۡنَٰكَ سَبۡعٗا مِّنَ ٱلۡمَثَانِي وَٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ ٱلۡعَظِيمَ (سَبْعًا مِّنَ الْمَثَانِي: سَبْعَ آيَاتٍ تُكَرَّرَ فِي كُلِّ صَلَاةٍ، وَهِيَ الفَاتِحَةُ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya Kami telah berikan kepadamu tujuh ayat yang dibaca berulang-ulang) Nabi saw. telah bersabda bahwa yang dimaksud adalah surah Al-Fatihah. Demikianlah menurut riwayat yang dikemukakan oleh Bukhari dan Muslim; surah Al-Fatihah dinamakan demikian karena selalu dibaca berulang-ulang dalam setiap salat (dan Alquran yang agung)

ar: لَا تَمُدَّنَّ عَیۡنَیۡكَ إِلَىٰ مَا مَتَّعۡنَا بِهِۦۤ أَزۡوَ ٰجࣰا مِّنۡهُمۡ وَلَا تَحۡزَنۡ عَلَیۡهِمۡ وَٱخۡفِضۡ جَنَاحَكَ لِلۡمُؤۡمِنِینَ
ar_simple: لَا تَمُدَّنَّ عَيْنَيْكَ إِلَىٰ مَا مَتَّعْنَا بِهِ أَزْوَاجًا مِنْهُمْ وَلَا تَحْزَنْ عَلَيْهِمْ وَاخْفِضْ جَنَاحَكَ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
transliteration: lā tamuddanna ʿaynayka ilā mā mattaʿnā bihi azwājan min'hum walā taḥzan ʿalayhim wa-ikh'fiḍ janāḥaka lil'mu'minīna

t.sahih-int: Do not extend your eyes toward that by which We have given enjoyment to [certain] categories of the disbelievers, and do not grieve over them. And lower your wing to the believers
t.asad: [so] turn, not thine eyes [longingly] towards the worldly benefits which We have granted unto some of those [that deny the truth]. And neither grieve over those [who refuse to heed thee], but spread the wings of thy tenderness over the believers
t.yusuf-ali: Strain not thine eyes. (Wistfully) at what We have bestowed on certain classes of them, nor grieve over them: but lower thy wing (in gentleness) to the believers
t.pickthall: Strain not thine eyes toward that which We cause some wedded pairs among them to enjoin, and be not grieved on their account, and lower thy wing (in tenderness) for the believers
t.arberry: Stretch not thine eyes to that We have given pairs of them to enjoy; and do not sorrow for them, and lower thy wing unto the believers
t.hilali-khan: Look not with your eyes ambitiously at what We have bestowed on certain classes of them (the disbelievers), nor grieve over them. And lower your wings for the believers (be courteous to the fellow-believers)
t.itani: Do not extend your eyes towards what We have bestowed on some couples of them to enjoy, and do not grieve over them, and lower your wing to the believers.
t.mubarakpuri: Look not with your eyes ambitiously at what We have given to certain classes of them, nor grieve over them. And lower your wings to the believers.
t.qarib: [so] don't turn your eyes [longingly] towards what we have given some of them to enjoy. And neither grieve over those [who are rejecting your message], but spread your wings [of modesty and tenderness] over the believers
t.wahiduddin: Do not strain your eyes towards the worldly benefits We have bestowed on some of them, nor grieve on their account. Lower your wing of mercy for the believers
t.shakir: Do not strain your eyes after what We have given certain classes of them to enjoy, and do not grieve for them, and make yourself gentle to the believers
t.haleem: Do not look longingly at the good things We have given some to enjoy. Do not grieve over the [disbelievers], but lower your wings over the believers
t.maariful: Never stretch your eyes towards what We have given to groups of them to enjoy, and do not grieve for them, and be kind to believers in humbleness
t.khattab: Do not let your eyes crave the ˹fleeting˺ pleasures We have provided for some of the disbelievers, nor grieve for them. And be gracious to the believers
t.ghali: Do not definitely extend forth your eyes to what We have given pairs of them to enjoy; and be not grieved for them, and lower your wing to the believers
t.irving: Do not strain your eyes towards what We let some types of them enjoy; do not feel saddened by them, and lower your [sheltering] wing over believers
t.iwq: Do not extend your eyes toward that by which We have given enjoyment to certain categories of the disbelievers, and do not grieve over them. And lower your wing to the believers

t_id.kemenag: Janganlah sekali-kali kamu menunjukkan pandanganmu kepada kenikmatan hidup yang telah Kami berikan kepada beberapa golongan di antara mereka (orang-orang kafir itu), dan janganlah kamu bersedih hati terhadap mereka dan berendah dirilah kamu terhadap orang-orang yang beriman.
t_id.sabiq: Wahai Muhammad, janganlah kamu memandang kesenangan dunia yang telah Kami berikan kepada sebagian orang kafir, musyrik, Yahudi, Nasrani dan Majusi itu dengan pandangan iri dan ingin memiliki. Yang Kami berikan kepada mereka itu adalah sangat kecil jika dibandingkan dengan kesempurnaan hubunganmu dengan Kami dan dengan al-Qur'ân yang telah kami berikan. Kamu tidak perlu bersedih karena mereka tetap dalam kesalahan. Bersikaplah rendah hati dan penyayang kepada orang-orang Mukmin yang menyertaimu, karena mereka adalah pembela kebenaran dan kaum yang dekat kepada Allah.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Janganlah sekali-kali kamu menunjukkan pandangan matamu kepada berbagai macam kenikmatan hidup yang telah Kami berikan kepada beberapa golongan) maksudnya terhadap berbagai macam kemewahan hidup (di antara mereka, dan janganlah kamu bersedih hati terhadap mereka) jika mereka tidak beriman (dan berendah dirilah kamu) bersikap lembutlah kamu (terhadap orang-orang yang beriman.)
t_id.iwq: Janganlah sekali-kali kamu menunjukkan pandanganmu kepada kenikmatan hidup yang telah Kami berikan kepada beberapa golongan di antara mereka (orang-orang kafir itu), dan janganlah kamu bersedih hati terhadap mereka dan berendah dirilah kamu terhadap orang-orang yang beriman.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «لا تمدّن عينيك إلى ما متعنا به أزواجا» أصنافا «منهم ولا تحزن عليهم» إن لم يؤمنوا «واخفض جناحك» ألن جانبك «للمؤمنين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: لَا تَمُدَّنَّ عَيۡنَيۡكَ إِلَىٰ مَا مَتَّعۡنَا بِهِۦٓ أَزۡوَٰجٗا مِّنۡهُمۡ وَلَا تَحۡزَنۡ عَلَيۡهِمۡ وَٱخۡفِضۡ جَنَاحَكَ لِلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ (لَا تَمُدَّنَّ عَيْنَيْكَ: لَا تَنْظُرْ بِعَيْنَيْكَ، وَلَا تَتَمَنَّ, أَزْوَاجًا: أَصْنَافًا, وَاخْفِضْ جَنَاحَكَ: تَوَاضَعْ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Janganlah sekali-kali kamu menunjukkan pandangan matamu kepada berbagai macam kenikmatan hidup yang telah Kami berikan kepada beberapa golongan) maksudnya terhadap berbagai macam kemewahan hidup (di antara mereka, dan janganlah kamu bersedih hati terhadap mereka) jika mereka tidak beriman (dan berendah dirilah kamu) bersikap lembutlah kamu (terhadap orang-orang yang beriman)

ar: وَقُلۡ إِنِّیۤ أَنَا ٱلنَّذِیرُ ٱلۡمُبِینُ
ar_simple: وَقُلْ إِنِّي أَنَا النَّذِيرُ الْمُبِينُ
transliteration: waqul innī anā l-nadhīru l-mubīnu

t.sahih-int: And say, "Indeed, I am the clear warner
t.asad: and say: "Behold, I am indeed the plain warner [promised by God]
t.yusuf-ali: And say: "I am indeed he that warneth openly and without ambiguity
t.pickthall: And say: Lo! I, even I, am a plain warner
t.arberry: and say, 'Surely, I am the manifest warner
t.hilali-khan: And say: "I am indeed a plain warner
t.itani: And say, “I am the clear warner.”
t.mubarakpuri: And say (O Muhammad): "I am indeed a plain warner."
t.qarib: and say, "I am the clear Warner
t.wahiduddin: and say, "I am, indeed, a plain warner
t.shakir: And say: Surely I am the plain warner
t.haleem: and say, ‘I am here to give plain warning,’
t.maariful: and say, “I am a plain warner indeed”
t.khattab: And say, “I am truly sent with a clear warning”—
t.ghali: And say, "Surely, I, constantly I, am the evident warner
t.irving: SAY:"I am the plain Warner
t.iwq: And say, "Indeed, I am the clear warner

t_id.kemenag: Dan katakanlah: "Sesungguhnya aku adalah pemberi peringatan yang menjelaskan".
t_id.sabiq: Katakan, wahai Rasulullah, kepada semua orang yang ingkar, "Aku adalah pemberi peringatan tentang azab yang keras dengan bukti-bukti yang akurat dan tidak bisa disaingi.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan katakanlah, "Sesungguhnya aku adalah pemberi peringatan) tentang azab Allah supaya jangan menimpa kalian (yang menjelaskan.") artinya yang jelas peringatannya.
t_id.iwq: Dan katakanlah: "Sesungguhnya aku adalah pemberi peringatan yang menjelaskan".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وقل إني أنا النذير» من عذاب الله أن ينزل عليكم «المبين» البين الإنذار
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَقُلۡ إِنِّيٓ أَنَا ٱلنَّذِيرُ ٱلۡمُبِينُ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan katakanlah, "Sesungguhnya aku adalah pemberi peringatan) tentang azab Allah supaya jangan menimpa kalian (yang menjelaskan.") artinya yang jelas peringatannya

ar: كَمَاۤ أَنزَلۡنَا عَلَى ٱلۡمُقۡتَسِمِینَ
ar_simple: كَمَا أَنْزَلْنَا عَلَى الْمُقْتَسِمِينَ
transliteration: kamā anzalnā ʿalā l-muq'tasimīna

t.sahih-int: Just as We had revealed [scriptures] to the separators
t.asad: [For, thou art the bearer of a divine writ] such as We have bestowed from on high upon those who [afterwards] broke it up into parts
t.yusuf-ali: (Of just such wrath) as We sent down on those who divided (Scripture into arbitrary parts)
t.pickthall: Such as We send down for those who make division
t.arberry: So We sent it down to the partitioners
t.hilali-khan: As We have sent down on the dividers, (Quraish pagans or Jews and Christians)
t.itani: Just as We sent down to the separatists.
t.mubarakpuri: As We have sent down on the Muqtasimin (conspiring confederates),
t.qarib: Just as We have sent down warnings for the conspiring separatists
t.wahiduddin: such as We send down for those who are divisive
t.shakir: Like as We sent down on the dividers
t.haleem: like the [warning] We have sent down for those who divide themselves into bands
t.maariful: (to warn them that We may send down the scourge upon them) as We sent down upon the dividers
t.khattab: ˹a warning˺ similar to what We sent to those who divided ˹the Scriptures˺
t.ghali: Just as We sent down upon those who divide among themselves, (i.e., draw lots or divide by means of headless arrows)
t.irving: such as We have sent down for the quibblers
t.iwq: Just as We had revealed scriptures to the separators

t_id.kemenag: Sebagaimana (Kami telah memberi peringatan), Kami telah menurunkan (azab) kepada orang-orang yang membagi-bagi (Kitab Allah),
t_id.sabiq: Seperti peringatan yang telah Kami berikan kepada mereka yang membagi al-Qur'ân menjadi syair, mantra kedukunan, dongeng dan lain sebagainya, kemudian tidak mempercayainya meskipun telah ada bukti yang nyata.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sebagaimana Kami telah menurunkan) azab (kepada orang-orang yang membagi-bagi kitab Allah) yaitu Yahudi dan Nasrani.
t_id.iwq: Sebagaimana (Kami telah memberi peringatan), Kami telah menurunkan (azab) kepada orang-orang yang membagi-bagi (Kitab Allah),

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «كما أنزلنا» العذاب «على المقتسمين» اليهود والنصارى
tafsir.siraj-ar: كَمَآ أَنزَلۡنَا عَلَى ٱلۡمُقۡتَسِمِينَ (المُقْتَسِمِينَ: الَّذِي قَسَّمُوا القُرْآنَ فَآمَنُوا بِبَعْضٍ، وَكَفَرُوا بِبَعْضٍ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sebagaimana Kami telah menurunkan) azab (kepada orang-orang yang membagi-bagi kitab Allah) yaitu Yahudi dan Nasrani

ar: ٱلَّذِینَ جَعَلُوا۟ ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ عِضِینَ
ar_simple: الَّذِينَ جَعَلُوا الْقُرْآنَ عِضِينَ
transliteration: alladhīna jaʿalū l-qur'āna ʿiḍīna

t.sahih-int: Who have made the Qur'an into portions
t.asad: [and] who [now] declare this Qur'an to be [a tissue of] falsehoods
t.yusuf-ali: (So also on such) as have made Qur'an into shreds (as they please)
t.pickthall: Those who break the Qur'an into parts
t.arberry: who have broken the Koran into fragments
t.hilali-khan: Who have made the Quran into parts. (i.e. believed in a part and disbelieved in the other)
t.itani: Those who made the Quran obsolete.
t.mubarakpuri: Who have made the Qur'an into parts.
t.qarib: who reduced the Qur'an into fragments believing in some and rejecting others
t.wahiduddin: and who have broken the Scripture into fragments
t.shakir: Those who made the Quran into shreds
t.haleem: and abuse the Quran––
t.maariful: who had split the divine recitation (Scriptures) into bits
t.khattab: who ˹now˺ accept parts of the Quran, rejecting others
t.ghali: Who have made the Qur'an into fragments
t.irving: who have torn the Quran apart
t.iwq: Who have made the Qur'an into portions

t_id.kemenag: (yaitu) orang-orang yang telah menjadikan Al Quran itu terbagi-bagi.
t_id.sabiq: Yang telah menjadikan al-Qur'ân terpecah menjadi bagian-bagian yang terpisah, padahal ia adalah satu kesatuan yang kemukjizatan dan kebenarannya tidak bisa dipecah-pecah."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Yaitu orang-orang yang telah menjadikan kitab bacaan) yaitu kitab-kitab yang diturunkan kepada mereka (terbagi-bagi) menjadi beberapa bagian; mereka beriman terhadap sebagiannya dan ingkar terhadap sebagian yang lainnya. Menurut pendapat orang lain dikatakan, yang dimaksud dengan mereka adalah orang-orang yang menguasai jalan-jalan yang menuju ke Mekah dengan maksud untuk menghalang-halangi manusia masuk Islam. Sebagian dari mereka mengatakan tentang Alquran, bahwa Alquran itu adalah sihir; sebagian lainnya mengatakan, Alquran adalah peramal; sedangkan sebagian yang lainnya lagi mengatakan, bahwa Alquran adalah syair.
t_id.iwq: (yaitu) orang-orang yang telah menjadikan Al Al-Quran itu terbagi-bagi.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «الذين جعلوا القرآن» أي كتبهم المنزلة عليهم «عضين» أجزاء، حيث آمنوا ببعض وكفروا ببعض، وقيل المراد بهم الذين اقتسموا طرق مكة يصدون الناس عن الإسلام، وقال بعضهم في القرآن سحر وبعضهم كهانة وبعضهم شعر
tafsir.siraj-ar: ٱلَّذِينَ جَعَلُواْ ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ عِضِينَ (عِضِينَ: أَجْزَاءَ، فَقَالَ بَعْضُهُمْ: سِحْرٌ، وَقَالَ بَعْضُهُمْ: كِهَانَةٌ، وَغَيْرَ ذَلِكَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Yaitu orang-orang yang telah menjadikan kitab bacaan) yaitu kitab-kitab yang diturunkan kepada mereka (terbagi-bagi) menjadi beberapa bagian; mereka beriman terhadap sebagiannya dan ingkar terhadap sebagian yang lainnya. Menurut pendapat orang lain dikatakan, yang dimaksud dengan mereka adalah orang-orang yang menguasai jalan-jalan yang menuju ke Mekah dengan maksud untuk menghalang-halangi manusia masuk Islam. Sebagian dari mereka mengatakan tentang Alquran, bahwa Alquran itu adalah sihir; sebagian lainnya mengatakan, Alquran adalah peramal; sedangkan sebagian yang lainnya lagi mengatakan, bahwa Alquran adalah syair

ar: فَوَرَبِّكَ لَنَسۡءَلَنَّهُمۡ أَجۡمَعِینَ
ar_simple: فَوَرَبِّكَ لَنَسْأَلَنَّهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
transliteration: fawarabbika lanasalannahum ajmaʿīna

t.sahih-int: So by your Lord, We will surely question them all
t.asad: But, by thy Sustainer! [On the Day of Judgment] We shall indeed call them to account, one and all
t.yusuf-ali: Therefore, by the Lord, We will, of a surety, call them to account
t.pickthall: Them, by thy Lord, We shall question, every one
t.arberry: Now by thy Lord, We shall surely question them all together
t.hilali-khan: So, by your Lord (O Muhammad SAW), We shall certainly call all of them to account
t.itani: By your Lord, we will question them all.
t.mubarakpuri: So, by your Lord, We shall certainly call all of them to account.
t.qarib: By your Lord! We will call them to account, one and all
t.wahiduddin: by your Lord, We shall question them all
t.shakir: So, by your Lord, We would most certainly question them all
t.haleem: by your Lord, We will question them all
t.maariful: So, by your Lord, We shall question all of them
t.khattab: So by your Lord! We will certainly question them all
t.ghali: So, by your Lord, indeed We will definitely ask them all together
t.irving: By your Lord, We shall question them all
t.iwq: Thus by your Lord, We will surely question them all

t_id.kemenag: Maka demi Tuhanmu, Kami pasti akan menanyai mereka semua,
t_id.sabiq: Jika seperti itu keadaan mereka, maka demi Tuhan yang menciptakan, memelihara dan mendidikmu, Kami sungguh akan memperhitungkan amalan mereka semua pada hari kiamat.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka demi Rabbmu, Kami pasti akan menanyai mereka semuanya) dengan pertanyaan yang bernada mengejek.
t_id.iwq: Maka demi Tuhanmu, Kami pasti akan menanyai mereka semua,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فوربك لنسألنهم أجمعين» سؤال توبيخ
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَوَرَبِّكَ لَنَسۡـَٔلَنَّهُمۡ أَجۡمَعِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka demi Rabbmu, Kami pasti akan menanyai mereka semuanya) dengan pertanyaan yang bernada mengejek

ar: عَمَّا كَانُوا۟ یَعۡمَلُونَ
ar_simple: عَمَّا كَانُوا يَعْمَلُونَ
transliteration: ʿammā kānū yaʿmalūna

t.sahih-int: About what they used to do
t.asad: for whatever they have done
t.yusuf-ali: For all their deeds
t.pickthall: Of what they used to do
t.arberry: concerning that they were doing
t.hilali-khan: For all that they used to do
t.itani: About what they used to do.
t.mubarakpuri: For all that they used to do.
t.qarib: for whatever they have done
t.wahiduddin: about whatever they had been doing
t.shakir: As to what they did
t.haleem: about their deeds
t.maariful: about what they have been doing
t.khattab: about what they used to do
t.ghali: Concerning whatever they were doing
t.irving: about whatever they have been doing
t.iwq: About what they used to do

t_id.kemenag: tentang apa yang telah mereka kerjakan dahulu.
t_id.sabiq: Menghisab mereka atas perbuatan jahat, ingkar dan olok-olok yang telah mereka lakukan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Tentang apa yang telah mereka kerjakan dahulu.)
t_id.iwq: tentang apa yang telah mereka kerjakan dahulu.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «عما كانوا يعملون»
tafsir.siraj-ar: عَمَّا كَانُواْ يَعۡمَلُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Tentang apa yang telah mereka kerjakan dahulu

ar: فَٱصۡدَعۡ بِمَا تُؤۡمَرُ وَأَعۡرِضۡ عَنِ ٱلۡمُشۡرِكِینَ
ar_simple: فَاصْدَعْ بِمَا تُؤْمَرُ وَأَعْرِضْ عَنِ الْمُشْرِكِينَ
transliteration: fa-iṣ'daʿ bimā tu'maru wa-aʿriḍ ʿani l-mush'rikīna

t.sahih-int: Then declare what you are commanded and turn away from the polytheists
t.asad: Hence, proclaim openly all that thou hast been bidden [to say], and leave alone all those who ascribe divinity to aught beside God
t.yusuf-ali: Therefore expound openly what thou art commanded, and turn away from those who join false gods with Allah
t.pickthall: So proclaim that which thou art commanded, and withdraw from the idolaters
t.arberry: So shout that thou art commanded and turn thou away from the idolaters
t.hilali-khan: Therefore proclaim openly (Allah's Message Islamic Monotheism) that which you are commanded, and turn away from Al-Mushrikun (polytheists, idolaters, and disbelievers, etc. - see V)
t.itani: So proclaim openly what you are commanded, and turn away from the polytheists.
t.mubarakpuri: Therefore openly proclaim what you have been commanded, and turn away from the idolators.
t.qarib: Hence, proclaim openly all that you have been told [to say], and leave the idolaters alone
t.wahiduddin: Proclaim openly what you are commanded, and avoid the polytheists
t.shakir: Therefore declare openly what you are bidden and turn aside from the polytheists
t.haleem: So proclaim openly what you have been commanded [to say], and ignore the idolaters
t.maariful: Now, proclaim what you are commanded to, and turn away from those who ascribe partners to Allah
t.khattab: So proclaim what you have been commanded, and turn away from the polytheists
t.ghali: So profess openly what you have been commanded and veer away from the associators (Those who associate others with Allah)
t.irving: So proclaim whatever you are ordered to, and shun associators
t.iwq: Then declare what you are commanded and turn away from those who associate partners

t_id.kemenag: Maka sampaikanlah olehmu secara terang-terangan segala apa yang diperintahkan (kepadamu) dan berpalinglah dari orang-orang yang musyrik.
t_id.sabiq: Maka berdakwahlah dengan terang-terangan dan jangan hiraukan perkataan dan perbuatan orang-orang musyrik.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka sampaikanlah olehmu secara terang-terangan) hai Muhammad (segala apa yang diperintahkan kepadamu) untuk melakukannya, artinya sampaikanlah secara terang-terangan dan laksanakanlah dengan rutin (dan berpalinglah dari orang-orang yang musyrik) ayat ini diturunkan sebelum diperintahkan untuk berjihad.
t_id.iwq: Maka sampaikanlah olehmu secara terang-terangan segala apa yang diperintahkan (kepadamu) dan berpalinglah dari orang-orang yang musyrik.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فاصدع» يا محمد «بما تؤمر» به أي اجهر به وأمضه «وأعرض عن المشركين» هذا قبل الأمر بالجهاد
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَٱصۡدَعۡ بِمَا تُؤۡمَرُ وَأَعۡرِضۡ عَنِ ٱلۡمُشۡرِكِينَ (فَاصْدَعْ: فَاجْهَرْ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka sampaikanlah olehmu secara terang-terangan) hai Muhammad (segala apa yang diperintahkan kepadamu) untuk melakukannya, artinya sampaikanlah secara terang-terangan dan laksanakanlah dengan rutin (dan berpalinglah dari orang-orang yang musyrik) ayat ini diturunkan sebelum diperintahkan untuk berjihad

ar: إِنَّا كَفَیۡنَـٰكَ ٱلۡمُسۡتَهۡزِءِینَ
ar_simple: إِنَّا كَفَيْنَاكَ الْمُسْتَهْزِئِينَ
transliteration: innā kafaynāka l-mus'tahziīna

t.sahih-int: Indeed, We are sufficient for you against the mockers
t.asad: verily, We shall suffice thee against all who [now] deride [this message - all]
t.yusuf-ali: For sufficient are We unto thee against those who scoff
t.pickthall: Lo! We defend thee from the scoffers
t.arberry: We suffice thee against the mockers
t.hilali-khan: Truly! We will suffice you against the scoffers
t.itani: We are enough for you against the mockers.
t.mubarakpuri: Truly, We will suffice you against the mockers,
t.qarib: Truly, We are sufficient for you against all who mock this revelation
t.wahiduddin: We will, surely, suffice you against those who mock
t.shakir: Surely We will suffice you against the scoffers
t.haleem: We are enough for you against all those who ridicule your message
t.maariful: Surely, We are sufficient for you against those who deride
t.khattab: Surely We will be sufficient for you against the mockers
t.ghali: Surely We suffice you against the mockers
t.irving: We will suffice for you against such scoffers
t.iwq: Indeed, We are sufficient for you against the mockers

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya Kami memelihara kamu daripada (kejahatan) orang-orang yang memperolok-olokkan (kamu),
t_id.sabiq: Orang-orang musyrik yang mengejek seruanmu itu tidak akan bisa mengalahkanmu dan tidak akan bisa menghalangi-halangi dakwahmu.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya Kami memelihara kamu daripada kejahatan orang-orang yang memperolok-olokkan) kamu, Kami akan membinasakan masing-masing dari mereka dengan malapetaka. Mereka yang memperolok-olokkan ialah Walid bin Mughirah, Ashi bin Wa'il, Addi bin Qais, Aswad bin Abdul Mutthalib dan Aswad bin Abdu Yaghuts.
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya Kami memelihara kamu daripada (kejahatan) orang-orang yang memperolok-olokkan (kamu),

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إنا كفيناك المستهزئين» بك بإهلاكنا كلا بآفة وهم الوليد بن المغيرة والعاص بن وائل وعدي بن قيس والأسود بن المطلب والأسود بن عبد يغوث
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنَّا كَفَيۡنَٰكَ ٱلۡمُسۡتَهۡزِءِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya Kami memelihara kamu daripada kejahatan orang-orang yang memperolok-olokkan) kamu, Kami akan membinasakan masing-masing dari mereka dengan malapetaka. Mereka yang memperolok-olokkan ialah Walid bin Mughirah, Ashi bin Wa'il, Addi bin Qais, Aswad bin Abdul Mutthalib dan Aswad bin Abdu Yaghuts

ar: ٱلَّذِینَ یَجۡعَلُونَ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَـٰهًا ءَاخَرَۚ فَسَوۡفَ یَعۡلَمُونَ
ar_simple: الَّذِينَ يَجْعَلُونَ مَعَ اللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا آخَرَ ۚ فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ
transliteration: alladhīna yajʿalūna maʿa l-lahi ilāhan ākhara fasawfa yaʿlamūna

t.sahih-int: Who make [equal] with Allah another deity. But they are going to know
t.asad: who assert that there are, side by side with God, other divine powers as well: for in time they will come to know [the truth]
t.yusuf-ali: Those who adopt, with Allah, another god: but soon will they come to know
t.pickthall: Who set some other god along with Allah. But they will come to know
t.arberry: even against those who set up with God another god. Certainly they will soon know
t.hilali-khan: Who set up along with Allah another ilah (god), they will come to know
t.itani: Those who set up another god with God. They will come to know.
t.mubarakpuri: Who make another god along with Allah; but they will come to know.
t.qarib: who associate another deity with God, for in time they will know
t.wahiduddin: who set up another god with God, but they shall soon learn
t.shakir: Those who set up another god with Allah; so they shall soon know
t.haleem: who set up another god beside God- they will come to know
t.maariful: those who believe in any other god along with Allah. So, they shall soon learn (the reality)
t.khattab: who set up ˹other˺ gods with Allah. They will soon come to know
t.ghali: Who make up with Allah another god; so they will eventually know
t.irving: who place another deity alongside God [Alone], They soon will know
t.iwq: Who make equal with Allah another deity. But they are going to know

t_id.kemenag: (Yaitu) orang-orang yang menganggap adanya tuhan yang lain di samping Allah; maka mereka kelak akan mengetahui (akibat-akibatnya).
t_id.sabiq: Penglihatan mereka telah melemah, hingga membuat mereka menjadikan berhala-berhala sebagai sekutu Allah. Tapi mereka akan mengetahui sendiri akibat-akibat kesyirikan mereka itu, pada saat ditimpakan azab yang menyakitkan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Yaitu orang-orang yang menganggap adanya tuhan yang lain di samping Allah) kalimat ayat ini berkedudukan menjadi sifat. Akan tetapi menurut suatu pendapat dianggap sebagai mubtada, oleh karena mengandung makna syarat, maka khabarnya dimasuki huruf fa, yaitu (maka mereka kelak akan mengetahui) akibat-akibat perbuatannya itu.
t_id.iwq: (Yaitu) orang-orang yang menganggap adanya tuhan yang lain di samping Allah; maka mereka kelak akan mengetahui (akibat-akibatnya).

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «الذين يجعلون مع الله إلها آخر» صفة وقيل مبتدأ ولتضمنه معنى الشرط دخلت الفاء في خبره وهو «فسوف يعلمون» عاقبة أمرهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: ٱلَّذِينَ يَجۡعَلُونَ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا ءَاخَرَۚ فَسَوۡفَ يَعۡلَمُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Yaitu orang-orang yang menganggap adanya tuhan yang lain di samping Allah) kalimat ayat ini berkedudukan menjadi sifat. Akan tetapi menurut suatu pendapat dianggap sebagai mubtada, oleh karena mengandung makna syarat, maka khabarnya dimasuki huruf fa, yaitu (maka mereka kelak akan mengetahui) akibat-akibat perbuatannya itu

ar: وَلَقَدۡ نَعۡلَمُ أَنَّكَ یَضِیقُ صَدۡرُكَ بِمَا یَقُولُونَ
ar_simple: وَلَقَدْ نَعْلَمُ أَنَّكَ يَضِيقُ صَدْرُكَ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ
transliteration: walaqad naʿlamu annaka yaḍīqu ṣadruka bimā yaqūlūna

t.sahih-int: And We already know that your breast is constrained by what they say
t.asad: And well do We know that thy bosom is constricted by the [blasphemous] things that they say
t.yusuf-ali: We do indeed know how thy heart is distressed at what they say
t.pickthall: Well know We that thy bosom is oppressed by what they say
t.arberry: We know indeed thy breast is straitened by the things they say
t.hilali-khan: Indeed, We know that your breast is straitened at what they say
t.itani: We are aware that your heart is strained by what they say.
t.mubarakpuri: Indeed, We know that your breast becomes tight because of what they say.
t.qarib: And We know that your heart is distressed by the things they say
t.wahiduddin: We do indeed know how your heart is distressed at what they say
t.shakir: And surely We know that your breast straitens at what they say
t.haleem: We are well aware that your heart is weighed down by what they say
t.maariful: We know that your heart feels distressed for what they say
t.khattab: We certainly know that your heart is truly distressed by what they say
t.ghali: And indeed We already know that, for you, your breast straitens by what they say
t.irving: We already know how cramped your breast feels because of what they say
t.iwq: And We already know that your breast is constrained by what they say

t_id.kemenag: Dan Kami sungguh-sungguh mengetahui, bahwa dadamu menjadi sempit disebabkan apa yang mereka ucapkan,
t_id.sabiq: Kami benar-benar mengetahui betapa sakit dan sesaknya hatimu akibat kata-kata syirik, ejekan dan hinaan yang mereka katakan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan sungguh) lafal qad menunjukkan makna littahqiq (Kami telah mengetahui, bahwa dadamu menjadi sempit disebabkan apa yang mereka katakan) yaitu disebabkan perolok-olokkan dan pendustaan mereka itu.
t_id.iwq: Dan Kami sungguh-sungguh mengetahui, bahwa dadamu menjadi sempit disebabkan apa yang mereka ucapkan,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ولقد» للتحقيق «نعلم أنك يضيق صدرك بما يقولون» من الاستهزاء والتكذيب
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَلَقَدۡ نَعۡلَمُ أَنَّكَ يَضِيقُ صَدۡرُكَ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan sungguh) lafal qad menunjukkan makna littahqiq (Kami telah mengetahui, bahwa dadamu menjadi sempit disebabkan apa yang mereka katakan) yaitu disebabkan perolok-olokkan dan pendustaan mereka itu

ar: فَسَبِّحۡ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّكَ وَكُن مِّنَ ٱلسَّـٰجِدِینَ
ar_simple: فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَكُنْ مِنَ السَّاجِدِينَ
transliteration: fasabbiḥ biḥamdi rabbika wakun mina l-sājidīna

t.sahih-int: So exalt [Allah] with praise of your Lord and be of those who prostrate [to Him]
t.asad: but extol thou thy Sustainer's limitless glory and praise Him, and be of those who prostrate themselves [before Him] in adoration
t.yusuf-ali: But celebrate the praises of thy Lord, and be of those who prostrate themselves in adoration
t.pickthall: But hymn the praise of thy Lord, and be of those who make prostration (unto Him)
t.arberry: Proclaim thy Lord's praise, and be of those that bow
t.hilali-khan: So glorify the praises of your Lord and be of those who prostrate themselves (to Him)
t.itani: So glorify the praise of your Lord, and be among those who bow down.
t.mubarakpuri: So glorify the praises of your Lord and be of those who prostrate themselves (to Him).
t.qarib: but celebrate your Lord's limitless glory, praise Him, and be among those who prostrate themselves [before Him] in worship
t.wahiduddin: But glorify your Lord with His praise, and prostrate yourself
t.shakir: Therefore celebrate the praise of your Lord, and be of those who make obeisance
t.haleem: Celebrate the glory of your Lord and be among those who bow down to Him
t.maariful: So, proclaim the purity and glory of your Lord, and be among those who prostrate themselves (before Allah)
t.khattab: So glorify the praises of your Lord and be one of those who ˹always˺ pray
t.ghali: So extol with the praise of your Lord and be of the prostrating
t.irving: so hymn your Lord´s praise and be one of those who bow down on their knees (in worship)
t.iwq: So exalt Allah with praise of your Lord and be of those who prostrate to Him

t_id.kemenag: maka bertasbihlah dengan memuji Tuhanmu dan jadilah kamu di antara orang-orang yang bersujud (shalat),
t_id.sabiq: Maka apabila kamu merasakan penderitaan itu, bersegeralah menghadap Allah. Masuklah ke dalam golongan orang-orang yang tunduk dan selalu memohon kepada-Nya. Dan jadikanlah salat sebagai penolongmu, karena salat mengandung kesembuhan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka bertasbihlah) seraya (memuji Rabbmu) artinya katakanlah subhaanallaah wa bihamdihi (dan jadilah kamu di antara orang-orang yang bersujud) yakni orang-orang yang mendirikan salat.
t_id.iwq: maka bertasbihlah dengan memuji Tuhanmu dan jadilah kamu di antara orang-orang yang bersujud (salat),

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فسبح» ملتبسا «بحمد ربك» أي قل سبحان الله وبحمده «وكن من الساجدين» المصلين
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَسَبِّحۡ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّكَ وَكُن مِّنَ ٱلسَّـٰجِدِينَ (السَّاجِدِينَ: العَابِدِينَ، المُصَلِّينَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka bertasbihlah) seraya (memuji Rabbmu) artinya katakanlah subhaanallaah wa bihamdihi (dan jadilah kamu di antara orang-orang yang bersujud) yakni orang-orang yang mendirikan salat

ar: وَٱعۡبُدۡ رَبَّكَ حَتَّىٰ یَأۡتِیَكَ ٱلۡیَقِینُ
ar_simple: وَاعْبُدْ رَبَّكَ حَتَّىٰ يَأْتِيَكَ الْيَقِينُ
transliteration: wa-uʿ'bud rabbaka ḥattā yatiyaka l-yaqīnu

t.sahih-int: And worship your Lord until there comes to you the certainty (death)
t.asad: and worship thy Sustainer till death comes to thee
t.yusuf-ali: And serve thy Lord until there come unto thee the Hour that is Certain
t.pickthall: And serve thy Lord till the Inevitable cometh unto thee
t.arberry: and serve thy Lord, until the Certain comes to thee
t.hilali-khan: And worship your Lord until there comes unto you the certainty (i.e. death)
t.itani: And worship your Lord in order to attain certainty.
t.mubarakpuri: And worship your Lord until the certainty (i.e. death) comes to you.
t.qarib: and worship your Lord until you die
t.wahiduddin: and worship your Lord until what is certain [death] comes to you
t.shakir: And serve your Lord until there comes to you that which is certain
t.haleem: worship your Lord until what is certain comes to you
t.maariful: and worship your Lord until comes to you that which is certain
t.khattab: and worship your Lord until the inevitable comes your way
t.ghali: And worship your Lord until the Certitude comes up to you
t.irving: Serve your Lord until conviction comes to you
t.iwq: And worship your Lord until there comes to you the certainty (death)

t_id.kemenag: dan sembahlah Tuhanmu sampai datang kepadamu yang diyakini (ajal).
t_id.sabiq: Beristikamahlah dalam beribadah kepada Allah yang telah mencipta dan menjagamu hingga datang sesuatu yang pasti, hari kiamat dan hari yang dijanjikan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan sembahlah Rabbmu sampai datang kepadamu yang diyakini) yaitu ajal.
t_id.iwq: dan sembahlah Tuhanmu sampai datang kepadamu yang diyakini (ajal).

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «واعبد ربك حتى يأتيك اليقين» الموت
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَٱعۡبُدۡ رَبَّكَ حَتَّىٰ يَأۡتِيَكَ ٱلۡيَقِينُ (الْيَقِينُ: المَوْتُ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan sembahlah Rabbmu sampai datang kepadamu yang diyakini) yaitu ajal
